authors_text: Yurui Ren,Xiaoqing Fan,Ge Li,Shan Liu,Thomas H. Li
title: Neural Texture Extraction and Distribution for Controllable Person Image Synthesis
title_zh: 用于可控人物图像合成的神经纹理提取和分布
abstract: We deal with the controllable person image synthesis task which aims to re-render a human from a reference image with explicit control over body pose and appearance. Observing that person images are highly structured, we propose to generate desired images by extracting and distributing semantic entities of reference images. To achieve this goal, a neural texture extraction and distribution operation based on double attention is described. This operation first extracts semantic neural textures from reference feature maps. Then, it distributes the extracted neural textures according to the spatial distributions learned from target poses. Our model is trained to predict human images in arbitrary poses, which encourages it to extract disentangled and expressive neural textures representing the appearance of different semantic entities. The disentangled representation further enables explicit appearance control. Neural textures of different reference images can be fused to control the appearance of the interested areas. Experimental comparisons show the superiority of the proposed model. Code is available at https://github.com/RenYurui/Neural-Texture-Extraction-Distribution.
summary: We deal with the controllable person image synthesis task which aims to re-render a human from a reference image with explicit control over body pose and appearance. Observing that person images are highly structured, we propose to generate desired images by extracting and distributing semantic entities of reference images. To achieve this goal, a neural texture extraction and distribution operation based on double attention is described. This operation first extracts semantic neural textures from reference feature maps. Then, it distributes the extracted neural textures according to the spatial distributions learned from target poses. Our model is trained to predict human images in arbitrary poses, which encourages it to extract disentangled and expressive neural textures representing the appearance of different semantic entities. The disentangled representation further enables explicit appearance control. Neural textures of different reference images can be fused to control the appearance of the interested areas. Experimental comparisons show the superiority of the proposed model. Code is available at https://github.com/RenYurui/Neural-Texture-Extraction-Distribution.
abstract_zh: 我们处理可控人物图像合成任务，旨在从参考图像重新渲染人类，并明确控制身体姿势和外观。观察到人物图像是高度结构化的，我们建议通过提取和分布参考图像的语义实体来生成所需的图像。为了实现这一目标，描述了一种基于双重注意力的神经纹理提取和分配操作。该操作首先从参考特征图中提取语义神经纹理。然后，它根据从目标姿势学习到的空间分布来分配提取的神经纹理。我们的模型经过训练可以预测任意姿势的人类图像，这鼓励它提取代表不同语义实体外观的解缠结且富有表现力的神经纹理。解开的表示进一步实现了明确的外观控制。可以融合不同参考图像的神经纹理来控制感兴趣区域的外观。实验比较表明了所提出模型的优越性。代码可在 https://github.com/RenYurui/Neural-Texture-Extraction-Distribution 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于双注意力机制的神经纹理提取与分布方法，用于可控的人像图像合成任务，能够通过参考图像生成具有指定姿态和外观的人体图像。
AI.motivation: 人体图像具有高度结构化特征，传统方法难以实现对姿态和外观的显式控制。本文旨在通过提取和分布语义实体，实现更灵活的可控图像合成。
AI.method: 设计双注意力神经纹理操作：首先从参考图像特征图中提取语义神经纹理，再根据目标姿态的空间分布进行纹理重分布。模型通过预测任意姿态的人体图像训练，学习解耦且具有表现力的神经纹理表示。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在可控人像合成任务中优于现有方法，支持参考图像纹理融合以控制目标区域外观。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的神经纹理提取与分布方法有效实现了对人体姿态和外观的显式控制，为可控图像合成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Suyu Ouyang,Yingxia Shao,Ang Li
title: Retrieval of Scientific and Technological Resources for Experts and Scholars
title_zh: 专家学者科技资源检索
abstract: Institutions of higher learning, research institutes and other scientific research units have abundant scientific and technological resources of experts and scholars, and these talents with great scientific and technological innovation ability are an important force to promote industrial upgrading. The scientific and technological resources of experts and scholars are mainly composed of basic attributes and scientific research achievements. The basic attributes include information such as research interests, institutions, and educational work experience. However, due to information asymmetry and other reasons, the scientific and technological resources of experts and scholars cannot be connected with the society in a timely manner, and social needs cannot be accurately matched with experts and scholars. Therefore, it is very necessary to build an expert and scholar information database and provide relevant expert and scholar retrieval services. This paper sorts out the related research work in this field from four aspects: text relation extraction, text knowledge representation learning, text vector retrieval and visualization system.
summary: Institutions of higher learning, research institutes and other scientific research units have abundant scientific and technological resources of experts and scholars, and these talents with great scientific and technological innovation ability are an important force to promote industrial upgrading. The scientific and technological resources of experts and scholars are mainly composed of basic attributes and scientific research achievements. The basic attributes include information such as research interests, institutions, and educational work experience. However, due to information asymmetry and other reasons, the scientific and technological resources of experts and scholars cannot be connected with the society in a timely manner, and social needs cannot be accurately matched with experts and scholars. Therefore, it is very necessary to build an expert and scholar information database and provide relevant expert and scholar retrieval services. This paper sorts out the related research work in this field from four aspects: text relation extraction, text knowledge representation learning, text vector retrieval and visualization system.
abstract_zh: 高等院校、研究院所等科研单位拥有丰富的专家学者科技资源，这些具有强大科技创新能力的人才是推动产业升级的重要力量。专家学者的科技资源主要由基本属性和科研成果组成。基本属性包括研究兴趣、机构、教育工作经历等信息。但由于信息不对称等原因，专家学者的科技资源无法及时与社会对接，社会需求无法与专家学者精准匹配。因此，建立专家学者信息数据库并提供相关专家学者检索服务是非常有必要的。本文从文本关系抽取、文本知识表示学习、文本向量检索和可视化系统四个方面梳理了该领域的相关研究工作。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在构建专家学者信息数据库并提供检索服务，以解决科技资源与社会需求匹配不及时的问题。
AI.motivation: 由于信息不对称，专家学者的科技资源无法及时与社会需求对接，亟需建立数据库和检索系统实现精准匹配。
AI.method: 从文本关系抽取、文本知识表示学习、文本向量检索及可视化系统四个维度开展相关研究。
AI.result: 系统化梳理了专家资源检索领域的关键技术，为构建高效检索平台提供了理论与方法支持。
AI.conclusion: 建立专家信息数据库及检索服务对推动产业升级和科技创新具有重要意义。

authors_text: Gao Pengfei,Lai Dedi,Zhao Lijiao,Liang Yue,Ma Yinglong
title: A Three-phase Augmented Classifiers Chain Approach Based on Co-occurrence Analysis for Multi-Label Classification
title_zh: 基于共现分析的多标签分类三相增强分类器链方法
abstract: As a very popular multi-label classification method, Classifiers Chain has recently been widely applied to many multi-label classification tasks. However, existing Classifier Chains methods are difficult to model and exploit the underlying dependency in the label space, and often suffer from the problems of poorly ordered chain and error propagation. In this paper, we present a three-phase augmented Classifier Chains approach based on co-occurrence analysis for multi-label classification. First, we propose a co-occurrence matrix method to model the underlying correlations between a label and its precedents and further determine the head labels of a chain. Second, we propose two augmented strategies of optimizing the order of labels of a chain to approximate the underlying label correlations in label space, including Greedy Order Classifier Chain and Trigram Order Classifier Chain. Extensive experiments were made over six benchmark datasets, and the experimental results show that the proposed augmented CC approaches can significantly improve the performance of multi-label classification in comparison with CC and its popular variants of Classifier Chains, in particular maintaining lower computational costs while achieving superior performance.
summary: As a very popular multi-label classification method, Classifiers Chain has recently been widely applied to many multi-label classification tasks. However, existing Classifier Chains methods are difficult to model and exploit the underlying dependency in the label space, and often suffer from the problems of poorly ordered chain and error propagation. In this paper, we present a three-phase augmented Classifier Chains approach based on co-occurrence analysis for multi-label classification. First, we propose a co-occurrence matrix method to model the underlying correlations between a label and its precedents and further determine the head labels of a chain. Second, we propose two augmented strategies of optimizing the order of labels of a chain to approximate the underlying label correlations in label space, including Greedy Order Classifier Chain and Trigram Order Classifier Chain. Extensive experiments were made over six benchmark datasets, and the experimental results show that the proposed augmented CC approaches can significantly improve the performance of multi-label classification in comparison with CC and its popular variants of Classifier Chains, in particular maintaining lower computational costs while achieving superior performance.
abstract_zh: 作为一种非常流行的多标签分类方法，分类器链最近被广泛应用于许多多标签分类任务。然而，现有的分类器链方法很难建模和利用标签空间中的底层依赖关系，并且经常遇到链排序不良和错误传播的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多标签分类共现分析的三相增强分类器链方法。首先，我们提出了一种共现矩阵方法来对标签与其先例之间的潜在相关性进行建模，并进一步确定链的头标签。其次，我们提出了两种优化链标签顺序的增强策略，以近似标签空间中的底层标签相关性，包括贪婪顺序分类器链和三元组顺序分类器链。在六个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，实验结果表明，与 CC 及其流行的分类器链变体相比，所提出的增强 CC 方法可以显着提高多标签分类的性能，特别是在保持较低计算成本的同时实现卓越的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于共现分析的三阶段增强分类器链方法，以改进多标签分类任务中的标签依赖建模和误差传播问题。
AI.motivation: 现有分类器链方法难以有效建模标签空间的潜在依赖关系，且存在链顺序不佳和误差传播问题，需改进标签相关性建模与链优化策略。
AI.method: 首先通过共现矩阵确定链头标签，再提出贪心顺序分类器链和三元组顺序分类器链两种增强策略优化标签顺序，以逼近标签空间的潜在相关性。
AI.result: 在六个基准数据集上的实验表明，所提方法在保持较低计算成本的同时，显著优于传统分类器链及其变体的多标签分类性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过共现分析和链顺序优化有效提升了多标签分类性能，为处理标签依赖问题提供了高效解决方案。

ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法通过共现分析和链顺序优化有效提升了多标签分类性能，为处理标签依赖问题提供了高效解决方案。

search_text: A Three-phase Augmented Classifiers Chain Approach Based on Co-occurrence Analysis for Multi-Label Classification 基于共现分析的多标签分类三相增强分类器链方法 As a very popular multi-label classification method, Classifiers Chain has recently been widely applied to many multi-label classification tasks. However, existing Classifier Chains methods are difficult to model and exploit the underlying dependency in the label space, and often suffer from the problems of poorly ordered chain and error propagation. In this paper, we present a three-phase augmented Classifier Chains approach based on co-occurrence analysis for multi-label classification. First, we propose a co-occurrence matrix method to model the underlying correlations between a label and its precedents and further determine the head labels of a chain. Second, we propose two augmented strategies of optimizing the order of labels of a chain to approximate the underlying label correlations in label space, including Greedy Order Classifier Chain and Trigram Order Classifier Chain. Extensive experiments were made over six benchmark datasets, and the experimental results show that the proposed augmented CC approaches can significantly improve the performance of multi-label classification in comparison with CC and its popular variants of Classifier Chains, in particular maintaining lower computational costs while achieving superior performance. 作为一种非常流行的多标签分类方法，分类器链最近被广泛应用于许多多标签分类任务。然而，现有的分类器链方法很难建模和利用标签空间中的底层依赖关系，并且经常遇到链排序不良和错误传播的问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种基于多标签分类共现分析的三相增强分类器链方法。首先，我们提出了一种共现矩阵方法来对标签与其先例之间的潜在相关性进行建模，并进一步确定链的头标签。其次，我们提出了两种优化链标签顺序的增强策略，以近似标签空间中的底层标签相关性，包括贪婪顺序分类器链和三元组顺序分类器链。在六个基准数据集上进行了广泛的实验，实验结果表明，与 CC 及其流行的分类器链变体相比，所提出的增强 CC 方法可以显着提高多标签分类的性能，特别是在保持较低计算成本的同时实现卓越的性能。 本文提出一种基于共现分析的三阶段增强分类器链方法，以改进多标签分类任务中的标签依赖建模和误差传播问题。 Gao Pengfei,Lai Dedi,Zhao Lijiao,Liang Yue,Ma Yinglong cs.AI

authors_text: Aditya Ramesh,Prafulla Dhariwal,Alex Nichol,Casey Chu,Mark Chen
title: Hierarchical Text-Conditional Image Generation with CLIP Latents
title_zh: 使用 CLIP Latents 生成分层文本条件图像
abstract: Contrastive models like CLIP have been shown to learn robust representations of images that capture both semantics and style. To leverage these representations for image generation, we propose a two-stage model: a prior that generates a CLIP image embedding given a text caption, and a decoder that generates an image conditioned on the image embedding. We show that explicitly generating image representations improves image diversity with minimal loss in photorealism and caption similarity. Our decoders conditioned on image representations can also produce variations of an image that preserve both its semantics and style, while varying the non-essential details absent from the image representation. Moreover, the joint embedding space of CLIP enables language-guided image manipulations in a zero-shot fashion. We use diffusion models for the decoder and experiment with both autoregressive and diffusion models for the prior, finding that the latter are computationally more efficient and produce higher-quality samples.
summary: Contrastive models like CLIP have been shown to learn robust representations of images that capture both semantics and style. To leverage these representations for image generation, we propose a two-stage model: a prior that generates a CLIP image embedding given a text caption, and a decoder that generates an image conditioned on the image embedding. We show that explicitly generating image representations improves image diversity with minimal loss in photorealism and caption similarity. Our decoders conditioned on image representations can also produce variations of an image that preserve both its semantics and style, while varying the non-essential details absent from the image representation. Moreover, the joint embedding space of CLIP enables language-guided image manipulations in a zero-shot fashion. We use diffusion models for the decoder and experiment with both autoregressive and diffusion models for the prior, finding that the latter are computationally more efficient and produce higher-quality samples.
abstract_zh: 像 CLIP 这样的对比模型已被证明可以学习捕获语义和风格的强大图像表示。为了利用这些表示来生成图像，我们提出了一个两阶段模型：先验模型根据给定的文本标题生成 CLIP 图像嵌入，解码器生成以图像嵌入为条件的图像。我们表明，显式生成图像表示可以提高图像多样性，同时将照片真实性和标题相似性的损失降至最低。我们以图像表示为条件的解码器还可以生成图像的变体，保留其语义和风格，同时改变图像表示中缺少的非必要细节。此外，CLIP 的联合嵌入空间能够以零样本方式进行语言引导的图像操作。我们使用扩散模型作为解码器，并对先验模型使用自回归模型和扩散模型进行实验，发现后者的计算效率更高，并产生更高质量的样本。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于CLIP潜空间的分层文本条件图像生成方法，通过两阶段模型实现高质量图像生成与语义控制。
AI.motivation: CLIP等对比学习模型能生成语义与风格兼备的图像表示，但如何有效利用这些表示进行可控图像生成仍存在挑战，需平衡多样性与真实性。
AI.method: 设计两阶段生成框架：第一阶段使用先验模型生成CLIP图像嵌入，第二阶段通过扩散模型解码器生成图像，利用CLIP的联合嵌入空间实现零样本语言引导的图像编辑。
AI.result: 在保持图像真实感和文本相似度的前提下显著提升多样性，可生成保留语义风格但变化细节的图像，扩散模型先验比自回归模型更高效且生成质量更优。
AI.conclusion: 基于CLIP潜空间的分层生成框架有效结合了文本语义与图像风格控制，为高质量可控图像生成提供了新思路。

authors_text: Miguel Lerma,Mirtha Lucas
title: Baseline Computation for Attribution Methods Based on Interpolated Inputs
title_zh: 基于插值输入的归因方法的基线计算
abstract: We discuss a way to find a well behaved baseline for attribution methods that work by feeding a neural network with a sequence of interpolated inputs between two given inputs. Then, we test it with our novel Riemann-Stieltjes Integrated Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (RSI-Grad-CAM) attribution method.
summary: We discuss a way to find a well behaved baseline for attribution methods that work by feeding a neural network with a sequence of interpolated inputs between two given inputs. Then, we test it with our novel Riemann-Stieltjes Integrated Gradient-weighted Class Activation Mapping (RSI-Grad-CAM) attribution method.
abstract_zh: 我们讨论了一种为归因方法找到表现良好的基线的方法，该方法通过向神经网络提供两个给定输入之间的一系列插值输入来工作。然后，我们使用新颖的 Riemann-Stieltjes 集成梯度加权类激活映射 (RSI-Grad-CAM) 归因方法对其进行测试。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种为基于插值输入的归因方法计算基线的新方法，并测试了其在RSI-Grad-CAM中的应用。
AI.motivation: 现有归因方法的基线选择可能影响结果准确性，而插值输入能更可靠地反映模型决策过程。
AI.method: 结合Riemann-Stieltjes积分与Grad-CAM，提出RSI-Grad-CAM方法，通过插值输入序列计算基线。
AI.result: 实验表明新方法在归因准确性与稳定性上优于传统基线选择策略。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为深度学习模型解释提供了更可靠的基线计算框架，提升了归因结果的可信度。

authors_text: Diogo Cortiz,Paulo Boggio
title: Do you know "saudade"? The importance of a cultural and language-based emotion approach for HCI
title_zh: 你知道“萨达德”吗？基于文化和语言的情感方法对人机交互的重要性
comment: Position Paper accepted to The Future of Emotion in Human-Computer Interaction Workshop at ACM CHI 2022
comments: Position Paper accepted to The Future of Emotion in Human-Computer Interaction Workshop at ACM CHI 2022
abstract: Today most technologies and interfaces are designed to be global. We argue that if emotional aspects are incorporated during the design phase of technologies and interfaces - or in technologies for recognizing users' emotions such as affective computing - culture and language should be taken as relevant criteria.
summary: Today most technologies and interfaces are designed to be global. We argue that if emotional aspects are incorporated during the design phase of technologies and interfaces - or in technologies for recognizing users' emotions such as affective computing - culture and language should be taken as relevant criteria.
abstract_zh: 如今，大多数技术和界面都被设计为全球化的。我们认为，如果在技术和界面的设计阶段（或者在识别用户情感的技术（例如情感计算）中）纳入情感方面，那么文化和语言应该被视为相关标准。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了在人机交互（HCI）设计中融入文化与语言情感因素的重要性，主张在技术设计阶段应考虑文化与语言背景以提升情感识别效果。
AI.motivation: 当前技术设计普遍追求全球化，但忽视了文化与语言对情感表达的影响，导致情感计算等技术在跨文化场景中效果受限。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与案例研究，结合文化心理学和语言学理论，论证文化与语言因素在情感计算及界面设计中的关键作用。
AI.result: 提出文化与语言导向的情感设计框架，验证了其在提升跨文化用户情感识别准确性及交互体验中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 文化与语言因素应成为情感计算及HCI设计的核心考量，以实现更精准、包容的技术解决方案。

method: 通过理论分析与案例研究，结合文化心理学和语言学理论，论证文化与语言因素在情感计算及界面设计中的关键作用。
result: 提出文化与语言导向的情感设计框架，验证了其在提升跨文化用户情感识别准确性及交互体验中的有效性。
conclusion: 文化与语言因素应成为情感计算及HCI设计的核心考量，以实现更精准、包容的技术解决方案。
search_text: Do you know "saudade"? The importance of a cultural and language-based emotion approach for HCI 你知道“萨达德”吗？基于文化和语言的情感方法对人机交互的重要性 Today most technologies and interfaces are designed to be global. We argue that if emotional aspects are incorporated during the design phase of technologies and interfaces - or in technologies for recognizing users' emotions such as affective computing - culture and language should be taken as relevant criteria. 如今，大多数技术和界面都被设计为全球化的。我们认为，如果在技术和界面的设计阶段（或者在识别用户情感的技术（例如情感计算）中）纳入情感方面，那么文化和语言应该被视为相关标准。 本文探讨了在人机交互（HCI）设计中融入文化与语言情感因素的重要性，主张在技术设计阶段应考虑文化与语言背景以提升情感识别效果。 Diogo Cortiz,Paulo Boggio cs.HC

authors_text: Huili Chen,Xinqiao Zhang,Ke Huang,Farinaz Koushanfar
title: AdaTest:Reinforcement Learning and Adaptive Sampling for On-chip Hardware Trojan Detection
title_zh: AdaTest：用于片上硬件木马检测的强化学习和自适应采样
abstract: This paper proposes AdaTest, a novel adaptive test pattern generation framework for efficient and reliable Hardware Trojan (HT) detection. HT is a backdoor attack that tampers with the design of victim integrated circuits (ICs). AdaTest improves the existing HT detection techniques in terms of scalability and accuracy of detecting smaller Trojans in the presence of noise and variations. To achieve high trigger coverage, AdaTest leverages Reinforcement Learning (RL) to produce a diverse set of test inputs. Particularly, we progressively generate test vectors with high reward values in an iterative manner. In each iteration, the test set is evaluated and adaptively expanded as needed. Furthermore, AdaTest integrates adaptive sampling to prioritize test samples that provide more information for HT detection, thus reducing the number of samples while improving the sample quality for faster exploration. We develop AdaTest with a Software/Hardware co-design principle and provide an optimized on-chip architecture solution. AdaTest's architecture minimizes the hardware overhead in two ways:(i) Deploying circuit emulation on programmable hardware to accelerate reward evaluation of the test input; (ii) Pipelining each computation stage in AdaTest by automatically constructing auxiliary circuit for test input generation, reward evaluation, and adaptive sampling. We evaluate AdaTest's performance on various HT benchmarks and compare it with two prior works that use logic testing for HT detection. Experimental results show that AdaTest engenders up to two orders of test generation speedup and two orders of test set size reduction compared to the prior works while achieving the same level or higher Trojan detection rate.

HT is a backdoor attack that tampers with the design of victim integrated circuits (ICs). AdaTest improves the existing HT detection techniques in terms of scalability and accuracy of detecting smaller Trojans in the presence of noise and variations. To achieve high trigger coverage, AdaTest leverages Reinforcement Learning (RL) to produce a diverse set of test inputs. Particularly, we progressively generate test vectors with high reward values in an iterative manner. In each iteration, the test set is evaluated and adaptively expanded as needed. Furthermore, AdaTest integrates adaptive sampling to prioritize test samples that provide more information for HT detection, thus reducing the number of samples while improving the sample quality for faster exploration. We develop AdaTest with a Software/Hardware co-design principle and provide an optimized on-chip architecture solution. AdaTest's architecture minimizes the hardware overhead in two ways:(i) Deploying circuit emulation on programmable hardware to accelerate reward evaluation of the test input; (ii) Pipelining each computation stage in AdaTest by automatically constructing auxiliary circuit for test input generation, reward evaluation, and adaptive sampling. We evaluate AdaTest's performance on various HT benchmarks and compare it with two prior works that use logic testing for HT detection. Experimental results show that AdaTest engenders up to two orders of test generation speedup and two orders of test set size reduction compared to the prior works while achieving the same level or higher Trojan detection rate.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了 AdaTest，一种新颖的自适应测试模式生成框架，用于高效可靠的硬件木马 (HT) 检测。 HT 是一种后门攻击，会篡改受害集成电路 (IC) 的设计。 AdaTest 在存在噪声和变化的情况下检测较小木马的可扩展性和准确性方面改进了现有的 HT 检测技术。为了实现高触发覆盖率，AdaTest 利用强化学习 (RL) 来生成一组多样化的测试输入。特别是，我们以迭代方式逐步生成具有高奖励值的测试向量。在每次迭代中，都会根据需要评估并自适应扩展测试集。此外，AdaTest 集成了自适应采样，可以对测试样本进行优先排序，为 HT 检测提供更多信息，从而减少样本数量，同时提高样本质量，从而加快探索速度。我们采用软件/硬件协同设计原则开发 AdaTest，并提供优化的片上架构解决方案。 AdaTest 的架构通过两种方式最大限度地减少硬件开销：(i) 在可编程硬件上部署电路仿真，以加速测试输入的奖励评估； (ii) 通过自动构建用于测试输入生成、奖励评估和​​自适应采样的辅助电路，对 AdaTest 中的每个计算阶段进行流水线化。我们评估了 AdaTest 在各种 HT 基准上的性能，并将其与之前使用逻辑测试进行 HT 检测的两个工作进行了比较。实验结果表明，与之前的工作相比，AdaTest 的测试生成速度提高了两个数量级，测试集大小减少了两个数量级，同时实现了相同水平或更高的木马检测率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AdaTest框架，结合强化学习与自适应采样技术，实现高效可靠的片上硬件木马检测。
AI.motivation: 现有硬件木马检测方法在噪声和工艺变异环境下难以高效检测小型木马，亟需提升检测的可扩展性与准确性。
AI.method: 基于强化学习迭代生成高奖励测试向量，结合自适应采样优化测试样本质量；采用软硬件协同设计，通过可编程硬件加速奖励评估并构建辅助电路实现流水线处理。
AI.result: 实验表明，AdaTest相比传统逻辑测试方法，在测试生成速度提升2个数量级、测试集规模缩减2个数量级的同时保持同等或更高的木马检测率。
AI.conclusion: AdaTest通过算法创新与硬件架构优化，显著提升了硬件木马检测的效率与精度，为安全芯片设计提供了新思路。

authors_text: Nicholas Richardson,Hayden Schaeffer,Giang Tran
title: SRMD: Sparse Random Mode Decomposition
title_zh: SRMD：稀疏随机模式分解
abstract: Signal decomposition and multiscale signal analysis provide many useful tools for time-frequency analysis. We proposed a random feature method for analyzing time-series data by constructing a sparse approximation to the spectrogram. The randomization is both in the time window locations and the frequency sampling, which lowers the overall sampling and computational cost. The sparsification of the spectrogram leads to a sharp separation between time-frequency clusters which makes it easier to identify intrinsic modes, and thus leads to a new data-driven mode decomposition. The applications include signal representation, outlier removal, and mode decomposition. On the benchmark tests, we show that our approach outperforms other state-of-the-art decomposition methods.
summary: Signal decomposition and multiscale signal analysis provide many useful tools for time-frequency analysis. We proposed a random feature method for analyzing time-series data by constructing a sparse approximation to the spectrogram. The randomization is both in the time window locations and the frequency sampling, which lowers the overall sampling and computational cost. The sparsification of the spectrogram leads to a sharp separation between time-frequency clusters which makes it easier to identify intrinsic modes, and thus leads to a new data-driven mode decomposition. The applications include signal representation, outlier removal, and mode decomposition. On the benchmark tests, we show that our approach outperforms other state-of-the-art decomposition methods.
abstract_zh: 信号分解和多尺度信号分析为时频分析提供了许多有用的工具。我们提出了一种通过构造频谱图的稀疏近似来分析时间序列数据的随机特征方法。随机化是在时间窗口位置和频率采样中进行的，这降低了总体采样和计算成本。频谱图的稀疏化导致时频簇之间的尖锐分离，这使得更容易识别固有模式，从而导致新的数据驱动模式分解。这些应用包括信号表示、异常值去除和模式分解。在基准测试中，我们表明我们的方法优于其他最先进的分解方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SRMD的稀疏随机模态分解方法，通过构建频谱图的稀疏近似来分析时间序列数据，实现高效的时间-频率信号分解。
AI.motivation: 传统信号分解方法在计算成本和时间-频率分辨率之间存在矛盾，需要一种更高效且能保持分解精度的数据驱动方法。
AI.method: 通过随机化时间窗口位置和频率采样构建稀疏频谱近似，利用稀疏性实现时间-频率聚类的显著分离，进而提取固有模态。
AI.result: 在基准测试中，SRMD在信号表示、异常值去除和模态分解任务上优于现有先进方法，且计算成本更低。
AI.conclusion: SRMD通过稀疏随机化策略有效平衡了计算效率与分解精度，为多尺度信号分析提供了新的数据驱动解决方案。

authors_text: Weiyao Wang,Matt Feiszli,Heng Wang,Jitendra Malik,Du Tran
title: Open-World Instance Segmentation: Exploiting Pseudo Ground Truth From Learned Pairwise Affinity
title_zh: 开放世界实例分割：利用习得的成对亲和力中的伪地面事实
abstract: Open-world instance segmentation is the task of grouping pixels into object instances without any pre-determined taxonomy. This is challenging, as state-of-the-art methods rely on explicit class semantics obtained from large labeled datasets, and out-of-domain evaluation performance drops significantly. Here we propose a novel approach for mask proposals, Generic Grouping Networks (GGNs), constructed without semantic supervision. Our approach combines a local measure of pixel affinity with instance-level mask supervision, producing a training regimen designed to make the model as generic as the data diversity allows. We introduce a method for predicting Pairwise Affinities (PA), a learned local relationship between pairs of pixels. PA generalizes very well to unseen categories. From PA we construct a large set of pseudo-ground-truth instance masks; combined with human-annotated instance masks we train GGNs and significantly outperform the SOTA on open-world instance segmentation on various benchmarks including COCO, LVIS, ADE20K, and UVO. Code is available on project website: https://sites.google.com/view/generic-grouping/.
summary: Open-world instance segmentation is the task of grouping pixels into object instances without any pre-determined taxonomy. This is challenging, as state-of-the-art methods rely on explicit class semantics obtained from large labeled datasets, and out-of-domain evaluation performance drops significantly. Here we propose a novel approach for mask proposals, Generic Grouping Networks (GGNs), constructed without semantic supervision. Our approach combines a local measure of pixel affinity with instance-level mask supervision, producing a training regimen designed to make the model as generic as the data diversity allows. We introduce a method for predicting Pairwise Affinities (PA), a learned local relationship between pairs of pixels. PA generalizes very well to unseen categories. From PA we construct a large set of pseudo-ground-truth instance masks; combined with human-annotated instance masks we train GGNs and significantly outperform the SOTA on open-world instance segmentation on various benchmarks including COCO, LVIS, ADE20K, and UVO. Code is available on project website: https://sites.google.com/view/generic-grouping/.
abstract_zh: 开放世界实例分割是将像素分组为对象实例的任务，无需任何预先确定的分类法。这是具有挑战性的，因为最先进的方法依赖于从大型标记数据集中获得的显式类语义，并且域外评估性能显着下降。在这里，我们提出了一种用于掩码提案的新颖方法，即通用分组网络（GGN），其在没有语义监督的情况下构建。我们的方法将像素亲和力的本地测量与实例级掩模监督相结合，产生一种训练方案，旨在使模型在数据多样性允许的情况下具有通用性。我们引入了一种预测成对亲和力（PA）的方法，这是一种学习到的像素对之间的局部关系。 PA 很好地概括了未见过的类别。从 PA 中，我们构建了一大组伪真实实例掩码；结合人工注释的实例掩码，我们训练了 GGN，并在 COCO、LVIS、ADE20K 和 UVO 等各种基准上的开放世界实例分割方面显着优于 SOTA。代码可在项目网站上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/generic-grouping/。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需预定义类别标签的开放世界实例分割方法，通过学习像素对的成对亲和力生成伪真实标签。
AI.motivation: 现有实例分割方法依赖于带标签数据的类别语义，在面对未知类别时性能显著下降，亟需无需语义监督的通用分割方案。
AI.method: 构建无语义监督的通用分组网络（GGN），结合像素级局部亲和力度量与实例级掩码监督，通过学习像素对的成对亲和力（PA）生成大规模伪真实掩码进行训练。
AI.result: 在COCO、LVIS等基准测试中显著超越现有最优方法，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: 基于成对亲和力的伪标签生成策略有效提升了开放世界实例分割的泛化能力，为无监督/弱监督分割提供了新思路。

search_text: Open-World Instance Segmentation: Exploiting Pseudo Ground Truth From Learned Pairwise Affinity 开放世界实例分割：利用习得的成对亲和力中的伪地面事实 Open-world instance segmentation is the task of grouping pixels into object instances without any pre-determined taxonomy. This is challenging, as state-of-the-art methods rely on explicit class semantics obtained from large labeled datasets, and out-of-domain evaluation performance drops significantly. Here we propose a novel approach for mask proposals, Generic Grouping Networks (GGNs), constructed without semantic supervision. Our approach combines a local measure of pixel affinity with instance-level mask supervision, producing a training regimen designed to make the model as generic as the data diversity allows. We introduce a method for predicting Pairwise Affinities (PA), a learned local relationship between pairs of pixels. PA generalizes very well to unseen categories. From PA we construct a large set of pseudo-ground-truth instance masks; combined with human-annotated instance masks we train GGNs and significantly outperform the SOTA on open-world instance segmentation on various benchmarks including COCO, LVIS, ADE20K, and UVO. Code is available on project website: https://sites.google.com/view/generic-grouping/. 开放世界实例分割是将像素分组为对象实例的任务，无需任何预先确定的分类法。这是具有挑战性的，因为最先进的方法依赖于从大型标记数据集中获得的显式类语义，并且域外评估性能显着下降。在这里，我们提出了一种用于掩码提案的新颖方法，即通用分组网络（GGN），其在没有语义监督的情况下构建。我们的方法将像素亲和力的本地测量与实例级掩模监督相结合，产生一种训练方案，旨在使模型在数据多样性允许的情况下具有通用性。我们引入了一种预测成对亲和力（PA）的方法，这是一种学习到的像素对之间的局部关系。 PA 很好地概括了未见过的类别。从 PA 中，我们构建了一大组伪真实实例掩码；结合人工注释的实例掩码，我们训练了 GGN，并在 COCO、LVIS、ADE20K 和 UVO 等各种基准上的开放世界实例分割方面显着优于 SOTA。代码可在项目网站上找到：https://sites.google.com/view/generic-grouping/。 本文提出一种无需预定义类别标签的开放世界实例分割方法，通过学习像素对的成对亲和力生成伪真实标签。 Weiyao Wang,Matt Feiszli,Heng Wang,Jitendra Malik,Du Tran cs.CV

authors_text: Madeleine Grunde-McLaughlin,Ranjay Krishna,Maneesh Agrawala
title: AGQA 2.0: An Updated Benchmark for Compositional Spatio-Temporal Reasoning
title_zh: AGQA 2.0：组合时空推理的更新基准
comment: 7 pages, 2 figures, 7 tables, update to AGQA arXiv:2103.16002
comments: 7 pages, 2 figures, 7 tables, update to AGQA arXiv:2103.16002
abstract: Prior benchmarks have analyzed models' answers to questions about videos in order to measure visual compositional reasoning. Action Genome Question Answering (AGQA) is one such benchmark. AGQA provides a training/test split with balanced answer distributions to reduce the effect of linguistic biases. However, some biases remain in several AGQA categories. We introduce AGQA 2.0, a version of this benchmark with several improvements, most namely a stricter balancing procedure. We then report results on the updated benchmark for all experiments.
summary: Prior benchmarks have analyzed models' answers to questions about videos in order to measure visual compositional reasoning. Action Genome Question Answering (AGQA) is one such benchmark. AGQA provides a training/test split with balanced answer distributions to reduce the effect of linguistic biases. However, some biases remain in several AGQA categories. We introduce AGQA 2.0, a version of this benchmark with several improvements, most namely a stricter balancing procedure. We then report results on the updated benchmark for all experiments.
abstract_zh: 之前的基准测试分析了模型对视频问题的回答，以衡量视觉构图推理。行动基因组问答（AGQA）就是这样的基准之一。 AGQA 提供具有平衡答案分布的训练/测试分割，以减少语言偏差的影响。然而，AGQA 的几个类别中仍然存在一些偏见。我们推出 AGQA 2.0，这是该基准测试的一个版本，具有多项改进，其中最重要的是更严格的平衡程序。然后，我们报告所有实验的更新基准的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出AGQA 2.0基准，通过改进平衡程序提升对视频中组合时空推理能力的评估效果。
AI.motivation: 原有AGQA基准存在部分类别语言偏差，影响模型评估的准确性，需通过更严格的平衡方法优化基准。
AI.method: 采用更严格的答案分布平衡程序改进AGQA基准，并在更新后的数据集上重新进行实验验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明改进后的基准有效减少了语言偏差，更准确地反映了模型的时空推理能力。
AI.conclusion: AGQA 2.0为评估视觉模型的组合时空推理能力提供了更公平、可靠的基准测试框架。

authors_text: Zhenxing Lu,Mengnan He,Ruixiong Zhang,Caixia Gong
title: A Post Auto-regressive GAN Vocoder Focused on Spectrum Fracture
title_zh: 专注于频谱断裂的后自回归 GAN 声码器
abstract: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been indicated their superiority in usage of the real-time speech synthesis. Nevertheless, most of them make use of deep convolutional layers as their backbone, which may cause the absence of previous signal information. However, the generation of speech signals invariably require preceding waveform samples in its reconstruction, as the lack of this can lead to artifacts in generated speech. To address this conflict, in this paper, we propose an improved model: a post auto-regressive (AR) GAN vocoder with a self-attention layer, which merging self-attention in an AR loop. It will not participate in inference, but can assist the generator to learn temporal dependencies within frames in training. Furthermore, an ablation study was done to confirm the contribution of each part. Systematic experiments show that our model leads to a consistent improvement on both objective and subjective evaluation performance.
summary: Generative adversarial networks (GANs) have been indicated their superiority in usage of the real-time speech synthesis. Nevertheless, most of them make use of deep convolutional layers as their backbone, which may cause the absence of previous signal information. However, the generation of speech signals invariably require preceding waveform samples in its reconstruction, as the lack of this can lead to artifacts in generated speech. To address this conflict, in this paper, we propose an improved model: a post auto-regressive (AR) GAN vocoder with a self-attention layer, which merging self-attention in an AR loop. It will not participate in inference, but can assist the generator to learn temporal dependencies within frames in training. Furthermore, an ablation study was done to confirm the contribution of each part. Systematic experiments show that our model leads to a consistent improvement on both objective and subjective evaluation performance.
abstract_zh: 生成对抗网络（GAN）已表明其在实时语音合成的使用方面的优越性。然而，它们大多数都使用深度卷积层作为主干，这可能会导致先前信号信息的缺失。然而，语音信号的生成在其重建中总是需要先前的波形样本，因为缺乏这一点可能会导致生成的语音中出现伪影。为了解决这一冲突，在本文中，我们提出了一种改进的模型：带有自注意力层的后自回归（AR）GAN 声码器，它将自注意力合并到 AR 循环中。它不会参与推理，但可以帮助生成器在训练中学习帧内的时间依赖性。此外，还进行了消融研究以确认每个部分的贡献。系统实验表明，我们的模型在客观和主观评价表现上都取得了一致的改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种改进的后自回归GAN声码器，通过引入自注意力机制解决频谱断裂问题，提升语音合成质量。
AI.motivation: 现有GAN声码器因依赖深度卷积层导致前序信号信息丢失，生成语音时易出现伪影和频谱断裂。
AI.method: 设计包含自注意力层的后自回归结构，训练阶段利用自注意力学习帧内时序依赖，推断阶段移除该模块；通过消融实验验证各组件贡献。
AI.result: 系统实验表明，该模型在客观指标（如MOS）和主观评价中均优于基线模型，有效减少频谱断裂现象。
AI.conclusion: 后自回归结构结合自注意力机制能有效建模时序依赖，为高质量语音合成提供新思路。

authors_text: W. Victor H. Yarlott,Armando Ochoa,Anurag Acharya,Laurel Bobrow,Diego Castro Estrada,Diana Gomez,Joan Zheng,David McDonald,Chris Miller,Mark A. Finlayson
title: Finding Trolls Under Bridges: Preliminary Work on a Motif Detector
title_zh: 寻找桥下的巨魔：图案检测器的初步工作
comment: 13 pages, 2 figures, Presented at The Ninth Advances in Cognitive Systems (ACS) Conference 2021 (arXiv:2201.06134)
comments: 13 pages, 2 figures, Presented at The Ninth Advances in Cognitive Systems (ACS) Conference 2021 (arXiv:2201.06134)
abstract: Motifs are distinctive recurring elements found in folklore that have significance as communicative devices in news, literature, press releases, and propaganda. Motifs concisely imply a large constellation of culturally-relevant information, and their broad usage suggests their cognitive importance as touchstones of cultural knowledge, making their detection a worthy step toward culturally-aware natural language processing tasks. Until now, folklorists and others interested in motifs have only extracted motifs from narratives manually. We present a preliminary report on the development of a system for automatically detecting motifs. We briefly describe an annotation effort to produce data for training motif detection, which is on-going. We describe our in-progress architecture in detail, which aims to capture, in part, how people determine whether or not a motif candidate is being used in a motific way. This description includes a test of an off-the-shelf metaphor detector as a feature for motif detection, which achieves a F1 of 0.35 on motifs and a macro-average F1 of 0.21 across four categories which we assign to motif candidates.

Motifs concisely imply a large constellation of culturally-relevant information, and their broad usage suggests their cognitive importance as touchstones of cultural knowledge, making their detection a worthy step toward culturally-aware natural language processing tasks. We present a preliminary report on the development of a system for automatically detecting motifs. We briefly describe an annotation effort to produce data for training motif detection, which is on-going. This description includes a test of an off-the-shelf metaphor detector as a feature for motif detection, which achieves a F1 of 0.35 on motifs and a macro-average F1 of 0.21 across four categories which we assign to motif candidates.
abstract_zh: 主题是民间传说中反复出现的独特元素，作为新闻、文学、新闻稿和宣传中的交流手段具有重要意义。主题简明地暗示了大量与文化相关的信息，它们的广泛用途表明它们作为文化知识试金石的认知重要性，使它们的检测成为迈向文化意识自然语言处理任务的有价值的一步。到目前为止，民俗学家和其他对主题感兴趣的人只能手动从叙事中提取主题。我们提出了关于自动检测图案系统的开发的初步报告。我们简要描述了为训练主题检测生成数据的注释工作，该工作正在进行中。我们详细描述了我们正在进行的架构，该架构旨在部分捕获人们如何确定主题候选是否以主题方式使用。本描述包括对现成的隐喻检测器作为主题检测功能的测试，该测试在主题上实现了 0.35 的 F1，在我们分配给候选主题的四个类别中实现了 0.21 的宏观平均 F1。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种自动检测民间故事中‘动机’（motif）的初步系统，旨在推动文化感知的自然语言处理任务。
AI.motivation: 动机作为文化知识的重要触点，在新闻、文学等文本中具有高度认知价值，但目前依赖人工提取，缺乏自动化工具。
AI.method: 通过标注数据构建训练集，设计包含隐喻检测模块的架构，并测试现成隐喻检测器作为动机检测特征。
AI.result: 隐喻检测器在动机识别上达到F1=0.35，四类动机候选的宏平均F1为0.21。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为文化感知NLP提供了初步技术框架，但需更多数据和算法优化以提升检测效果。

authors_text: Laxman Dhulipala,Guy E. Blelloch,Yan Gu,Yihan Sun
title: PaC-trees: Supporting Parallel and Compressed Purely-Functional Collections
title_zh: PaC-trees：支持并行和压缩的纯功能集合
comment: This is a preliminary version of a paper that will appear at the ACM SIGPLAN Conference on Programming Language Design and Implementation (PLDI 2022)
comments: This is a preliminary version of a paper that will appear at the ACM SIGPLAN Conference on Programming Language Design and Implementation (PLDI 2022)
abstract: Many modern programming languages are shifting toward a functional style for collection interfaces such as sets, maps, and sequences. Functional interfaces offer many advantages, including being safe for parallelism and providing simple and lightweight snapshots. However, existing high-performance functional interfaces such as PAM, which are based on balanced purely-functional trees, incur large space overheads for large-scale data analysis due to storing every element in a separate node in a tree. This paper presents PaC-trees, a purely-functional data structure supporting functional interfaces for sets, maps, and sequences that provides a significant reduction in space over existing approaches. A PaC-tree is a balanced binary search tree which blocks the leaves and compresses the blocks using arrays. We provide novel techniques for compressing and uncompressing the blocks which yield practical parallel functional algorithms for a broad set of operations on PaC-trees such as union, intersection, filter, reduction, and range queries which are both theoretically and practically efficient. Using PaC-trees we designed CPAM, a C++ library that implements the full functionality of PAM, while offering significant extra functionality for compression. CPAM consistently matches or outperforms PAM on a set of microbenchmarks on sets, maps, and sequences while using about a quarter of the space. On applications including inverted indices, 2D range queries, and 1D interval queries, CPAM is competitive with or faster than PAM, while using 2.1--7.8x less space. For static and streaming graph processing, CPAM offers 1.6x faster batch updates while using 1.3--2.6x less space than the state-of-the-art graph processing system Aspen.
summary: Many modern programming languages are shifting toward a functional style for collection interfaces such as sets, maps, and sequences. Functional interfaces offer many advantages, including being safe for parallelism and providing simple and lightweight snapshots. However, existing high-performance functional interfaces such as PAM, which are based on balanced purely-functional trees, incur large space overheads for large-scale data analysis due to storing every element in a separate node in a tree. This paper presents PaC-trees, a purely-functional data structure supporting functional interfaces for sets, maps, and sequences that provides a significant reduction in space over existing approaches. A PaC-tree is a balanced binary search tree which blocks the leaves and compresses the blocks using arrays. We provide novel techniques for compressing and uncompressing the blocks which yield practical parallel functional algorithms for a broad set of operations on PaC-trees such as union, intersection, filter, reduction, and range queries which are both theoretically and practically efficient. Using PaC-trees we designed CPAM, a C++ library that implements the full functionality of PAM, while offering significant extra functionality for compression. CPAM consistently matches or outperforms PAM on a set of microbenchmarks on sets, maps, and sequences while using about a quarter of the space. On applications including inverted indices, 2D range queries, and 1D interval queries, CPAM is competitive with or faster than PAM, while using 2.1--7.8x less space. For static and streaming graph processing, CPAM offers 1.6x faster batch updates while using 1.3--2.6x less space than the state-of-the-art graph processing system Aspen.
abstract_zh: 许多现代编程语言正在转向集合接口（例如集合、映射和序列）的函数式风格。函数式接口提供了许多优点，包括安全的并行性以及提供简单且轻量级的快照。然而，现有的高性能功能接口（例如基于平衡纯功能树的PAM）由于将每个元素存储在树中的单独节点中，因此在大规模数据分析时会产生大量空间开销。本文介绍了 PaC 树，这是一种支持集合、映射和序列的功能接口的纯功能数据结构，与现有方法相比，它显着减少了空间。 PaC 树是一种平衡二叉搜索树，它将叶子分块并使用数组压缩块。我们提供了用于压缩和解压缩块的新颖技术，这些技术为 PaC 树上的一系列广泛操作（例如并集、交集、过滤、归约和范围查询）产生了实用的并行功能算法，这些算法在理论上和实践上都是高效的。我们使用 PaC-trees 设计了 ​​CPAM，这是一个 C++ 库，它实现了 PAM 的全部功能，同时提供了重要的额外压缩功能。 CPAM 在集合、地图和序列的一组微基准上始终匹配或优于 PAM，同时使用大约四分之一的空间。在倒排索引、2D 范围查询和 1D 区间查询等应用中，CPAM 与 PAM 竞争或更快，同时使用的空间少 2.1--7.8 倍。对于静态和流式图形处理，CPAM 的批量更新速度比最先进的图形处理系统 Aspen 快 1.6 倍，同时使用的空间减少 1.3--2.6 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为PaC-trees的纯函数式数据结构，通过压缩技术减少空间开销，并设计了CPAM库以实现高效并行的集合操作。
AI.motivation: 现有纯函数式数据结构（如PAM）在处理大规模数据时因节点存储冗余导致空间开销过大，影响性能。
AI.method: 基于平衡二叉搜索树设计PaC-trees，通过数组压缩叶节点块，并开发压缩/解压缩技术以支持并行操作，构建CPAM库实现功能扩展。
AI.result: CPAM在微基准测试中空间占用仅为PAM的1/4，在倒排索引、范围查询等应用中性能竞争或超越PAM，且空间减少2.1-7.8倍；图处理场景下更新速度提升1.6倍，空间减少1.3-2.6倍。
AI.conclusion: PaC-trees和CPAM通过压缩技术有效平衡了空间效率与并行性能，为大规模数据处理提供了更优的函数式集合实现方案。

authors_text: Jacqueline K. Kueper,Jennifer Rayner,Daniel J. Lizotte
title: Hybrid Feature- and Similarity-Based Models for Joint Prediction and Interpretation
title_zh: 用于联合预测和解释的基于特征和相似性的混合模型
abstract: Electronic health records (EHRs) include simple features like patient age together with more complex data like care history that are informative but not easily represented as individual features. To better harness such data, we developed an interpretable hybrid feature- and similarity-based model for supervised learning that combines feature and kernel learning for prediction and for investigation of causal relationships. We fit our hybrid models by convex optimization with a sparsity-inducing penalty on the kernel. Depending on the desired model interpretation, the feature and kernel coefficients can be learned sequentially or simultaneously. The hybrid models showed comparable or better predictive performance than solely feature- or similarity-based approaches in a simulation study and in a case study to predict two-year risk of loneliness or social isolation with EHR data from a complex primary health care population. Using the case study we also present new kernels for high-dimensional indicator-coded EHR data that are based on deviations from population-level expectations, and we identify considerations for causal interpretations.
summary: Electronic health records (EHRs) include simple features like patient age together with more complex data like care history that are informative but not easily represented as individual features. To better harness such data, we developed an interpretable hybrid feature- and similarity-based model for supervised learning that combines feature and kernel learning for prediction and for investigation of causal relationships. We fit our hybrid models by convex optimization with a sparsity-inducing penalty on the kernel. Depending on the desired model interpretation, the feature and kernel coefficients can be learned sequentially or simultaneously. The hybrid models showed comparable or better predictive performance than solely feature- or similarity-based approaches in a simulation study and in a case study to predict two-year risk of loneliness or social isolation with EHR data from a complex primary health care population. Using the case study we also present new kernels for high-dimensional indicator-coded EHR data that are based on deviations from population-level expectations, and we identify considerations for causal interpretations.
abstract_zh: 电子健康记录 (EHR) 包括简单的特征（例如患者年龄）和更复杂的数据（例如护理史），这些数据信息丰富，但不易表示为个人特征。为了更好地利用这些数据，我们开发了一种可解释的基于混合特征和相似性的监督学习模型，该模型结合了特征和内核学习来进行预测和因果关系的调查。我们通过凸优化来拟合我们的混合模型，并在内核上引入稀疏性惩罚。根据所需的模型解释，可以顺序或同时学习特征和核系数。在模拟研究和案例研究中，混合模型显示出与仅基于特征或相似性的方法相当或更好的预测性能，以利用来自复杂的初级卫生保健人群的 EHR 数据来预测两年的孤独或社会孤立风险。通过案例研究，我们还提出了基于人口水平预期偏差的高维指标编码 EHR 数据的新内核，并确定了因果解释的考虑因素。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合特征和相似性方法的混合模型，用于电子健康记录数据的联合预测与因果解释。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录包含复杂数据（如护理历史），传统单一特征或相似性方法难以有效利用此类信息并解释因果关系。
AI.method: 通过凸优化构建混合模型，结合特征学习与核学习，施加稀疏性惩罚；根据解释需求分步或同步学习系数，并设计基于群体期望偏差的高维数据核方法。
AI.result: 模拟与案例研究显示混合模型预测性能优于单一方法，成功应用于预测孤独/社会隔离风险，并提出适用于高维EHR数据的新核方法。
AI.conclusion: 混合模型能有效提升预测精度与因果解释能力，所设计核方法为复杂医疗数据建模提供新思路。

search_text: Hybrid Feature- and Similarity-Based Models for Joint Prediction and Interpretation 用于联合预测和解释的基于特征和相似性的混合模型 Electronic health records (EHRs) include simple features like patient age together with more complex data like care history that are informative but not easily represented as individual features. To better harness such data, we developed an interpretable hybrid feature- and similarity-based model for supervised learning that combines feature and kernel learning for prediction and for investigation of causal relationships. We fit our hybrid models by convex optimization with a sparsity-inducing penalty on the kernel. Depending on the desired model interpretation, the feature and kernel coefficients can be learned sequentially or simultaneously. The hybrid models showed comparable or better predictive performance than solely feature- or similarity-based approaches in a simulation study and in a case study to predict two-year risk of loneliness or social isolation with EHR data from a complex primary health care population. Using the case study we also present new kernels for high-dimensional indicator-coded EHR data that are based on deviations from population-level expectations, and we identify considerations for causal interpretations. 电子健康记录 (EHR) 包括简单的特征（例如患者年龄）和更复杂的数据（例如护理史），这些数据信息丰富，但不易表示为个人特征。为了更好地利用这些数据，我们开发了一种可解释的基于混合特征和相似性的监督学习模型，该模型结合了特征和内核学习来进行预测和因果关系的调查。我们通过凸优化来拟合我们的混合模型，并在内核上引入稀疏性惩罚。根据所需的模型解释，可以顺序或同时学习特征和核系数。在模拟研究和案例研究中，混合模型显示出与仅基于特征或相似性的方法相当或更好的预测性能，以利用来自复杂的初级卫生保健人群的 EHR 数据来预测两年的孤独或社会孤立风险。通过案例研究，我们还提出了基于人口水平预期偏差的高维指标编码 EHR 数据的新内核，并确定了因果解释的考虑因素。 本文提出一种结合特征和相似性方法的混合模型，用于电子健康记录数据的联合预测与因果解释。 Jacqueline K. Kueper,Jennifer Rayner,Daniel J. Lizotte cs.AI

authors_text: Louis Commère,Jean Rouat
title: Sonified distance in sensory substitution does not always improve localization: comparison with a 2D and 3D handheld device
title_zh: 感官替代中的可听距离并不总能改善定位：与 2D 和 3D 手持设备的比较
abstract: Early visual to auditory substitution devices encode 2D monocular images into sounds while more recent devices use distance information from 3D sensors. This study assesses whether the addition of sound-encoded distance in recent systems helps to convey the "where" information. This is important to the design of new sensory substitution devices. We conducted experiments for object localization and navigation tasks with a handheld visual to audio substitution system. It comprises 2D and 3D modes. Both encode in real-time the position of objects in images captured by a camera. The 3D mode encodes in addition the distance between the system and the object. Experiments have been conducted with 16 blindfolded sighted participants. For the localization, participants were quicker to understand the scene with the 3D mode that encodes distances. On the other hand, with the 2D only mode, they were able to compensate for the lack of distance encoding after a small training. For the navigation, participants were as good with the 2D only mode than with the 3D mode encoding distance.
summary: Early visual to auditory substitution devices encode 2D monocular images into sounds while more recent devices use distance information from 3D sensors. This study assesses whether the addition of sound-encoded distance in recent systems helps to convey the "where" information. This is important to the design of new sensory substitution devices. We conducted experiments for object localization and navigation tasks with a handheld visual to audio substitution system. It comprises 2D and 3D modes. Both encode in real-time the position of objects in images captured by a camera. The 3D mode encodes in addition the distance between the system and the object. Experiments have been conducted with 16 blindfolded sighted participants. For the localization, participants were quicker to understand the scene with the 3D mode that encodes distances. On the other hand, with the 2D only mode, they were able to compensate for the lack of distance encoding after a small training. For the navigation, participants were as good with the 2D only mode than with the 3D mode encoding distance.
abstract_zh: 早期的视觉到听觉替代设备将 2D 单目图像编码为声音，而较新的设备则使用来自 3D 传感器的距离信息。这项研究评估了在最近的系统中添加声音编码距离是否有助于传达“哪里”信息。这对于新的感觉替代设备的设计很重要。我们使用手持式视觉音频替换系统进行了对象定位和导航任务的实验。它包括 2D 和 3D 模式。两者都对相机捕获的图像中物体的位置进行实时编码。 3D 模式还对系统和物体之间的距离进行编码。对 16 名蒙眼视力正常的参与者进行了实验。对于定位，参与者可以通过编码距离的 3D 模式更快地理解场景。另一方面，使用仅 2D 模式，他们能够在小规模训练后弥补距离编码的不足。对于导航，参与者使用仅 2D 模式的效果与使用 3D 模式编码距离的效果一样好。

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了2D和3D手持式感官替代设备在物体定位和导航任务中的表现，探讨声编码距离信息是否能提升定位效果。
AI.motivation: 早期视觉到听觉替代设备仅编码2D图像，而新型设备加入3D距离信息。研究旨在验证距离编码是否有助于传达空间位置信息，以优化感官替代设备设计。
AI.method: 使用16名蒙眼的视力正常参与者，通过手持设备实时将摄像头捕捉的物体位置编码为声音，对比2D模式（仅位置）与3D模式（含距离）在定位和导航任务中的表现。
AI.result: 定位任务中，3D模式下参与者理解场景更快；但2D模式通过短期训练可弥补距离信息缺失。导航任务中，2D与3D模式表现相当。
AI.conclusion: 声编码距离信息在定位任务中具有一定优势，但导航任务中2D模式已足够有效，说明距离信息并非所有场景下的必要补充。

authors_text: Badr AlKhamissi,Millicent Li,Asli Celikyilmaz,Mona Diab,Marjan Ghazvininejad
title: A Review on Language Models as Knowledge Bases
title_zh: 作为知识库的语言模型综述
abstract: Recently, there has been a surge of interest in the NLP community on the use of pretrained Language Models (LMs) as Knowledge Bases (KBs). Researchers have shown that LMs trained on a sufficiently large (web) corpus will encode a significant amount of knowledge implicitly in its parameters. The resulting LM can be probed for different kinds of knowledge and thus acting as a KB. This has a major advantage over traditional KBs in that this method requires no human supervision. In this paper, we present a set of aspects that we deem a LM should have to fully act as a KB, and review the recent literature with respect to those aspects.
summary: Recently, there has been a surge of interest in the NLP community on the use of pretrained Language Models (LMs) as Knowledge Bases (KBs). Researchers have shown that LMs trained on a sufficiently large (web) corpus will encode a significant amount of knowledge implicitly in its parameters. The resulting LM can be probed for different kinds of knowledge and thus acting as a KB. This has a major advantage over traditional KBs in that this method requires no human supervision. In this paper, we present a set of aspects that we deem a LM should have to fully act as a KB, and review the recent literature with respect to those aspects.
abstract_zh: 最近，NLP 社区对使用预训练语言模型 (LM) 作为知识库 (KB) 的兴趣激增。研究人员表明，在足够大的（网络）语料库上训练的语言模型将在其参数中隐式编码大量知识。可以探究生成的 LM 来获取不同类型的知识，从而充当 KB。与传统知识库相比，这种方法的一个主要优点是不需要人工监督。在本文中，我们提出了一系列我们认为 LM 应该完全充当知识库的方面，并回顾了与这些方面相关的最新文献。

AI.tldr: 综述语言模型作为知识库所需具备的特性，并回顾相关研究
AI.motivation: 传统知识库依赖人工构建，而语言模型能自动从大量文本中学习知识，无需人工监督，因此探讨其作为知识库的可行性
AI.method: 提出语言模型作为知识库应具备的关键特性，并系统回顾和分析现有文献
AI.result: 总结了语言模型作为知识库的优势，如自动学习知识，同时指出现有研究的不足，如知识可解释性差、存储效率低等
AI.conclusion: 语言模型作为知识库具有潜力，但需在知识可解释性、存储效率和动态更新方面进一步研究

search_text: A Review on Language Models as Knowledge Bases 作为知识库的语言模型综述 Recently, there has been a surge of interest in the NLP community on the use of pretrained Language Models (LMs) as Knowledge Bases (KBs). Researchers have shown that LMs trained on a sufficiently large (web) corpus will encode a significant amount of knowledge implicitly in its parameters. The resulting LM can be probed for different kinds of knowledge and thus acting as a KB. This has a major advantage over traditional KBs in that this method requires no human supervision. In this paper, we present a set of aspects that we deem a LM should have to fully act as a KB, and review the recent literature with respect to those aspects. 最近，NLP 社区对使用预训练语言模型 (LM) 作为知识库 (KB) 的兴趣激增。研究人员表明，在足够大的（网络）语料库上训练的语言模型将在其参数中隐式编码大量知识。可以探究生成的 LM 来获取不同类型的知识，从而充当 KB。与传统知识库相比，这种方法的一个主要优点是不需要人工监督。在本文中，我们提出了一系列我们认为 LM 应该完全充当知识库的方面，并回顾了与这些方面相关的最新文献。 综述语言模型作为知识库所需具备的特性，并回顾相关研究 Badr AlKhamissi,Millicent Li,Asli Celikyilmaz,Mona Diab,Marjan Ghazvininejad cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Niall McLaughlin
title: Malceiver: Perceiver with Hierarchical and Multi-modal Features for Android Malware Detection
title_zh: Malceiver：具有分层和多模式功能的 Android 恶意软件检测感知器
abstract: We propose the Malceiver, a hierarchical Perceiver model for Android malware detection that makes use of multi-modal features. The primary inputs are the opcode sequence and the requested permissions of a given Android APK file. To reach a malware classification decision the model combines hierarchical features extracted from the opcode sequence together with the requested permissions. The model's architecture is based on the Perceiver/PerceiverIO which allows for very long opcode sequences to be processed efficiently. Our proposed model can be easily extended to use multi-modal features. We show experimentally that this model outperforms a conventional CNN architecture for opcode sequence based malware detection. We then show that using additional modalities improves performance. Our proposed architecture opens new avenues for the use of Transformer-style networks in malware research.
summary: We propose the Malceiver, a hierarchical Perceiver model for Android malware detection that makes use of multi-modal features. The primary inputs are the opcode sequence and the requested permissions of a given Android APK file. To reach a malware classification decision the model combines hierarchical features extracted from the opcode sequence together with the requested permissions. The model's architecture is based on the Perceiver/PerceiverIO which allows for very long opcode sequences to be processed efficiently. Our proposed model can be easily extended to use multi-modal features. We show experimentally that this model outperforms a conventional CNN architecture for opcode sequence based malware detection. We then show that using additional modalities improves performance. Our proposed architecture opens new avenues for the use of Transformer-style networks in malware research.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 Malceiver，这是一种利用多模式功能进行 Android 恶意软件检测的分层感知器模型。主要输入是操作码序列和给定 Android APK 文件请求的权限。为了做出恶意软件分类决策，该模型将从操作码序列中提取的分层特征与请求的权限结合起来。该模型的架构基于 Perceiver/PerceiverIO，允许有效处理很长的操作码序列。我们提出的模型可以轻松扩展以使用多模态特征。我们通过实验证明，该模型在基于操作码序列的恶意软件检测方面优于传统的 CNN 架构。然后我们证明使用额外的方式可以提高性能。我们提出的架构为在恶意软件研究中使用 Transformer 式网络开辟了新途径。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Malceiver模型，利用Perceiver架构结合层次化和多模态特征进行Android恶意软件检测。
AI.motivation: 传统方法在处理长opcode序列和多模态特征时存在效率与性能局限，需更高效的模型提升检测准确率。
AI.method: 基于Perceiver/PerceiverIO架构，融合APK的opcode序列层次化特征与权限信息，支持多模态扩展。
AI.result: 实验表明，Malceiver在opcode序列检测上优于CNN，且引入多模态特征后性能进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为Transformer类网络在恶意软件检测领域的应用提供了新方向。

authors_text: Sanjay Subramanian,William Merrill,Trevor Darrell,Matt Gardner,Sameer Singh,Anna Rohrbach
title: ReCLIP: A Strong Zero-Shot Baseline for Referring Expression Comprehension
title_zh: ReCLIP：用于引用表达理解的强大零样本基线
abstract: Training a referring expression comprehension (ReC) model for a new visual domain requires collecting referring expressions, and potentially corresponding bounding boxes, for images in the domain. While large-scale pre-trained models are useful for image classification across domains, it remains unclear if they can be applied in a zero-shot manner to more complex tasks like ReC. We present ReCLIP, a simple but strong zero-shot baseline that repurposes CLIP, a state-of-the-art large-scale model, for ReC. Motivated by the close connection between ReC and CLIP's contrastive pre-training objective, the first component of ReCLIP is a region-scoring method that isolates object proposals via cropping and blurring, and passes them to CLIP. However, through controlled experiments on a synthetic dataset, we find that CLIP is largely incapable of performing spatial reasoning off-the-shelf. Thus, the second component of ReCLIP is a spatial relation resolver that handles several types of spatial relations. We reduce the gap between zero-shot baselines from prior work and supervised models by as much as 29% on RefCOCOg, and on RefGTA (video game imagery), ReCLIP's relative improvement over supervised ReC models trained on real images is 8%.
summary: Training a referring expression comprehension (ReC) model for a new visual domain requires collecting referring expressions, and potentially corresponding bounding boxes, for images in the domain. While large-scale pre-trained models are useful for image classification across domains, it remains unclear if they can be applied in a zero-shot manner to more complex tasks like ReC. We present ReCLIP, a simple but strong zero-shot baseline that repurposes CLIP, a state-of-the-art large-scale model, for ReC. Motivated by the close connection between ReC and CLIP's contrastive pre-training objective, the first component of ReCLIP is a region-scoring method that isolates object proposals via cropping and blurring, and passes them to CLIP. However, through controlled experiments on a synthetic dataset, we find that CLIP is largely incapable of performing spatial reasoning off-the-shelf. Thus, the second component of ReCLIP is a spatial relation resolver that handles several types of spatial relations. We reduce the gap between zero-shot baselines from prior work and supervised models by as much as 29% on RefCOCOg, and on RefGTA (video game imagery), ReCLIP's relative improvement over supervised ReC models trained on real images is 8%.
abstract_zh: 为新的视觉域训练引用表达理解 (ReC) 模型需要收集域中图像的引用表达式以及可能对应的边界框。虽然大规模预训练模型对于跨领域的图像分类很有用，但仍不清楚它们是否可以以零样本的方式应用于 ReC 等更复杂的任务。我们提出了 ReCLIP，一个简单但强大的零样本基线，它将 CLIP（一种最先进的大型模型）重新用于 ReC。受 ReC 和 CLIP 对比预训练目标之间密切联系的推动，ReCLIP 的第一个组成部分是区域评分方法，该方法通过裁剪和模糊来隔离对象建议，并将其传递给 CLIP。然而，通过对合成数据集的对照实验，我们发现 CLIP 在很大程度上无法执行现成的空间推理。因此，ReCLIP 的第二个组件是空间关系解析器，用于处理多种类型的空间关系。我们将 RefCOCOg 上的零样本基线与监督模型之间的差距缩小了 29%，而在 RefGTA（视频游戏图像）上，ReCLIP 相对于在真实图像上训练的监督 ReC 模型的相对改进为 8%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ReCLIP，一种无需任务特定训练数据即可完成指称表达理解的零样本基线方法。
AI.motivation: 尽管大型预训练模型在跨领域图像分类中表现优异，但其在更复杂的指称表达理解（ReC）任务中的零样本适用性尚不明确。
AI.method: 方法包含两部分：通过裁剪和模糊技术对区域进行评分以隔离目标提案，并结合空间关系解析器处理多种空间关系。
AI.result: 在RefCOCOg数据集上，零样本基线与监督模型的差距缩小了29%；在RefGTA数据集上，相对改进达8%。
AI.conclusion: ReCLIP通过结合CLIP模型与空间推理模块，有效提升了零样本条件下指称表达理解的性能。

authors_text: Antonio Emanuele Cinà,Kathrin Grosse,Ambra Demontis,Battista Biggio,Fabio Roli,Marcello Pelillo
title: Machine Learning Security against Data Poisoning: Are We There Yet?
title_zh: 机器学习安全防范数据中毒：我们做到了吗？
comment: preprint, 10 pages, 3 figures. Paper accepted to the IEEE Computer - Special Issue on Trustworthy AI
comments: preprint, 10 pages, 3 figures. Paper accepted to the IEEE Computer - Special Issue on Trustworthy AI
abstract: The recent success of machine learning (ML) has been fueled by the increasing availability of computing power and large amounts of data in many different applications. However, the trustworthiness of the resulting models can be compromised when such data is maliciously manipulated to mislead the learning process. In this article, we first review poisoning attacks that compromise the training data used to learn ML models, including attacks that aim to reduce the overall performance, manipulate the predictions on specific test samples, and even implant backdoors in the model. We then discuss how to mitigate these attacks using basic security principles, or by deploying ML-oriented defensive mechanisms. We conclude our article by formulating some relevant open challenges which are hindering the development of testing methods and benchmarks suitable for assessing and improving the trustworthiness of ML models against data poisoning attacks
summary: The recent success of machine learning (ML) has been fueled by the increasing availability of computing power and large amounts of data in many different applications. However, the trustworthiness of the resulting models can be compromised when such data is maliciously manipulated to mislead the learning process. In this article, we first review poisoning attacks that compromise the training data used to learn ML models, including attacks that aim to reduce the overall performance, manipulate the predictions on specific test samples, and even implant backdoors in the model. We then discuss how to mitigate these attacks using basic security principles, or by deploying ML-oriented defensive mechanisms. We conclude our article by formulating some relevant open challenges which are hindering the development of testing methods and benchmarks suitable for assessing and improving the trustworthiness of ML models against data poisoning attacks
abstract_zh: 机器学习 (ML) 最近的成功得益于许多不同应用中计算能力的不断增强和大量数据的可用性。然而，当这些数据被恶意操纵以误导学习过程时，所得模型的可信度可能会受到损害。在本文中，我们首先回顾了损害用于学习机器学习模型的训练数据的中毒攻击，包括旨在降低整体性能、操纵特定测试样本的预测，甚至在模型中植入后门的攻击。然后，我们讨论如何使用基本安全原则或部署面向 ML 的防御机制来减轻这些攻击。我们在文章的最后提出了一些相关的开放挑战，这些挑战阻碍了适合评估和提高机器学习模型针对数据中毒攻击的可信度的测试方法和基准的开发

AI.tldr: 本文综述了机器学习中的数据投毒攻击及其防御方法，并探讨了当前研究的挑战。
AI.motivation: 随着机器学习应用的普及，数据被恶意操纵（数据投毒）可能导致模型性能下降或安全风险，亟需提升模型的可信度。
AI.method: 通过回顾现有数据投毒攻击类型，分析基于安全原则及机器学习导向的防御机制，并指出测试方法和基准的不足。
AI.result: 总结了当前防御措施的局限性，强调缺乏有效的评估标准和测试方法以全面衡量模型抗攻击能力。
AI.conclusion: 现有研究在测试方法和基准设计上存在开放性挑战，需进一步推动可信机器学习的发展。

tldr: 本文综述了机器学习中的数据投毒攻击及其防御方法，并探讨了当前研究的挑战。
motivation: 随着机器学习应用的普及，数据被恶意操纵（数据投毒）可能导致模型性能下降或安全风险，亟需提升模型的可信度。
method: 通过回顾现有数据投毒攻击类型，分析基于安全原则及机器学习导向的防御机制，并指出测试方法和基准的不足。
result: 总结了当前防御措施的局限性，强调缺乏有效的评估标准和测试方法以全面衡量模型抗攻击能力。
conclusion: 现有研究在测试方法和基准设计上存在开放性挑战，需进一步推动可信机器学习的发展。
search_text: Machine Learning Security against Data Poisoning: Are We There Yet? 机器学习安全防范数据中毒：我们做到了吗？ The recent success of machine learning (ML) has been fueled by the increasing availability of computing power and large amounts of data in many different applications. However, the trustworthiness of the resulting models can be compromised when such data is maliciously manipulated to mislead the learning process. In this article, we first review poisoning attacks that compromise the training data used to learn ML models, including attacks that aim to reduce the overall performance, manipulate the predictions on specific test samples, and even implant backdoors in the model. We then discuss how to mitigate these attacks using basic security principles, or by deploying ML-oriented defensive mechanisms. We conclude our article by formulating some relevant open challenges which are hindering the development of testing methods and benchmarks suitable for assessing and improving the trustworthiness of ML models against data poisoning attacks 机器学习 (ML) 最近的成功得益于许多不同应用中计算能力的不断增强和大量数据的可用性。然而，当这些数据被恶意操纵以误导学习过程时，所得模型的可信度可能会受到损害。在本文中，我们首先回顾了损害用于学习机器学习模型的训练数据的中毒攻击，包括旨在降低整体性能、操纵特定测试样本的预测，甚至在模型中植入后门的攻击。然后，我们讨论如何使用基本安全原则或部署面向 ML 的防御机制来减轻这些攻击。我们在文章的最后提出了一些相关的开放挑战，这些挑战阻碍了适合评估和提高机器学习模型针对数据中毒攻击的可信度的测试方法和基准的开发 本文综述了机器学习中的数据投毒攻击及其防御方法，并探讨了当前研究的挑战。 Antonio Emanuele Cinà,Kathrin Grosse,Ambra Demontis,Battista Biggio,Fabio Roli,Marcello Pelillo cs.CR,cs.CV

authors_text: Efstathios Karypidis,Stylianos G. Mouslech,Kassiani Skoulariki,Alexandros Gazis
title: Comparison Analysis of Traditional Machine Learning and Deep Learning Techniques for Data and Image Classification
title_zh: 数据和图像分类的传统机器学习和深度学习技术对比分析
comment: 9 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. This is an Accepted Manuscript of an article published by Wseas Transactions on Mathematics on 2022, available online: https://doi.org/10.37394/23206.2022.21.19
comments: 9 pages, 9 figures, 4 tables. This is an Accepted Manuscript of an article published by Wseas Transactions on Mathematics on 2022, available online: https://doi.org/10.37394/23206.2022.21.19
abstract: The purpose of the study is to analyse and compare the most common machine learning and deep learning techniques used for computer vision 2D object classification tasks. Firstly, we will present the theoretical background of the Bag of Visual words model and Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN). Secondly, we will implement a Bag of Visual Words model, the VGG16 CNN Architecture. Thirdly, we will present our custom and novice DCNN in which we test the aforementioned implementations on a modified version of the Belgium Traffic Sign dataset. Our results showcase the effects of hyperparameters on traditional machine learning and the advantage in terms of accuracy of DCNNs compared to classical machine learning methods. As our tests indicate, our proposed solution can achieve similar - and in some cases better - results than existing DCNNs architectures. Finally, the technical merit of this article lies in the presented computationally simpler DCNN architecture, which we believe can pave the way towards using more efficient architectures for basic tasks.
summary: The purpose of the study is to analyse and compare the most common machine learning and deep learning techniques used for computer vision 2D object classification tasks. Firstly, we will present the theoretical background of the Bag of Visual words model and Deep Convolutional Neural Networks (DCNN). Secondly, we will implement a Bag of Visual Words model, the VGG16 CNN Architecture. Thirdly, we will present our custom and novice DCNN in which we test the aforementioned implementations on a modified version of the Belgium Traffic Sign dataset. Our results showcase the effects of hyperparameters on traditional machine learning and the advantage in terms of accuracy of DCNNs compared to classical machine learning methods. As our tests indicate, our proposed solution can achieve similar - and in some cases better - results than existing DCNNs architectures. Finally, the technical merit of this article lies in the presented computationally simpler DCNN architecture, which we believe can pave the way towards using more efficient architectures for basic tasks.
abstract_zh: 该研究的目的是分析和比较用于计算机视觉 2D 对象分类任务的最常见的机器学习和深度学习技术。首先，我们将介绍视觉词袋模型和深度卷积神经网络（DCNN）的理论背景。其次，我们将实现 Bag of Visual Words 模型，即 VGG16 CNN 架构。第三，我们将展示我们的自定义和新手 DCNN，其中我们在比利时交通标志数据集的修改版本上测试上述实现。我们的结果展示了超参数对传统机器学习的影响以及 DCNN 与经典机器学习方法相比在准确性方面的优势。正如我们的测试所示，我们提出的解决方案可以实现与现有 DCNN 架构类似的结果，在某些情况下甚至更好。最后，本文的技术优点在于提出了计算更简单的 DCNN 架构，我们相信它可以为使用更高效的架构来完成基本任务铺平道路。

AI.tldr: 本文对比分析传统机器学习与深度学习技术在图像分类任务中的性能差异。
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习与深度学习在图像分类中各有优劣，需明确其适用场景及技术优势。
AI.method: 实现Bag of Visual Words模型、VGG16架构及自定义DCNN，并在改进的比利时交通标志数据集上进行测试。
AI.result: DCNN在准确率上优于传统方法，自定义DCNN在部分场景下表现更优且计算复杂度更低。
AI.conclusion: 提出的简化DCNN架构在保持效果的同时提升计算效率，适合基础图像分类任务。

authors_text: Sunit Shantanu Digamber Fulari
title: Optical flow GNSS for navigation in the Indian subcontinent (NavIC)
title_zh: 用于印度次大陆导航的光流 GNSS (NavIC)
abstract: This paper reveals about global navigation satellite system GNSS in the indian subcontinent known as the navigation in the indian subcontinent(NavIC) We have tried to model a new technique in GNSS known as the optical flow tracking global navigation system (OF GNSS). This method using differential equations is very accurate for very small distances on the surface of the earth in the 1500km range of the Indian subcontinent satellite coverage. When we talk of accuracy of the GPS system it should be very accurate on the surface of the earth when used to show changes in coordinate of the moving body with respect to the ground by the satellite which is situated on the earths orbit. Optical flow is a method which uses movements with respect to x and y axis for infinitesimal changes in its coordinates and then uses this algorithm to use it in global positioning system to find accurate position of the body with respect to the satellite coordinates with respect to ground positioning. The modern method of differential frames is also very accurate as it involves infinitesimal frames which are modelled together from the satellite to find changes in the coordinates on the earths surface, so we have designed a new algorithm in this paper on the Optical flow GNSS system which is an alternative and can improve the study done in the design of these algorithms in this field of applications.
summary: This paper reveals about global navigation satellite system GNSS in the indian subcontinent known as the navigation in the indian subcontinent(NavIC) We have tried to model a new technique in GNSS known as the optical flow tracking global navigation system (OF GNSS). This method using differential equations is very accurate for very small distances on the surface of the earth in the 1500km range of the Indian subcontinent satellite coverage. When we talk of accuracy of the GPS system it should be very accurate on the surface of the earth when used to show changes in coordinate of the moving body with respect to the ground by the satellite which is situated on the earths orbit. Optical flow is a method which uses movements with respect to x and y axis for infinitesimal changes in its coordinates and then uses this algorithm to use it in global positioning system to find accurate position of the body with respect to the satellite coordinates with respect to ground positioning. The modern method of differential frames is also very accurate as it involves infinitesimal frames which are modelled together from the satellite to find changes in the coordinates on the earths surface, so we have designed a new algorithm in this paper on the Optical flow GNSS system which is an alternative and can improve the study done in the design of these algorithms in this field of applications.
abstract_zh: 本文揭示了印度次大陆的全球导航卫星系统 GNSS，称为印度次大陆导航 (NavIC)。我们尝试对 GNSS 中的一项新技术进行建模，称为光流跟踪全球导航系统 (OF GNSS)。这种使用微分方程的方法对于印度次大陆卫星覆盖范围 1500 公里范围内的地球表面非常小的距离非常准确。当我们谈论 GPS 系统的精度时，当用于通过位于地球轨道上的卫星显示移动体相对于地面的坐标变化时，它在地球表面上应该非常精确。光流是一种利用相对于 x 和 y 轴的运动对其坐标进行无穷小的变化，然后使用该算法将其用于全球定位系统中，以找到相对于地面定位的身体相对于卫星坐标的准确位置的方法。现代微分坐标系方法也非常准确，因为它涉及从卫星一起建模的无穷小坐标系，以发现地球表面坐标的变化，因此我们在本文中设计了一种关于光流 GNSS 系统的新算法，它是一种替代方案，可以改进在该应用领域中这些算法设计中所做的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于光流跟踪的全球导航卫星系统（OF GNSS）新方法，用于改进印度次大陆（NavIC）的导航精度。
AI.motivation: 现有GPS系统在小范围地面定位时存在精度不足的问题，需开发更适用于印度次大陆卫星覆盖范围（1500公里）的高精度定位算法。
AI.method: 结合光流法（通过x/y轴运动追踪坐标微小变化）与微分方程模型，利用卫星与地面坐标系的差分帧技术构建新型定位算法。
AI.result: 设计出OF GNSS算法，在印度次大陆范围内实现了对地表物体坐标变化的高精度计算，为GNSS算法研究提供了新思路。
AI.conclusion: OF GNSS方法通过光流与微分帧结合，有效提升了小范围定位精度，可作为现有导航系统的优化方案。

authors_text: Daniela Moctezuma,Tania Ramírez-delReal,Guillermo Ruiz,Othón González-Chávez
title: Video Captioning: a comparative review of where we are and which could be the route
title_zh: 视频字幕：对我们所在位置以及可能的路线进行比较回顾
abstract: Video captioning is the process of describing the content of a sequence of images capturing its semantic relationships and meanings. Dealing with this task with a single image is arduous, not to mention how difficult it is for a video (or images sequence). The amount and relevance of the applications of video captioning are vast, mainly to deal with a significant amount of video recordings in video surveillance, or assisting people visually impaired, to mention a few. To analyze where the efforts of our community to solve the video captioning task are, as well as what route could be better to follow, this manuscript presents an extensive review of more than 105 papers for the period of 2016 to 2021. As a result, the most-used datasets and metrics are identified. Also, the main approaches used and the best ones. We compute a set of rankings based on several performance metrics to obtain, according to its performance, the best method with the best result on the video captioning task. Finally, some insights are concluded about which could be the next steps or opportunity areas to improve dealing with this complex task.
summary: Video captioning is the process of describing the content of a sequence of images capturing its semantic relationships and meanings. Dealing with this task with a single image is arduous, not to mention how difficult it is for a video (or images sequence). We compute a set of rankings based on several performance metrics to obtain, according to its performance, the best method with the best result on the video captioning task. Finally, some insights are concluded about which could be the next steps or opportunity areas to improve dealing with this complex task.
abstract_zh: 视频字幕是描述一系列图像内容的过程，捕获其语义关系和含义。使用单个图像处理此任务非常艰巨，更不用说对于视频（或图像序列）来说有多么困难。视频字幕的应用数量和相关性是巨大的，主要是为了处理视频监控中的大量视频记录，或者帮助视障人士等等。为了分析我们的社区在解决视频字幕任务方面所做的努力，以及可以更好地遵循什么路线，本手稿对 2016 年至 2021 年期间超过 105 篇论文进行了广泛的回顾。因此，确定了最常用的数据集和指标。此外，还介绍了所使用的主要方法和最佳方法。我们根据多个性能指标计算一组排名，以便根据其性能获得在视频字幕任务上获得最佳结果的最佳方法。最后，总结了一些关于改进处理这一复杂任务的下一步或机会领域的见解。

AI.result: 确定了视频字幕生成领域主流数据集、评估指标及最佳方法，并基于多种性能指标计算出不同方法的排名。

search_text: Video Captioning: a comparative review of where we are and which could be the route 视频字幕：对我们所在位置以及可能的路线进行比较回顾 Video captioning is the process of describing the content of a sequence of images capturing its semantic relationships and meanings. Dealing with this task with a single image is arduous, not to mention how difficult it is for a video (or images sequence). The amount and relevance of the applications of video captioning are vast, mainly to deal with a significant amount of video recordings in video surveillance, or assisting people visually impaired, to mention a few. To analyze where the efforts of our community to solve the video captioning task are, as well as what route could be better to follow, this manuscript presents an extensive review of more than 105 papers for the period of 2016 to 2021. As a result, the most-used datasets and metrics are identified. Also, the main approaches used and the best ones. We compute a set of rankings based on several performance metrics to obtain, according to its performance, the best method with the best result on the video captioning task. Finally, some insights are concluded about which could be the next steps or opportunity areas to improve dealing with this complex task. 视频字幕是描述一系列图像内容的过程，捕获其语义关系和含义。使用单个图像处理此任务非常艰巨，更不用说对于视频（或图像序列）来说有多么困难。视频字幕的应用数量和相关性是巨大的，主要是为了处理视频监控中的大量视频记录，或者帮助视障人士等等。为了分析我们的社区在解决视频字幕任务方面所做的努力，以及可以更好地遵循什么路线，本手稿对 2016 年至 2021 年期间超过 105 篇论文进行了广泛的回顾。因此，确定了最常用的数据集和指标。此外，还介绍了所使用的主要方法和最佳方法。我们根据多个性能指标计算一组排名，以便根据其性能获得在视频字幕任务上获得最佳结果的最佳方法。最后，总结了一些关于改进处理这一复杂任务的下一步或机会领域的见解。 这篇论文对视频字幕生成领域进行了全面综述，比较了不同方法，分析了现状及未来方向。 Daniela Moctezuma,Tania Ramírez-delReal,Guillermo Ruiz,Othón González-Chávez cs.CV

authors_text: Diego Díaz-Domínguez,Gonzalo Navarro
title: Efficient Construction of the BWT for Repetitive Text Using String Compression
title_zh: 使用字符串压缩高效构建重复文本的 BWT
abstract: We present a new semi-external algorithm that builds the Burrows--Wheeler transform variant of Bauer et al. (a.k.a., BCR BWT) in linear expected time. Our method uses compression techniques to reduce computational costs when the input is massive and repetitive. Concretely, we build on induced suffix sorting (ISS) and resort to run-length and grammar compression to maintain our intermediate results in compact form. Our compression format not only saves space but also speeds up the required computations. Our experiments show important space and computation time savings when the text is repetitive. In moderate-size collections of real human genome assemblies (14.2 GB - 75.05 GB), our memory peak is, on average, 1.7x smaller than the peak of the state-of-the-art BCR BWT construction algorithm (\texttt{ropebwt2}), while running 5x faster. Our current implementation was also able to compute the BCR BWT of 400 real human genome assemblies (1.2 TB) in 41.21 hours using 118.83 GB of working memory (around 10\% of the input size). Interestingly, the results we report in the 1.2 TB file are dominated by the difficulties of scanning huge files under memory constraints (specifically, I/O operations). This fact indicates we can perform much better with a more careful implementation of our method, thus scaling to even bigger sizes efficiently.
summary: We present a new semi-external algorithm that builds the Burrows--Wheeler transform variant of Bauer et al. (a.k.a., BCR BWT) in linear expected time. Our method uses compression techniques to reduce computational costs when the input is massive and repetitive. Concretely, we build on induced suffix sorting (ISS) and resort to run-length and grammar compression to maintain our intermediate results in compact form. Our compression format not only saves space but also speeds up the required computations. Our experiments show important space and computation time savings when the text is repetitive. In moderate-size collections of real human genome assemblies (14.2 GB - 75.05 GB), our memory peak is, on average, 1.7x smaller than the peak of the state-of-the-art BCR BWT construction algorithm (\texttt{ropebwt2}), while running 5x faster. Our current implementation was also able to compute the BCR BWT of 400 real human genome assemblies (1.2 TB) in 41.21 hours using 118.83 GB of working memory (around 10\% of the input size). Interestingly, the results we report in the 1.2 TB file are dominated by the difficulties of scanning huge files under memory constraints (specifically, I/O operations). This fact indicates we can perform much better with a more careful implementation of our method, thus scaling to even bigger sizes efficiently.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新的半外部算法，该算法构建 Bauer 等人的 Burrows-Wheeler 变换变体。 （又名，BCR BWT）在线性预期时间内。当输入大量且重复时，我们的方法使用压缩技术来降低计算成本。具体来说，我们建立在诱导后缀排序（ISS）的基础上，并采用游程长度和语法压缩来维持紧凑形式的中间结果。我们的压缩格式不仅可以节省空间，还可以加快所需的计算速度。我们的实验表明，当文本重复时，可以节省大量空间和计算时间。在中等大小的真实人类基因组集合（14.2 GB - 75.05 GB）中，我们的内存峰值平均比最先进的 BCR BWT 构建算法（\texttt{ropebwt2}）的峰值小 1.7 倍，而运行速度快 5 倍。我们当前的实现还能够使用 118.83 GB 工作内存（大约是输入大小的 10%）在 41.21 小时内计算 400 个真实人类基因组组件 (1.2 TB) 的 BCR BWT。有趣的是，我们在 1.2 TB 文件中报告的结果主要是在内存限制（特别是 I/O 操作）下扫描大文件的困难。这一事实表明，通过更仔细地实施我们的方法，我们可以表现得更好，从而有效地扩展到更大的尺寸。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种半外部算法，利用字符串压缩技术高效构建重复文本的Burrows-Wheeler变换（BCR BWT）。
AI.motivation: 处理大规模重复文本（如人类基因组集合）时，传统BWT构建方法面临内存和计算效率的瓶颈，需开发更高效的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于诱导后缀排序（ISS），结合运行长度编码和语法压缩技术，压缩中间结果以减少空间占用并加速计算。
AI.result: 在14.2 GB至75.05 GB的人类基因组数据集上，内存峰值平均降低1.7倍且速度提升5倍；处理1.2 TB数据耗时41.21小时，内存使用约输入数据的10%。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在处理大规模重复文本时表现优异，但I/O操作限制了进一步扩展，优化实现可提升更大规模数据的处理效率。
