authors_text: Melih C. Yesilli,Jisheng Chen,Firas A. Khasawneh,Yang Guo
title: Automated Surface Texture Analysis via Discrete Cosine Transform and Discrete Wavelet Transform
title_zh: 通过离散余弦变换和离散小波变换进行自动表面纹理分析
abstract: Surface roughness and texture are critical to the functional performance of engineering components. The ability to analyze roughness and texture effectively and efficiently is much needed to ensure surface quality in many surface generation processes, such as machining, surface mechanical treatment, etc. Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT) and Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) are two commonly used signal decomposition tools for surface roughness and texture analysis. Both methods require selecting a threshold to decompose a given surface into its three main components: form, waviness, and roughness. However, although DWT and DCT are part of the ISO surface finish standards, there exists no systematic guidance on how to compute these thresholds, and they are often manually selected on case by case basis. This makes utilizing these methods for studying surfaces dependent on the user's judgment and limits their automation potential. Therefore, we present two automatic threshold selection algorithms based on information theory and signal energy. We use machine learning to validate the success of our algorithms both using simulated surfaces as well as digital microscopy images of machined surfaces. Specifically, we generate feature vectors for each surface area or profile and apply supervised classification. Comparing our results with the heuristic threshold selection approach shows good agreement with mean accuracies as high as 95\%. We also compare our results with Gaussian filtering (GF) and show that while GF results for areas can yield slightly higher accuracies, our results outperform GF for surface profiles. We further show that our automatic threshold selection has significant advantages in terms of computational time as evidenced by decreasing the number of mode computations by an order of magnitude compared to the heuristic thresholding for DCT.
summary: Surface roughness and texture are critical to the functional performance of engineering components. The ability to analyze roughness and texture effectively and efficiently is much needed to ensure surface quality in many surface generation processes, such as machining, surface mechanical treatment, etc. Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT) and Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) are two commonly used signal decomposition tools for surface roughness and texture analysis. Both methods require selecting a threshold to decompose a given surface into its three main components: form, waviness, and roughness. However, although DWT and DCT are part of the ISO surface finish standards, there exists no systematic guidance on how to compute these thresholds, and they are often manually selected on case by case basis. This makes utilizing these methods for studying surfaces dependent on the user's judgment and limits their automation potential. Therefore, we present two automatic threshold selection algorithms based on information theory and signal energy. We use machine learning to validate the success of our algorithms both using simulated surfaces as well as digital microscopy images of machined surfaces. Specifically, we generate feature vectors for each surface area or profile and apply supervised classification. Comparing our results with the heuristic threshold selection approach shows good agreement with mean accuracies as high as 95\%. We also compare our results with Gaussian filtering (GF) and show that while GF results for areas can yield slightly higher accuracies, our results outperform GF for surface profiles. We further show that our automatic threshold selection has significant advantages in terms of computational time as evidenced by decreasing the number of mode computations by an order of magnitude compared to the heuristic thresholding for DCT.
abstract_zh: 表面粗糙度和纹理对于工程部件的功能性能至关重要。在机械加工、表面机械处理等许多表面生成过程中，非常需要有效且高效地分析粗糙度和纹理的能力，以确保表面质量。离散小波变换（DWT）和离散余弦变换（DCT）是表面粗糙度和纹理分析的两种常用信号分解工具。这两种方法都需要选择一个阈值来将给定表面分解为其三个主要组成部分：形状、波纹度和粗糙度。然而，尽管 DWT 和 DCT 是 ISO 表面光洁度标准的一部分，但没有关于如何计算这些阈值的系统指南，并且通常根据具体情况手动选择它们。这使得利用这些方法来研究表面取决于用户的判断，并限制了它们的自动化潜力。因此，我们提出了两种基于信息论和信号能量的自动阈值选择算法。我们使用机器学习来验证我们的算法是否成功，使用模拟表面以及加工表面的数字显微图像。具体来说，我们为每个表面区域或轮廓生成特征向量并应用监督分类。将我们的结果与启发式阈值选择方法进行比较，结果显示出良好的一致性，平均准确度高达 95%。我们还将我们的结果与高斯滤波 (GF) 进行比较，结果表明，虽然区域的 GF 结果可以产生稍高的精​​度，但我们的表面轮廓结果优于 GF。我们进一步表明，我们的自动阈值选择在计算时间方面具有显着的优势，与 DCT 的启发式阈值相比，模式计算数量减少了一个数量级，这证明了这一点。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于信息论和信号能量的自动阈值选择算法，用于离散余弦变换（DCT）和离散小波变换（DWT）的表面纹理分析。
AI.motivation: 现有DCT和DWT方法依赖人工选择阈值，缺乏系统指导，限制了自动化应用潜力。
AI.method: 设计信息论与信号能量驱动的自动阈值算法，结合机器学习验证，使用模拟表面和加工表面显微图像进行监督分类，并与高斯滤波（GF）及启发式方法对比。
AI.result: 算法在表面区域和轮廓分析中均达到最高95%准确率，优于GF方法，且计算时间减少一个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 自动阈值选择显著提升表面纹理分析的准确性和效率，优于传统启发式方法和高斯滤波。

search_text: Automated Surface Texture Analysis via Discrete Cosine Transform and Discrete Wavelet Transform 通过离散余弦变换和离散小波变换进行自动表面纹理分析 Surface roughness and texture are critical to the functional performance of engineering components. The ability to analyze roughness and texture effectively and efficiently is much needed to ensure surface quality in many surface generation processes, such as machining, surface mechanical treatment, etc. Discrete Wavelet Transform (DWT) and Discrete Cosine Transform (DCT) are two commonly used signal decomposition tools for surface roughness and texture analysis. Both methods require selecting a threshold to decompose a given surface into its three main components: form, waviness, and roughness. However, although DWT and DCT are part of the ISO surface finish standards, there exists no systematic guidance on how to compute these thresholds, and they are often manually selected on case by case basis. This makes utilizing these methods for studying surfaces dependent on the user's judgment and limits their automation potential. Therefore, we present two automatic threshold selection algorithms based on information theory and signal energy. We use machine learning to validate the success of our algorithms both using simulated surfaces as well as digital microscopy images of machined surfaces. Specifically, we generate feature vectors for each surface area or profile and apply supervised classification. Comparing our results with the heuristic threshold selection approach shows good agreement with mean accuracies as high as 95\%. We also compare our results with Gaussian filtering (GF) and show that while GF results for areas can yield slightly higher accuracies, our results outperform GF for surface profiles. We further show that our automatic threshold selection has significant advantages in terms of computational time as evidenced by decreasing the number of mode computations by an order of magnitude compared to the heuristic thresholding for DCT. 表面粗糙度和纹理对于工程部件的功能性能至关重要。在机械加工、表面机械处理等许多表面生成过程中，非常需要有效且高效地分析粗糙度和纹理的能力，以确保表面质量。离散小波变换（DWT）和离散余弦变换（DCT）是表面粗糙度和纹理分析的两种常用信号分解工具。这两种方法都需要选择一个阈值来将给定表面分解为其三个主要组成部分：形状、波纹度和粗糙度。然而，尽管 DWT 和 DCT 是 ISO 表面光洁度标准的一部分，但没有关于如何计算这些阈值的系统指南，并且通常根据具体情况手动选择它们。这使得利用这些方法来研究表面取决于用户的判断，并限制了它们的自动化潜力。因此，我们提出了两种基于信息论和信号能量的自动阈值选择算法。我们使用机器学习来验证我们的算法是否成功，使用模拟表面以及加工表面的数字显微图像。具体来说，我们为每个表面区域或轮廓生成特征向量并应用监督分类。将我们的结果与启发式阈值选择方法进行比较，结果显示出良好的一致性，平均准确度高达 95%。我们还将我们的结果与高斯滤波 (GF) 进行比较，结果表明，虽然区域的 GF 结果可以产生稍高的精​​度，但我们的表面轮廓结果优于 GF。我们进一步表明，我们的自动阈值选择在计算时间方面具有显着的优势，与 DCT 的启发式阈值相比，模式计算数量减少了一个数量级，这证明了这一点。 本文提出基于信息论和信号能量的自动阈值选择算法，用于离散余弦变换（DCT）和离散小波变换（DWT）的表面纹理分析。 Melih C. Yesilli,Jisheng Chen,Firas A. Khasawneh,Yang Guo eess.SP,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Zhaohui Zheng,Rongguang Ye,Qibin Hou,Dongwei Ren,Ping Wang,Wangmeng Zuo,Ming-Ming Cheng
title: Localization Distillation for Object Detection
title_zh: 用于目标检测的本地化蒸馏
comment: Journal extension of our previous conference paper arXiv:2102.12252
comments: Journal extension of our previous conference paper arXiv:2102.12252
abstract: Previous knowledge distillation (KD) methods for object detection mostly focus on feature imitation instead of mimicking the prediction logits due to its inefficiency in distilling the localization information. In this paper, we investigate whether logit mimicking always lags behind feature imitation. Towards this goal, we first present a novel localization distillation (LD) method which can efficiently transfer the localization knowledge from the teacher to the student. Second, we introduce the concept of valuable localization region that can aid to selectively distill the classification and localization knowledge for a certain region. Combining these two new components, for the first time, we show that logit mimicking can outperform feature imitation and the absence of localization distillation is a critical reason for why logit mimicking underperforms for years. The thorough studies exhibit the great potential of logit mimicking that can significantly alleviate the localization ambiguity, learn robust feature representation, and ease the training difficulty in the early stage. We also provide the theoretical connection between the proposed LD and the classification KD, that they share the equivalent optimization effect. Our distillation scheme is simple as well as effective and can be easily applied to both dense horizontal object detectors and rotated object detectors. Extensive experiments on the MS COCO, PASCAL VOC, and DOTA benchmarks demonstrate that our method can achieve considerable AP improvement without any sacrifice on the inference speed. Our source code and pretrained models are publicly available at https://github.com/HikariTJU/LD.
summary: Previous knowledge distillation (KD) methods for object detection mostly focus on feature imitation instead of mimicking the prediction logits due to its inefficiency in distilling the localization information. In this paper, we investigate whether logit mimicking always lags behind feature imitation. Towards this goal, we first present a novel localization distillation (LD) method which can efficiently transfer the localization knowledge from the teacher to the student. Second, we introduce the concept of valuable localization region that can aid to selectively distill the classification and localization knowledge for a certain region. Combining these two new components, for the first time, we show that logit mimicking can outperform feature imitation and the absence of localization distillation is a critical reason for why logit mimicking underperforms for years. The thorough studies exhibit the great potential of logit mimicking that can significantly alleviate the localization ambiguity, learn robust feature representation, and ease the training difficulty in the early stage. We also provide the theoretical connection between the proposed LD and the classification KD, that they share the equivalent optimization effect. Our distillation scheme is simple as well as effective and can be easily applied to both dense horizontal object detectors and rotated object detectors. Extensive experiments on the MS COCO, PASCAL VOC, and DOTA benchmarks demonstrate that our method can achieve considerable AP improvement without any sacrifice on the inference speed. Our source code and pretrained models are publicly available at https://github.com/HikariTJU/LD.
abstract_zh: 先前用于目标检测的知识蒸馏（KD）方法主要关注特征模仿，而不是模仿预测逻辑，因为它在提取定位信息方面效率低下。在本文中，我们研究了逻辑模仿是否总是落后于特征模仿。为了实现这一目标，我们首先提出了一种新颖的定位蒸馏（LD）方法，可以有效地将定位知识从教师转移到学生。其次，我们引入了有价值的本地化区域的概念，它可以帮助有选择地提取特定区域的分类和本地化知识。将这两个新组件结合起来，我们首次证明 Logit 模仿可以优于特征模仿，而缺乏本地化蒸馏是 Logit 模仿多年来表现不佳的关键原因。深入的研究展示了逻辑模仿的巨大潜力，可以显着减轻定位模糊性，学习鲁棒的特征表示，并减轻早期的训练难度。我们还提供了所提出的 LD 和分类 KD 之间的理论联系，它们具有等效的优化效果。我们的蒸馏方案简单有效，可以轻松应用于密集水平物体检测器和旋转物体检测器。在 MS COCO、PASCAL VOC 和 DOTA 基准上进行的大量实验表明，我们的方法可以在不牺牲推理速度的情况下实现显着的 AP 改进。我们的源代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/HikariTJU/LD 上公开获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为定位蒸馏（LD）的新方法，通过模仿预测logits而非特征来提升目标检测中的知识蒸馏效果。
AI.motivation: 传统知识蒸馏方法在目标检测中侧重于特征模仿，但未能有效利用logits模仿传递定位信息，导致定位精度不足。
AI.method: 设计定位蒸馏框架，结合有价值定位区域的概念，选择性地蒸馏分类与定位知识，并证明logits模仿与分类蒸馏具有等效优化效果。
AI.result: 在MS COCO、PASCAL VOC和DOTA数据集上实现显著的AP提升，且不牺牲推理速度。
AI.conclusion: 定位蒸馏通过有效利用logits模仿解决了长期存在的定位模糊问题，为检测模型训练提供了简单高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Shan Xu,Chang Xu,Sarah McIntyre,Håkan Olausson,Gregory J. Gerling
title: 3D Visual Tracking to Quantify Physical Contact Interactions in Human-to-Human Touch
title_zh: 3D 视觉跟踪量化人与人接触中的物理接触交互
abstract: Across a plethora of social situations, we touch others in natural and intuitive ways to share thoughts and emotions, such as tapping to get one's attention or caressing to soothe one's anxiety. A deeper understanding of these human-to-human interactions will require, in part, the precise measurement of skin-to-skin physical contact. Among prior efforts, each measurement approach exhibits certain constraints, e.g., motion trackers do not capture the precise shape of skin surfaces, while pressure sensors impede direct skin contact. In contrast, this work develops an interference-free 3D visual tracking system using a depth camera to measure the contact attributes between the bare hand of a toucher and the forearm of a receiver. The toucher's hand is tracked as a posed and positioned mesh by fitting a hand model to detected 3D joints, whereas the forearm is extracted as a detailed 3D surface. Based on a contact model of point clouds, the spatiotemporal contact changes are decomposed as six high-resolution time-series attributes, i.e., contact area, indentation depth, absolute velocity, and three orthogonal velocity components, together with contact duration. To examine the system's capabilities and limitations, two experiments were performed. First, to evaluate its ability to discern human touches, one person delivered cued social messages, e.g., happiness, anger, sympathy, to another using their preferred gestures. The results indicated that messages, gestures, and the individual touchers, were readily discerned from their contact attributes. Second, the measurement accuracy was validated against independent devices, including an electromagnetic tracker, pressure mat, and laser sensor. While validated here in the context of social communication, this system is extendable to human touch interactions such as maternal care of infants and massage therapy.

A deeper understanding of these human-to-human interactions will require, in part, the precise measurement of skin-to-skin physical contact. In contrast, this work develops an interference-free 3D visual tracking system using a depth camera to measure the contact attributes between the bare hand of a toucher and the forearm of a receiver. The toucher's hand is tracked as a posed and positioned mesh by fitting a hand model to detected 3D joints, whereas the forearm is extracted as a detailed 3D surface. Based on a contact model of point clouds, the spatiotemporal contact changes are decomposed as six high-resolution time-series attributes, i.e., contact area, indentation depth, absolute velocity, and three orthogonal velocity components, together with contact duration. To examine the system's capabilities and limitations, two experiments were performed. First, to evaluate its ability to discern human touches, one person delivered cued social messages, e.g., happiness, anger, sympathy, to another using their preferred gestures. abstract_zh: 在众多的社交场合中，我们以自然而直观的方式接触他人以分享想法和情感，例如轻敲以引起他人的注意或爱抚以缓解他人的焦虑。要更深入地了解这些人与人之间的互动，部分需要精确测量皮肤与皮肤的身体接触。在之前的努力中，每种测量方法都存在一定的限制，例如运动跟踪器无法捕获皮肤表面的精确形状，而压力传感器则阻碍直接接触皮肤。相比之下，这项工作开发了一种无干扰的 3D 视觉跟踪系统，使用深​​度相机来测量触摸者的裸手和接收器的前臂之间的接触属性。通过将手部模型拟合到检测到的 3D 关节，将触摸者的手作为姿势和定位网格进行跟踪，而前臂则提取为详细的 3D 表面。基于点云的接触模型，时空接触变化被分解为六个高分辨率时间序列属性，即接触面积、压痕深度、绝对速度和三个正交速度分量以及接触持续时间。为了检查系统的功能和局限性，进行了两个实验。首先，为了评估其辨别人类触摸的能力，一个人使用他们喜欢的手势向另一个人传递暗示的社交信息，例如快乐、愤怒、同情。结果表明，消息、手势和各个触摸者很容易从接触属性中辨别出来。其次，测量精度针对独立设备进行了验证，包括电磁跟踪器、压力垫和激光传感器。虽然在社交交流的背景下得到了验证，但该系统可以扩展到人与人的接触互动，例如婴儿的产妇护理和按摩治疗。

AI.tldr: 开发一种基于深度摄像头的3D视觉追踪系统，用于量化人类间皮肤接触的物理交互属性。
AI.motivation: 现有触觉测量方法（如运动追踪器、压力传感器）存在精度不足或阻碍自然接触的局限性，需更精确且无干扰的测量手段以研究社会互动中的触觉信息。
AI.method: 使用深度摄像头追踪触碰者手部（通过3D关节拟合手部模型）与接受者前臂（提取3D表面）的接触，基于点云接触模型分解出接触面积、压入深度、速度分量等六项高精度时间序列属性。
AI.result: 实验验证系统可区分不同社会情绪触碰（如喜悦、愤怒）及个体差异，且测量精度与电磁跟踪器、压力垫等独立设备结果一致，具备扩展至母婴护理、按摩等场景的潜力。
AI.conclusion: 该无干扰3D视觉系统有效量化了人类触觉交互的物理属性，在社交沟通研究及医疗健康领域具有广泛应用前景。

search_text: 3D Visual Tracking to Quantify Physical Contact Interactions in Human-to-Human Touch 3D 视觉跟踪量化人与人接触中的物理接触交互 Across a plethora of social situations, we touch others in natural and intuitive ways to share thoughts and emotions, such as tapping to get one's attention or caressing to soothe one's anxiety. A deeper understanding of these human-to-human interactions will require, in part, the precise measurement of skin-to-skin physical contact. Among prior efforts, each measurement approach exhibits certain constraints, e.g., motion trackers do not capture the precise shape of skin surfaces, while pressure sensors impede direct skin contact. In contrast, this work develops an interference-free 3D visual tracking system using a depth camera to measure the contact attributes between the bare hand of a toucher and the forearm of a receiver. The toucher's hand is tracked as a posed and positioned mesh by fitting a hand model to detected 3D joints, whereas the forearm is extracted as a detailed 3D surface. Based on a contact model of point clouds, the spatiotemporal contact changes are decomposed as six high-resolution time-series attributes, i.e., contact area, indentation depth, absolute velocity, and three orthogonal velocity components, together with contact duration. To examine the system's capabilities and limitations, two experiments were performed. First, to evaluate its ability to discern human touches, one person delivered cued social messages, e.g., happiness, anger, sympathy, to another using their preferred gestures. The results indicated that messages, gestures, and the individual touchers, were readily discerned from their contact attributes. Second, the measurement accuracy was validated against independent devices, including an electromagnetic tracker, pressure mat, and laser sensor. While validated here in the context of social communication, this system is extendable to human touch interactions such as maternal care of infants and massage therapy. 在众多的社交场合中，我们以自然而直观的方式接触他人以分享想法和情感，例如轻敲以引起他人的注意或爱抚以缓解他人的焦虑。要更深入地了解这些人与人之间的互动，部分需要精确测量皮肤与皮肤的身体接触。在之前的努力中，每种测量方法都存在一定的限制，例如运动跟踪器无法捕获皮肤表面的精确形状，而压力传感器则阻碍直接接触皮肤。相比之下，这项工作开发了一种无干扰的 3D 视觉跟踪系统，使用深​​度相机来测量触摸者的裸手和接收器的前臂之间的接触属性。通过将手部模型拟合到检测到的 3D 关节，将触摸者的手作为姿势和定位网格进行跟踪，而前臂则提取为详细的 3D 表面。基于点云的接触模型，时空接触变化被分解为六个高分辨率时间序列属性，即接触面积、压痕深度、绝对速度和三个正交速度分量以及接触持续时间。为了检查系统的功能和局限性，进行了两个实验。首先，为了评估其辨别人类触摸的能力，一个人使用他们喜欢的手势向另一个人传递暗示的社交信息，例如快乐、愤怒、同情。结果表明，消息、手势和各个触摸者很容易从接触属性中辨别出来。其次，测量精度针对独立设备进行了验证，包括电磁跟踪器、压力垫和激光传感器。虽然在社交交流的背景下得到了验证，但该系统可以扩展到人与人的接触互动，例如婴儿的产妇护理和按摩治疗。 开发一种基于深度摄像头的3D视觉追踪系统，用于量化人类间皮肤接触的物理交互属性。 Shan Xu,Chang Xu,Sarah McIntyre,Håkan Olausson,Gregory J. Gerling cs.HC

authors_text: Xin Duan,Xiabi Liu,Xiaopeng Gong,Mengqiao Han
title: RL-CoSeg : A Novel Image Co-Segmentation Algorithm with Deep Reinforcement Learning
title_zh: RL-CoSeg：一种新颖的深度强化学习图像共分割算法
abstract: This paper proposes an automatic image co-segmentation algorithm based on deep reinforcement learning (RL). Existing co-segmentation tasks mainly rely on deep learning methods, and the obtained foreground edges are often rough. In order to obtain more precise foreground edges, we use deep RL to solve this problem and achieve the finer segmentation. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to apply RL methods to co-segmentation. We define the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and optimize it by RL with asynchronous advantage actor-critic (A3C). The RL image co-segmentation network uses the correlation between images to segment common and salient objects from a set of related images. In order to achieve automatic segmentation, our RL-CoSeg method eliminates user's hints. For the image co-segmentation problem, we propose a collaborative RL algorithm based on the A3C model. We propose a Siamese RL co-segmentation network structure to obtain the co-attention of images for co-segmentation. We improve the self-attention for automatic RL algorithm to obtain long-distance dependence and enlarge the receptive field. The image feature information obtained by self-attention can be used to supplement the deleted user's hints and help to obtain more accurate actions. Experimental results have shown that our method can improve the performance effectively on both coarse and fine initial segmentations, and it achieves the state-of-the-art performance on Internet dataset, iCoseg dataset and MLMR-COS dataset.
summary: This paper proposes an automatic image co-segmentation algorithm based on deep reinforcement learning (RL). Existing co-segmentation tasks mainly rely on deep learning methods, and the obtained foreground edges are often rough. In order to obtain more precise foreground edges, we use deep RL to solve this problem and achieve the finer segmentation. To our best knowledge, this is the first work to apply RL methods to co-segmentation. We define the problem as a Markov Decision Process (MDP) and optimize it by RL with asynchronous advantage actor-critic (A3C). The RL image co-segmentation network uses the correlation between images to segment common and salient objects from a set of related images. In order to achieve automatic segmentation, our RL-CoSeg method eliminates user's hints. For the image co-segmentation problem, we propose a collaborative RL algorithm based on the A3C model. We propose a Siamese RL co-segmentation network structure to obtain the co-attention of images for co-segmentation. We improve the self-attention for automatic RL algorithm to obtain long-distance dependence and enlarge the receptive field. The image feature information obtained by self-attention can be used to supplement the deleted user's hints and help to obtain more accurate actions. Experimental results have shown that our method can improve the performance effectively on both coarse and fine initial segmentations, and it achieves the state-of-the-art performance on Internet dataset, iCoseg dataset and MLMR-COS dataset.
abstract_zh: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习（RL）的自动图像共分割算法。现有的联合分割任务主要依靠深度学习方法，获得的前景边缘往往比较粗糙。为了获得更精确的前景边缘，我们使用深度强化学习来解决这个问题并实现更精细的分割。据我们所知，这是第一个将强化学习方法应用于联合分割的工作。我们将问题定义为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），并通过具有异步优势演员批评家（A3C）的强化学习对其进行优化。强化学习图像联合分割网络利用图像之间的相关性从一组相关图像中分割常见和显着的对象。为了实现自动分割，我们的 RL-CoSeg 方法消除了用户的提示。针对图像共分割问题，我们提出了一种基于A3C模型的协作强化学习算法。我们提出了一种 Siamese RL 联合分割网络结构，以获得图像的联合注意力以进行联合分割。我们改进了自动强化学习算法的自注意力以获得长距离依赖并扩大感受野。通过self-attention得到的图像特征信息可以用来补充删除的用户提示，帮助获得更准确的动作。实验结果表明，我们的方法可以有效提高粗略和精细初始分割的性能，并且在互联网数据集、iCoseg数据集和MLMR-COS数据集上实现了state-of-the-art的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度强化学习的图像协同分割算法RL-CoSeg，旨在通过强化学习优化分割精度。
AI.motivation: 现有协同分割方法依赖深度学习但分割边缘粗糙，需引入强化学习以提升精度并实现自动化分割。
AI.method: 将问题建模为马尔可夫决策过程（MDP），采用异步优势演员-评论家（A3C）算法优化；设计Siamese RL网络结构，结合自注意力机制扩展感受野并补充用户提示信息。
AI.result: 在Internet、iCoseg和MLMR-COS数据集上均达到最优性能，显著提升粗粒度和细粒度初始分割效果。
AI.conclusion: 通过强化学习与自注意力机制的结合，RL-CoSeg实现了无需用户提示的高精度图像协同分割，优于现有方法。

authors_text: Hanxiao Tan
title: Maximum Entropy Baseline for Integrated Gradients
title_zh: 积分梯度的最大熵基线
abstract: Integrated Gradients (IG), one of the most popular explainability methods available, still remains ambiguous in the selection of baseline, which may seriously impair the credibility of the explanations. This study proposes a new uniform baseline, i.e., the Maximum Entropy Baseline, which is consistent with the "uninformative" property of baselines defined in IG. In addition, we propose an improved ablating evaluation approach incorporating the new baseline, where the information conservativeness is maintained. We explain the linear transformation invariance of IG baselines from an information perspective. Finally, we assess the reliability of the explanations generated by different explainability methods and different IG baselines through extensive evaluation experiments.
summary: Integrated Gradients (IG), one of the most popular explainability methods available, still remains ambiguous in the selection of baseline, which may seriously impair the credibility of the explanations. This study proposes a new uniform baseline, i.e., the Maximum Entropy Baseline, which is consistent with the "uninformative" property of baselines defined in IG. In addition, we propose an improved ablating evaluation approach incorporating the new baseline, where the information conservativeness is maintained. We explain the linear transformation invariance of IG baselines from an information perspective. Finally, we assess the reliability of the explanations generated by different explainability methods and different IG baselines through extensive evaluation experiments.
abstract_zh: 积分梯度（IG）是最流行的可解释性方法之一，但在基线的选择上仍然不明确，这可能会严重损害解释的可信度。本研究提出了一种新的统一基线，即最大熵基线，它与IG中定义的基线的“无信息”属性一致。此外，我们提出了一种改进的消融评估方法，结合了新的基线，保持了信息的保守性。我们从信息角度解释 IG 基线的线性变换不变性。最后，我们通过广泛的评估实验评估不同可解释性方法和不同 IG 基线生成的解释的可靠性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种统一的基线选择方案——最大熵基线，以提升Integrated Gradients解释方法的可信度。
AI.motivation: Integrated Gradients方法的基线选择缺乏明确标准，导致生成的解释结果可信度不足。
AI.method: 提出符合'无信息'特性的最大熵基线，改进消融评估方法并从信息角度分析基线的线性变换不变性。
AI.result: 实验验证最大熵基线能有效提升解释可靠性，改进方法在保持信息保守性的同时优化了评估效果。
AI.conclusion: 最大熵基线为IG方法提供了可靠的统一选择方案，改进的评估框架有助于更精准验证解释方法的有效性。

search_text: Maximum Entropy Baseline for Integrated Gradients 积分梯度的最大熵基线 Integrated Gradients (IG), one of the most popular explainability methods available, still remains ambiguous in the selection of baseline, which may seriously impair the credibility of the explanations. This study proposes a new uniform baseline, i.e., the Maximum Entropy Baseline, which is consistent with the "uninformative" property of baselines defined in IG. In addition, we propose an improved ablating evaluation approach incorporating the new baseline, where the information conservativeness is maintained. We explain the linear transformation invariance of IG baselines from an information perspective. Finally, we assess the reliability of the explanations generated by different explainability methods and different IG baselines through extensive evaluation experiments. 积分梯度（IG）是最流行的可解释性方法之一，但在基线的选择上仍然不明确，这可能会严重损害解释的可信度。本研究提出了一种新的统一基线，即最大熵基线，它与IG中定义的基线的“无信息”属性一致。此外，我们提出了一种改进的消融评估方法，结合了新的基线，保持了信息的保守性。我们从信息角度解释 IG 基线的线性变换不变性。最后，我们通过广泛的评估实验评估不同可解释性方法和不同 IG 基线生成的解释的可靠性。 本文提出一种统一的基线选择方案——最大熵基线，以提升Integrated Gradients解释方法的可信度。 Hanxiao Tan cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Syrine Belakaria,Aryan Deshwal,Nitthilan Kannappan Jayakodi,Janardhan Rao Doppa
title: Uncertainty-Aware Search Framework for Multi-Objective Bayesian Optimization
title_zh: 用于多目标贝叶斯优化的不确定性感知搜索框架
comment: Added link to code and missing appendix. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.07029
comments: Added link to code and missing appendix. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2008.07029
abstract: We consider the problem of multi-objective (MO) blackbox optimization using expensive function evaluations, where the goal is to approximate the true Pareto set of solutions while minimizing the number of function evaluations. For example, in hardware design optimization, we need to find the designs that trade-off performance, energy, and area overhead using expensive simulations. We propose a novel uncertainty-aware search framework referred to as USeMO to efficiently select the sequence of inputs for evaluation to solve this problem. The selection method of USeMO consists of solving a cheap MO optimization problem via surrogate models of the true functions to identify the most promising candidates and picking the best candidate based on a measure of uncertainty. We also provide theoretical analysis to characterize the efficacy of our approach. Our experiments on several synthetic and six diverse real-world benchmark problems show that USeMO consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms.
summary: We consider the problem of multi-objective (MO) blackbox optimization using expensive function evaluations, where the goal is to approximate the true Pareto set of solutions while minimizing the number of function evaluations. For example, in hardware design optimization, we need to find the designs that trade-off performance, energy, and area overhead using expensive simulations. We propose a novel uncertainty-aware search framework referred to as USeMO to efficiently select the sequence of inputs for evaluation to solve this problem. The selection method of USeMO consists of solving a cheap MO optimization problem via surrogate models of the true functions to identify the most promising candidates and picking the best candidate based on a measure of uncertainty. We also provide theoretical analysis to characterize the efficacy of our approach. Our experiments on several synthetic and six diverse real-world benchmark problems show that USeMO consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art algorithms.
abstract_zh: 我们考虑使用昂贵的函数评估的多目标（MO）黑盒优化问题，其目标是逼近真正的帕累托解集，同时最小化函数评估的数量。例如，在硬件设计优化中，我们需要找到使用昂贵的模拟来权衡性能、能源和面积开销的设计。我们提出了一种称为 USeMO 的新颖的不确定性感知搜索框架，可以有效地选择用于评估的输入序列来解决此问题。 USeMO 的选择方法包括通过真实函数的代理模型解决廉价的 MO 优化问题，以识别最有希望的候选者，并根据不确定性度量选择最佳候选者。我们还提供理论分析来表征我们方法的有效性。我们对几个合成问题和六个不同的现实世界基准问题的实验表明，USeMO 始终优于最先进的算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种不确定性感知的多目标贝叶斯优化框架USeMO，旨在通过减少函数评估次数来高效逼近真实帕累托前沿。
AI.motivation: 在硬件设计等实际场景中，多目标优化需要平衡性能、能耗等指标，但昂贵的仿真成本限制了传统方法的效率，亟需更高效的优化框架。
AI.method: USeMO通过构建代理模型解决低成本多目标优化问题，筛选潜在候选解，并基于不确定性度量选择最优评估点，实现探索与利用的平衡。
AI.result: 在多个合成和真实世界基准测试中，USeMO在帕累托前沿逼近精度和评估效率上均优于现有最先进的算法。
AI.conclusion: USeMO通过不确定性感知机制有效提升了多目标优化效率，为处理高成本函数评估场景提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Minbin Huang,Zhijian Huang,Changlin Li,Xin Chen,Hang Xu,Zhenguo Li,Xiaodan Liang
title: Arch-Graph: Acyclic Architecture Relation Predictor for Task-Transferable Neural Architecture Search
title_zh: Arch-Graph：用于任务可转移神经架构搜索的非循环架构关系预测器
abstract: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) aims to find efficient models for multiple tasks. Beyond seeking solutions for a single task, there are surging interests in transferring network design knowledge across multiple tasks. In this line of research, effectively modeling task correlations is vital yet highly neglected. Therefore, we propose \textbf{Arch-Graph}, a transferable NAS method that predicts task-specific optimal architectures with respect to given task embeddings. It leverages correlations across multiple tasks by using their embeddings as a part of the predictor's input for fast adaptation. We also formulate NAS as an architecture relation graph prediction problem, with the relational graph constructed by treating candidate architectures as nodes and their pairwise relations as edges. To enforce some basic properties such as acyclicity in the relational graph, we add additional constraints to the optimization process, converting NAS into the problem of finding a Maximal Weighted Acyclic Subgraph (MWAS). Our algorithm then strives to eliminate cycles and only establish edges in the graph if the rank results can be trusted. Through MWAS, Arch-Graph can effectively rank candidate models for each task with only a small budget to finetune the predictor. With extensive experiments on TransNAS-Bench-101, we show Arch-Graph's transferability and high sample efficiency across numerous tasks, beating many NAS methods designed for both single-task and multi-task search. It is able to find top 0.16\% and 0.29\% architectures on average on two search spaces under the budget of only 50 models.
summary: Neural Architecture Search (NAS) aims to find efficient models for multiple tasks. Beyond seeking solutions for a single task, there are surging interests in transferring network design knowledge across multiple tasks. In this line of research, effectively modeling task correlations is vital yet highly neglected. Therefore, we propose \textbf{Arch-Graph}, a transferable NAS method that predicts task-specific optimal architectures with respect to given task embeddings. It leverages correlations across multiple tasks by using their embeddings as a part of the predictor's input for fast adaptation. We also formulate NAS as an architecture relation graph prediction problem, with the relational graph constructed by treating candidate architectures as nodes and their pairwise relations as edges. To enforce some basic properties such as acyclicity in the relational graph, we add additional constraints to the optimization process, converting NAS into the problem of finding a Maximal Weighted Acyclic Subgraph (MWAS). Our algorithm then strives to eliminate cycles and only establish edges in the graph if the rank results can be trusted. Through MWAS, Arch-Graph can effectively rank candidate models for each task with only a small budget to finetune the predictor. With extensive experiments on TransNAS-Bench-101, we show Arch-Graph's transferability and high sample efficiency across numerous tasks, beating many NAS methods designed for both single-task and multi-task search. It is able to find top 0.16\% and 0.29\% architectures on average on two search spaces under the budget of only 50 models.
abstract_zh: 神经架构搜索（NAS）旨在为多个任务找到有效的模型。除了寻求单个任务的解决方案之外，人们对跨多个任务转移网络设计知识的兴趣也日益浓厚。在这一领域的研究中，有效地建模任务相关性至关重要，但却被高度忽视。因此，我们提出了 \textbf{Arch-Graph}，一种可转移的 NAS 方法，可以根据给定的任务嵌入预测特定于任务的最佳架构。它通过使用多个任务的嵌入作为预测器输入的一部分来实现快速适应，从而利用多个任务之间的相关性。我们还将 NAS 表述为架构关系图预测问题，通过将候选架构视为节点、将它们的成对关系视为边来构建关系图。为了强制关系图中的非循环性等一些基本属性，我们在优化过程中添加了额外的约束，将 NAS 转换为寻找最大加权非循环子图（MWAS）的问题。然后，我们的算法会努力消除循环，并且仅在排名结果可信的情况下才在图中建立边缘。通过 MWAS，Arch-Graph 可以有效地对每个任务的候选模型进行排名，只需很少的预算来微调预测器。通过在 TransNAS-Bench-101 上进行的大量实验，我们展示了 Arch-Graph 在众多任务中的可转移性和高样本效率，击败了许多为单任务和多任务搜索设计的 NAS 方法。它能够在仅 50 个模型的预算下在两个搜索空间上平均找到排名前 0.16\% 和 0.29\% 的架构。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Arch-Graph的可转移神经架构搜索方法，通过任务嵌入和图结构预测任务特定的最优架构。
AI.motivation: 现有NAS方法多关注单一任务，忽视了跨任务的架构知识迁移，而任务间相关性建模对提升搜索效率至关重要。
AI.method: 利用任务嵌入作为预测器输入，构建候选架构的关系图并强制其无环性，将NAS转化为最大权无环子图（MWAS）问题进行求解。
AI.result: 在TransNAS-Bench-101上实验表明，Arch-Graph在仅使用50个模型预算时，平均找到前0.16%和0.29%的优质架构，优于单任务和多任务NAS方法。
AI.conclusion: Arch-Graph通过图结构建模和无环约束有效实现了跨任务架构知识迁移，展示了高样本效率和搜索性能。

Through MWAS, Arch-Graph can effectively rank candidate models for each task with only a small budget to finetune the predictor. With extensive experiments on TransNAS-Bench-101, we show Arch-Graph's transferability and high sample efficiency across numerous tasks, beating many NAS methods designed for both single-task and multi-task search. It is able to find top 0.16\% and 0.29\% architectures on average on two search spaces under the budget of only 50 models. 神经架构搜索（NAS）旨在为多个任务找到有效的模型。除了寻求单个任务的解决方案之外，人们对跨多个任务转移网络设计知识的兴趣也日益浓厚。在这一领域的研究中，有效地建模任务相关性至关重要，但却被高度忽视。因此，我们提出了 \textbf{Arch-Graph}，一种可转移的 NAS 方法，可以根据给定的任务嵌入预测特定于任务的最佳架构。它通过使用多个任务的嵌入作为预测器输入的一部分来实现快速适应，从而利用多个任务之间的相关性。我们还将 NAS 表述为架构关系图预测问题，通过将候选架构视为节点、将它们的成对关系视为边来构建关系图。为了强制关系图中的非循环性等一些基本属性，我们在优化过程中添加了额外的约束，将 NAS 转换为寻找最大加权非循环子图（MWAS）的问题。然后，我们的算法会努力消除循环，并且仅在排名结果可信的情况下才在图中建立边缘。通过 MWAS，Arch-Graph 可以有效地对每个任务的候选模型进行排名，只需很少的预算来微调预测器。通过在 TransNAS-Bench-101 上进行的大量实验，我们展示了 Arch-Graph 在众多任务中的可转移性和高样本效率，击败了许多为单任务和多任务搜索设计的 NAS 方法。它能够在仅 50 个模型的预算下在两个搜索空间上平均找到排名前 0.16\% 和 0.29\% 的架构。 本文提出了一种名为Arch-Graph的可转移神经架构搜索方法，通过任务嵌入和图结构预测任务特定的最优架构。 Minbin Huang,Zhijian Huang,Changlin Li,Xin Chen,Hang Xu,Zhenguo Li,Xiaodan Liang cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Lane Lawley,Lenhart Schubert
title: Mining Logical Event Schemas From Pre-Trained Language Models
title_zh: 从预先训练的语言模型中挖掘逻辑事件模式
abstract: We present NESL (the Neuro-Episodic Schema Learner), an event schema learning system that combines large language models, FrameNet parsing, a powerful logical representation of language, and a set of simple behavioral schemas meant to bootstrap the learning process. In lieu of a pre-made corpus of stories, our dataset is a continuous feed of "situation samples" from a pre-trained language model, which are then parsed into FrameNet frames, mapped into simple behavioral schemas, and combined and generalized into complex, hierarchical schemas for a variety of everyday scenarios. We show that careful sampling from the language model can help emphasize stereotypical properties of situations and de-emphasize irrelevant details, and that the resulting schemas specify situations more comprehensively than those learned by other systems.
summary: We present NESL (the Neuro-Episodic Schema Learner), an event schema learning system that combines large language models, FrameNet parsing, a powerful logical representation of language, and a set of simple behavioral schemas meant to bootstrap the learning process. In lieu of a pre-made corpus of stories, our dataset is a continuous feed of "situation samples" from a pre-trained language model, which are then parsed into FrameNet frames, mapped into simple behavioral schemas, and combined and generalized into complex, hierarchical schemas for a variety of everyday scenarios. We show that careful sampling from the language model can help emphasize stereotypical properties of situations and de-emphasize irrelevant details, and that the resulting schemas specify situations more comprehensively than those learned by other systems.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 NESL（神经情景模式学习器），这是一个事件模式学习系统，它结合了大型语言模型、FrameNet 解析、强大的语言逻辑表示以及一组旨在引导学习过程的简单行为模式。我们的数据集不是预先制作的故事语料库，而是来自预先训练的语言模型的“情境样本”的连续馈送，然后将其解析为 FrameNet 框架，映射为简单的行为模式，并组合并概括为各种日常场景的复杂的分层模式。我们表明，从语言模型中仔细采样可以帮助强调情境的刻板属性并淡化不相关的细节，并且所得到的模式比其他系统学习的模式更全面地指定情境。

AI.tldr: 提出NESL系统，从预训练语言模型中挖掘逻辑事件模式，生成复杂情境的分层模式
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖预定义语料库，限制了灵活性和覆盖范围，需利用预训练模型生成情境样本以更全面学习事件模式
AI.method: 结合预训练语言模型生成情境样本，通过FrameNet解析和逻辑表示，映射至简单行为模式并组合成复杂分层模式
AI.result: 采样策略有效突出情境典型属性，生成的模式比现有系统更全面
AI.conclusion: 无需预定义语料库，通过预训练模型自动挖掘情境模式，证明了该方法在生成全面事件模式上的有效性

authors_text: Md. Milon Islam,Sheikh Nooruddin,Fakhri Karray,Ghulam Muhammad
title: Internet of Things Device Capabilities, Architectures, Protocols, and Smart Applications in Healthcare Domain: A Review
title_zh: 医疗保健领域的物联网设备功能、架构、协议和智能应用：回顾
abstract: Nowadays, the Internet has spread to practically every country around the world and is having unprecedented effects on people's lives. The Internet of Things (IoT) is getting more popular and has a high level of interest in both practitioners and academicians in the age of wireless communication due to its diverse applications. The IoT is a technology that enables everyday things to become savvier, everyday computation towards becoming intellectual, and everyday communication to become a little more insightful. In this paper, the most common and popular IoT device capabilities, architectures, and protocols are demonstrated in brief to provide a clear overview of the IoT technology to the researchers in this area. The common IoT device capabilities including hardware (Raspberry Pi, Arduino, and ESP8266) and software (operating systems, and built-in tools) platforms are described in detail. The widely used architectures that have been recently evolved and used are the three-layer architecture, SOA-based architecture, and middleware-based architecture. The popular protocols for IoT are demonstrated which include CoAP, MQTT, XMPP, AMQP, DDS, LoWPAN, BLE, and Zigbee that are frequently utilized to develop smart IoT applications. Additionally, this research provides an in-depth overview of the potential healthcare applications based on IoT technologies in the context of addressing various healthcare concerns. Finally, this paper summarizes state-of-the-art knowledge, highlights open issues and shortcomings, and provides recommendations for further studies which would be quite beneficial to anyone with a desire to work in this field and make breakthroughs to get expertise in this area.
summary: Nowadays, the Internet has spread to practically every country around the world and is having unprecedented effects on people's lives. The popular protocols for IoT are demonstrated which include CoAP, MQTT, XMPP, AMQP, DDS, LoWPAN, BLE, and Zigbee that are frequently utilized to develop smart IoT applications. Additionally, this research provides an in-depth overview of the potential healthcare applications based on IoT technologies in the context of addressing various healthcare concerns. Finally, this paper summarizes state-of-the-art knowledge, highlights open issues and shortcomings, and provides recommendations for further studies which would be quite beneficial to anyone with a desire to work in this field and make breakthroughs to get expertise in this area.
abstract_zh: 如今，互联网几乎已经普及到世界各国，对人们的生活产生了前所未有的影响。物联网（IoT）因其多样化的应用而日益普及，并在无线通信时代引起了从业者和学者的高度兴趣。物联网是一项使日常事物变得更加智能、使日常计算变得更加智能、使日常通信变得更加富有洞察力的技术。本文简要介绍了最常见和流行的物联网设备功能、架构和协议，以便为该领域的研究人员提供物联网技术的清晰概述。详细介绍了常见的物联网设备功能，包括硬件（Raspberry Pi、Arduino 和 ESP8266）和软件（操作系统和内置工具）平台。最近发展和使用的广泛使用的架构是三层架构、基于SOA的架构和基于中间件的架构。演示了常用的 IoT 协议，包括 CoAP、MQTT、XMPP、AMQP、DDS、LoWPAN、BLE 和 Zigbee，这些协议经常用于开发智能 IoT 应用程序。此外，这项研究还深入概述了在解决各种医疗保健问题的背景下基于物联网技术的潜在医疗保健应用。最后，本文总结了最新知识，强调了未解决的问题和缺点，并提供了进一步研究的建议，这对于任何有志于在该领域工作并取得突破以获得该领域专业知识的人来说都是非常有益的。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了物联网（IoT）在医疗健康领域的设备能力、架构、协议及智能应用，旨在为研究人员提供清晰的技术概览。
AI.motivation: 随着物联网技术的普及，其在医疗健康领域的应用潜力巨大，但现有研究缺乏系统性总结，需明确技术框架与挑战以推动进一步研究。
AI.method: 通过文献分析，梳理物联网设备硬件（如Raspberry Pi、Arduino）与软件平台，总结三层架构、SOA架构等主流架构及CoAP、MQTT等协议，并结合医疗健康场景分析其应用。
AI.result: 系统概述了物联网核心技术组件与医疗应用案例，指出现有研究在互操作性、安全性及标准化方面的不足，并提出未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 本文为物联网医疗应用提供了全面的技术参考，强调需解决跨平台兼容性与数据隐私问题，以促进智能医疗系统的发展。

authors_text: Yannic Lops,Masoud Ghahremanloo,Arman Pouyaei,Yunsoo Choi,Jia Jung,Seyedali Mousavinezhad,Ahmed Khan Salman,Davyda Hammond
title: Spatiotemporal Estimation of TROPOMI NO2 Column with Depthwise Partial Convolutional Neural Network
title_zh: 利用深度部分卷积神经网络对 TROPOMI NO2 柱进行时空估计
comment: Keywords: Partial Convolution, Depthwise, TROPOMI, Kriging, Spatiotemporal Imputation, CMAQ. 12 pages & 6 figures
comments: Keywords: Partial Convolution, Depthwise, TROPOMI, Kriging, Spatiotemporal Imputation, CMAQ. 12 pages & 6 figures
abstract: Satellite-derived measurements are negatively impacted by cloud cover and surface reflectivity. These biases must be discarded and significantly increase the amount of missing data within remote sensing images. This paper expands the application of a partial convolutional neural network (PCNN) to incorporate depthwise convolution layers, conferring temporal dimensionality to the imputation process. The addition of a temporal dimension to the imputation process adds a state of successive existence within the dataset which spatial imputation cannot capture. The depthwise convolution process enables the PCNN to independently convolve the data for each channel. The deep learning system is trained with the Community Multiscale Air Quality model-simulated tropospheric column density of Nitrogen Dioxide (TCDNO2) to impute TROPOspheric Monitoring Instrument TCDNO2. The depthwise PCNN model achieves an index of agreement of 0.82 and outperforms the default PCNN models, with and without temporal dimensionality of data, and conventional data imputation methods such as inverse distance weighting by 3-11% and 8-15% in the index of agreement and correlation, respectively. The model demonstrates more consistency in the reconstruction of TROPOspheric Monitoring Instrument tropospheric column density of NO2 images. The model has also demonstrated the accurate imputation of remote sensing images with over 95% of the data missing. PCNN enables the accurate imputation of remote sensing data with large regions of missing data and will benefit future researchers conducting data assimilation for numerical models, emission studies, and human health impact analyses from air pollution.
summary: Satellite-derived measurements are negatively impacted by cloud cover and surface reflectivity. These biases must be discarded and significantly increase the amount of missing data within remote sensing images. This paper expands the application of a partial convolutional neural network (PCNN) to incorporate depthwise convolution layers, conferring temporal dimensionality to the imputation process. The addition of a temporal dimension to the imputation process adds a state of successive existence within the dataset which spatial imputation cannot capture. The depthwise convolution process enables the PCNN to independently convolve the data for each channel. The deep learning system is trained with the Community Multiscale Air Quality model-simulated tropospheric column density of Nitrogen Dioxide (TCDNO2) to impute TROPOspheric Monitoring Instrument TCDNO2. The depthwise PCNN model achieves an index of agreement of 0.82 and outperforms the default PCNN models, with and without temporal dimensionality of data, and conventional data imputation methods such as inverse distance weighting by 3-11% and 8-15% in the index of agreement and correlation, respectively. The model demonstrates more consistency in the reconstruction of TROPOspheric Monitoring Instrument tropospheric column density of NO2 images. The model has also demonstrated the accurate imputation of remote sensing images with over 95% of the data missing. PCNN enables the accurate imputation of remote sensing data with large regions of missing data and will benefit future researchers conducting data assimilation for numerical models, emission studies, and human health impact analyses from air pollution.
abstract_zh: 卫星测量受到云层覆盖和表面反射率的负面影响。这些偏差必须被丢弃，并且会显着增加遥感图像中丢失的数据量。本文扩展了部分卷积神经网络（PCNN）的应用，以合并深度卷积层，为插补过程赋予时间维度。在插补过程中添加时间维度会在数据集中添加空间插补无法捕获的连续存在状态。深度卷积过程使 PCNN 能够独立地对每个通道的数据进行卷积。深度学习系统使用社区多尺度空气质量模型模拟对流层二氧化氮 (TCDNO2) 柱密度进行训练，以估算 TROPOspheric 监测仪器 TCDNO2。深度 PCNN 模型达到了 0.82 的一致性指数，并且在有或没有数据时间维的情况下优于默认 PCNN 模型，以及传统的数据插补方法（例如反距离加权），一致性指数和相关性指数分别高出 3-11% 和 8-15%。该模型显示了对流层监测仪器对流层 NO2 柱密度图像重建的一致性。该模型还展示了对 95% 以上数据缺失的遥感图像的准确插补。 PCNN 能够对大面积缺失数据的遥感数据进行准确插补，并将有利于未来研究人员对空气污染的数值模型、排放研究和人类健康影响分析进行数据同化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结合深度卷积和时间维度的改进型部分卷积神经网络（PCNN），用于填补TROPOMI卫星观测的NO2柱浓度数据中的缺失值。
AI.motivation: 卫星观测数据常因云层覆盖和地表反照率导致大量缺失值，传统插值方法难以有效处理时空相关性问题。
AI.method: 在PCNN中引入深度卷积层并添加时间维度，利用模拟的空气质量模型数据训练网络，实现对NO2柱浓度图像的时空插值。
AI.result: 模型在一致性指数上达到0.82，较传统PCNN和逆距离加权法分别提升3-11%和8-15%，可准确填补95%以上缺失数据的遥感图像。
AI.conclusion: 深度卷积时序PCNN能有效处理高缺失率遥感数据，为数值模型同化、排放研究及健康影响分析提供可靠数据支持。

authors_text: Aniruddh G. Puranic,Jyotirmoy V. Deshmukh,Stefanos Nikolaidis
title: Learning Performance Graphs from Demonstrations via Task-Based Evaluations
title_zh: 通过基于任务的评估从演示中学习性能图
comment: Published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) Vol. 8 Issue 1
comments: Published in IEEE Robotics and Automation Letters (RA-L) Vol. 8 Issue 1
abstract: In the learning from demonstration (LfD) paradigm, understanding and evaluating the demonstrated behaviors plays a critical role in extracting control policies for robots. Without this knowledge, a robot may infer incorrect reward functions that lead to undesirable or unsafe control policies. Recent work has proposed an LfD framework where a user provides a set of formal task specifications to guide LfD, to address the challenge of reward shaping. However, in this framework, specifications are manually ordered in a performance graph (a partial order that specifies relative importance between the specifications). The main contribution of this paper is an algorithm to learn the performance graph directly from the user-provided demonstrations, and show that the reward functions generated using the learned performance graph generate similar policies to those from manually specified performance graphs. We perform a user study that shows that priorities specified by users on behaviors in a simulated highway driving domain match the automatically inferred performance graph. This establishes that we can accurately evaluate user demonstrations with respect to task specifications without expert criteria.
summary: In the learning from demonstration (LfD) paradigm, understanding and evaluating the demonstrated behaviors plays a critical role in extracting control policies for robots. Without this knowledge, a robot may infer incorrect reward functions that lead to undesirable or unsafe control policies. Recent work has proposed an LfD framework where a user provides a set of formal task specifications to guide LfD, to address the challenge of reward shaping. However, in this framework, specifications are manually ordered in a performance graph (a partial order that specifies relative importance between the specifications). The main contribution of this paper is an algorithm to learn the performance graph directly from the user-provided demonstrations, and show that the reward functions generated using the learned performance graph generate similar policies to those from manually specified performance graphs. We perform a user study that shows that priorities specified by users on behaviors in a simulated highway driving domain match the automatically inferred performance graph. This establishes that we can accurately evaluate user demonstrations with respect to task specifications without expert criteria.
abstract_zh: 在示范学习（LfD）范式中，理解和评估示范行为在提取机器人控制策略方面起着至关重要的作用。如果没有这些知识，机器人可能会推断出不正确的奖励函数，从而导致不良或不安全的控制策略。最近的工作提出了一个 LfD 框架，其中用户提供一组正式的任务规范来指导 LfD，以解决奖励塑造的挑战。然而，在此框架中，规范是在性能图中手动排序的（指定规范之间相对重要性的偏序）。本文的主要贡献是一种直接从用户提供的演示中学习性能图的算法，并表明使用学习的性能图生成的奖励函数生成与手动指定的性能图相似的策略。我们进行的用户研究表明，用户在模拟高速公路驾驶域中指定的行为优先级与自动推断的性能图相匹配。这表明我们可以在没有专家标准的情况下根据任务规范准确评估用户演示。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种从用户演示中直接学习性能图的算法，用于生成与手动指定性能图相似的奖励函数，以提升机器人控制策略的准确性。
AI.motivation: 现有学习从示范（LfD）框架需手动定义任务规范的优先级，可能因人工偏差导致奖励函数错误，进而生成不安全策略。需自动化方法减少人工干预并提高评估准确性。
AI.method: 设计算法通过分析用户演示数据，结合任务规范评估，自动推断规范间的相对重要性，构建性能图并生成对应奖励函数。
AI.result: 用户研究显示，模拟高速公路场景中自动推断的性能图与用户指定优先级高度匹配，验证了算法在准确评估演示任务中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的算法能有效学习性能图，生成的奖励函数与手动方法效果相当，无需专家标准即可实现对用户演示的准确评估。

authors_text: Haonan Qiu,Siyu Chen,Bei Gan,Kun Wang,Huafeng Shi,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu
title: Few-shot Forgery Detection via Guided Adversarial Interpolation
title_zh: 通过引导对抗插值进行少量伪造检测
abstract: The increase in face manipulation models has led to a critical issue in society - the synthesis of realistic visual media. With the emergence of new forgery approaches at an unprecedented rate, existing forgery detection methods suffer from significant performance drops when applied to unseen novel forgery approaches. In this work, we address the few-shot forgery detection problem by 1) designing a comprehensive benchmark based on coverage analysis among various forgery approaches, and 2) proposing Guided Adversarial Interpolation (GAI). Our key insight is that there exist transferable distribution characteristics between majority and minority forgery classes1. Specifically, we enhance the discriminative ability against novel forgery approaches via adversarially interpolating the forgery artifacts of the minority samples to the majority samples under the guidance of a teacher network. Unlike the standard re-balancing method which usually results in over-fitting to minority classes, our method simultaneously takes account of the diversity of majority information as well as the significance of minority information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our GAI achieves state-of-the-art performances on the established few-shot forgery detection benchmark. Notably, our method is also validated to be robust to choices of majority and minority forgery approaches. The formal publication version is available in Pattern Recognition.
summary: The increase in face manipulation models has led to a critical issue in society - the synthesis of realistic visual media. With the emergence of new forgery approaches at an unprecedented rate, existing forgery detection methods suffer from significant performance drops when applied to unseen novel forgery approaches. In this work, we address the few-shot forgery detection problem by 1) designing a comprehensive benchmark based on coverage analysis among various forgery approaches, and 2) proposing Guided Adversarial Interpolation (GAI). Our key insight is that there exist transferable distribution characteristics between majority and minority forgery classes1. Specifically, we enhance the discriminative ability against novel forgery approaches via adversarially interpolating the forgery artifacts of the minority samples to the majority samples under the guidance of a teacher network. Unlike the standard re-balancing method which usually results in over-fitting to minority classes, our method simultaneously takes account of the diversity of majority information as well as the significance of minority information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our GAI achieves state-of-the-art performances on the established few-shot forgery detection benchmark. Notably, our method is also validated to be robust to choices of majority and minority forgery approaches. The formal publication version is available in Pattern Recognition.
abstract_zh: 面部操纵模型的增加导致了社会上的一个关键问题——现实视觉媒体的合成。随着新的伪造方法以前所未有的速度出现，现有的伪造检测方法在应用于看不见的新型伪造方法时，性能会显着下降。在这项工作中，我们通过 1）设计基于各种伪造方法之间的覆盖率分析的综合基准，以及 2）提出引导对抗插值（GAI）来解决少样本伪造检测问题。我们的主要见解是，多数伪造类别和少数伪造类别之间存在可转移的分布特征1。具体来说，我们通过在教师网络的指导下将少数样本的伪造伪影对抗性地插入到多数样本中来增强对新颖伪造方法的判别能力。与通常导致少数类别过度拟合的标准重新平衡方法不同，我们的方法同时考虑了多数信息的多样性以及少数信息的重要性。大量实验表明，我们的 GAI 在已建立的少样本伪造检测基准上实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，我们的方法还经过验证，对于多数和少数伪造方法的选择都是稳健的。正式发布版本可在 Pattern Recognition 中找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于引导对抗插值（GAI）的少样本伪造检测方法，以应对新型伪造技术带来的检测性能下降问题。
AI.motivation: 现有伪造检测方法在面对未见过的新型伪造技术时性能显著下降，亟需一种能够有效利用已有知识检测新型伪造的方法。
AI.method: 通过设计覆盖性基准并提出GAI方法，利用教师网络引导对抗插值技术，将少数类伪造样本的伪影插值到多数类样本中，增强模型对新型伪造的判别能力。
AI.result: 在少样本伪造检测基准测试中达到最先进性能，且方法对多数类和少数类伪造技术的选择具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: GAI方法通过挖掘类间可转移分布特征，在少样本场景下实现了高效且鲁棒的伪造检测，为应对新型伪造技术提供了新思路。

search_text: Few-shot Forgery Detection via Guided Adversarial Interpolation 通过引导对抗插值进行少量伪造检测 The increase in face manipulation models has led to a critical issue in society - the synthesis of realistic visual media. With the emergence of new forgery approaches at an unprecedented rate, existing forgery detection methods suffer from significant performance drops when applied to unseen novel forgery approaches. In this work, we address the few-shot forgery detection problem by 1) designing a comprehensive benchmark based on coverage analysis among various forgery approaches, and 2) proposing Guided Adversarial Interpolation (GAI). Our key insight is that there exist transferable distribution characteristics between majority and minority forgery classes1. Specifically, we enhance the discriminative ability against novel forgery approaches via adversarially interpolating the forgery artifacts of the minority samples to the majority samples under the guidance of a teacher network. Unlike the standard re-balancing method which usually results in over-fitting to minority classes, our method simultaneously takes account of the diversity of majority information as well as the significance of minority information. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our GAI achieves state-of-the-art performances on the established few-shot forgery detection benchmark. Notably, our method is also validated to be robust to choices of majority and minority forgery approaches. The formal publication version is available in Pattern Recognition. 面部操纵模型的增加导致了社会上的一个关键问题——现实视觉媒体的合成。随着新的伪造方法以前所未有的速度出现，现有的伪造检测方法在应用于看不见的新型伪造方法时，性能会显着下降。在这项工作中，我们通过 1）设计基于各种伪造方法之间的覆盖率分析的综合基准，以及 2）提出引导对抗插值（GAI）来解决少样本伪造检测问题。我们的主要见解是，多数伪造类别和少数伪造类别之间存在可转移的分布特征1。具体来说，我们通过在教师网络的指导下将少数样本的伪造伪影对抗性地插入到多数样本中来增强对新颖伪造方法的判别能力。与通常导致少数类别过度拟合的标准重新平衡方法不同，我们的方法同时考虑了多数信息的多样性以及少数信息的重要性。大量实验表明，我们的 GAI 在已建立的少样本伪造检测基准上实现了最先进的性能。值得注意的是，我们的方法还经过验证，对于多数和少数伪造方法的选择都是稳健的。正式发布版本可在 Pattern Recognition 中找到。 本文提出了一种基于引导对抗插值（GAI）的少样本伪造检测方法，以应对新型伪造技术带来的检测性能下降问题。 Haonan Qiu,Siyu Chen,Bei Gan,Kun Wang,Huafeng Shi,Jing Shao,Ziwei Liu cs.CV

authors_text: Lei Qi,Jiaying Shen,Jiaqi Liu,Yinghuan Shi,Xin Geng
title: Label Distribution Learning for Generalizable Multi-source Person Re-identification
title_zh: 用于泛化多源行人重新识别的标签分布学习
comment: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.09846
comments: Accepted by IEEE Transactions on Information Forensics and Security (TIFS). arXiv admin note: text overlap with arXiv:2201.09846
abstract: Person re-identification (Re-ID) is a critical technique in the video surveillance system, which has achieved significant success in the supervised setting. However, it is difficult to directly apply the supervised model to arbitrary unseen domains due to the domain gap between the available source domains and unseen target domains. In this paper, we propose a novel label distribution learning (LDL) method to address the generalizable multi-source person Re-ID task (i.e., there are multiple available source domains, and the testing domain is unseen during training), which aims to explore the relation of different classes and mitigate the domain-shift across different domains so as to improve the discrimination of the model and learn the domain-invariant feature, simultaneously. Specifically, during the training process, we produce the label distribution via the online manner to mine the relation information of different classes, thus it is beneficial for extracting the discriminative feature. Besides, for the label distribution of each class, we further revise it to give more and equal attention to the other domains that the class does not belong to, which can effectively reduce the domain gap across different domains and obtain the domain-invariant feature. Furthermore, we also give the theoretical analysis to demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively deal with the domain-shift issue. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets validate the effectiveness of the proposed method and show that the proposed method can outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Besides, further analysis also reveals the superiority of the proposed method.
summary: Person re-identification (Re-ID) is a critical technique in the video surveillance system, which has achieved significant success in the supervised setting. However, it is difficult to directly apply the supervised model to arbitrary unseen domains due to the domain gap between the available source domains and unseen target domains. In this paper, we propose a novel label distribution learning (LDL) method to address the generalizable multi-source person Re-ID task (i.e., there are multiple available source domains, and the testing domain is unseen during training), which aims to explore the relation of different classes and mitigate the domain-shift across different domains so as to improve the discrimination of the model and learn the domain-invariant feature, simultaneously. Specifically, during the training process, we produce the label distribution via the online manner to mine the relation information of different classes, thus it is beneficial for extracting the discriminative feature. Besides, for the label distribution of each class, we further revise it to give more and equal attention to the other domains that the class does not belong to, which can effectively reduce the domain gap across different domains and obtain the domain-invariant feature. Furthermore, we also give the theoretical analysis to demonstrate that the proposed method can effectively deal with the domain-shift issue. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmark datasets validate the effectiveness of the proposed method and show that the proposed method can outperform the state-of-the-art methods. Besides, further analysis also reveals the superiority of the proposed method.
abstract_zh: 人员重新识别（Re-ID）是视频监控系统中的一项关键技术，在监督环境中取得了显着的成功。然而，由于可用源域和不可见目标域之间的域差距，很难将监督模型直接应用于任意不可见域。在本文中，我们提出了一种新的标签分布学习（LDL）方法来解决可泛化的多源行人重新识别任务（即有多个可用源域，并且在训练过程中看不到测试域），其目的是探索不同类的关系并减轻不同域之间的域转移，从而提高模型的辨别力并同时学习域不变特征。具体来说，在训练过程中，我们通过在线方式产生标签分布，以挖掘不同类别的关系信息，从而有利于提取判别性特征。此外，对于每个类的标签分布，我们进一步修改它以给予该类不属于的其他域更多且平等的关注，这可以有效地减少不同域之间的域差距并获得域不变特征。此外，我们还给出了理论分析，证明所提出的方法可以有效地处理域转移问题。对多个基准数据集的大量实验验证了所提出方法的有效性，并表明所提出的方法可以优于最先进的方法。此外，进一步的分析也揭示了该方法的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种标签分布学习（LDL）方法，用于解决多源域下具有可迁移性的行人重识别（Re-ID）问题，旨在缩小不同域间的差异并提升模型的判别能力。
AI.motivation: 现有监督模型难以直接应用于未见过的域，因源域与目标域间的领域差异（domain gap）导致性能下降，需探索跨域不变特征以提升模型泛化能力。
AI.method: 通过在线生成标签分布挖掘类间关系，并调整标签分布以平衡不同域的注意力，从而减少领域差异并学习领域不变特征。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上的实验表明，该方法优于现有最先进方法，且理论分析验证了其对领域偏移问题的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的LDL方法有效缓解了多源域行人Re-ID中的领域差异问题，显著提升了模型的跨域泛化能力。

authors_text: Seongmin Lee,Zijie J. Wang,Judy Hoffman,Duen Horng Chau
title: VisCUIT: Visual Auditor for Bias in CNN Image Classifier
title_zh: VisCUIT：CNN 图像分类器中偏差的视觉审核器
abstract: CNN image classifiers are widely used, thanks to their efficiency and accuracy. However, they can suffer from biases that impede their practical applications. Most existing bias investigation techniques are either inapplicable to general image classification tasks or require significant user efforts in perusing all data subgroups to manually specify which data attributes to inspect. We present VisCUIT, an interactive visualization system that reveals how and why a CNN classifier is biased. VisCUIT visually summarizes the subgroups on which the classifier underperforms and helps users discover and characterize the cause of the underperformances by revealing image concepts responsible for activating neurons that contribute to misclassifications. VisCUIT runs in modern browsers and is open-source, allowing people to easily access and extend the tool to other model architectures and datasets. VisCUIT is available at the following public demo link: https://poloclub.github.io/VisCUIT. A video demo is available at https://youtu.be/eNDbSyM4R_4.
summary: CNN image classifiers are widely used, thanks to their efficiency and accuracy. However, they can suffer from biases that impede their practical applications. Most existing bias investigation techniques are either inapplicable to general image classification tasks or require significant user efforts in perusing all data subgroups to manually specify which data attributes to inspect. We present VisCUIT, an interactive visualization system that reveals how and why a CNN classifier is biased. VisCUIT visually summarizes the subgroups on which the classifier underperforms and helps users discover and characterize the cause of the underperformances by revealing image concepts responsible for activating neurons that contribute to misclassifications. VisCUIT runs in modern browsers and is open-source, allowing people to easily access and extend the tool to other model architectures and datasets. VisCUIT is available at the following public demo link: https://poloclub.github.io/VisCUIT. A video demo is available at https://youtu.be/eNDbSyM4R_4.
abstract_zh: CNN 图像分类器因其效率和准确性而被广泛使用。然而，它们可能会受到阻碍其实际应用的偏见的影响。大多数现有的偏差调查技术要么不适用于一般图像分类任务，要么需要用户付出大量努力来仔细研究所有数据子组以手动指定要检查的数据属性。我们推出了 VisCUIT，这是一个交互式可视化系统，可以揭示 CNN 分类器如何以及为何存在偏差。 VisCUIT 直观地总结了分类器表现不佳的子组，并通过揭示负责激活导致错误分类的神经元的图像概念，帮助用户发现和描述表现不佳的原因。 VisCUIT 在现代浏览器中运行并且是开源的，允许人们轻松访问该工具并将其扩展到其他模型架构和数据集。 VisCUIT 可通过以下公共演示链接获取：https://poloclub.github.io/VisCUIT。视频演示位于 https://youtu.be/eNDbSyM4R_4。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VisCUIT，一种用于检测和分析CNN图像分类器中偏见的可视化工具。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以适用于通用图像分类任务，或需用户手动检查所有数据子群以发现偏见，效率低下。
AI.method: 通过交互式可视化技术，VisCUIT自动总结分类器表现不佳的子群，并揭示导致误分类的神经元激活概念。
AI.result: VisCUIT作为开源工具可在浏览器运行，提供公开演示和视频，支持扩展至其他模型和数据集。

search_text: VisCUIT: Visual Auditor for Bias in CNN Image Classifier VisCUIT：CNN 图像分类器中偏差的视觉审核器 CNN image classifiers are widely used, thanks to their efficiency and accuracy. However, they can suffer from biases that impede their practical applications. Most existing bias investigation techniques are either inapplicable to general image classification tasks or require significant user efforts in perusing all data subgroups to manually specify which data attributes to inspect. We present VisCUIT, an interactive visualization system that reveals how and why a CNN classifier is biased. VisCUIT visually summarizes the subgroups on which the classifier underperforms and helps users discover and characterize the cause of the underperformances by revealing image concepts responsible for activating neurons that contribute to misclassifications. VisCUIT runs in modern browsers and is open-source, allowing people to easily access and extend the tool to other model architectures and datasets. VisCUIT is available at the following public demo link: https://poloclub.github.io/VisCUIT. A video demo is available at https://youtu.be/eNDbSyM4R_4. CNN 图像分类器因其效率和准确性而被广泛使用。然而，它们可能会受到阻碍其实际应用的偏见的影响。大多数现有的偏差调查技术要么不适用于一般图像分类任务，要么需要用户付出大量努力来仔细研究所有数据子组以手动指定要检查的数据属性。我们推出了 VisCUIT，这是一个交互式可视化系统，可以揭示 CNN 分类器如何以及为何存在偏差。 VisCUIT 直观地总结了分类器表现不佳的子组，并通过揭示负责激活导致错误分类的神经元的图像概念，帮助用户发现和描述表现不佳的原因。 VisCUIT 在现代浏览器中运行并且是开源的，允许人们轻松访问该工具并将其扩展到其他模型架构和数据集。 VisCUIT 可通过以下公共演示链接获取：https://poloclub.github.io/VisCUIT。视频演示位于 https://youtu.be/eNDbSyM4R_4。 本文提出VisCUIT，一种用于检测和分析CNN图像分类器中偏见的可视化工具。 Seongmin Lee,Zijie J. Wang,Judy Hoffman,Duen Horng Chau cs.CV,cs.HC,cs.LG

authors_text: Wenxuan Zhou,Steven Bohez,Jan Humplik,Abbas Abdolmaleki,Dushyant Rao,Markus Wulfmeier,Tuomas Haarnoja,Nicolas Heess
title: Forgetting and Imbalance in Robot Lifelong Learning with Off-policy Data
title_zh: 离策略数据的机器人终身学习中的遗忘和不平衡
comment: Published at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents, 2022
comments: Published at 1st Conference on Lifelong Learning Agents, 2022
abstract: Robots will experience non-stationary environment dynamics throughout their lifetime: the robot dynamics can change due to wear and tear, or its surroundings may change over time. Eventually, the robots should perform well in all of the environment variations it has encountered. At the same time, it should still be able to learn fast in a new environment. We identify two challenges in Reinforcement Learning (RL) under such a lifelong learning setting with off-policy data: first, existing off-policy algorithms struggle with the trade-off between being conservative to maintain good performance in the old environment and learning efficiently in the new environment, despite keeping all the data in the replay buffer. We propose the Offline Distillation Pipeline to break this trade-off by separating the training procedure into an online interaction phase and an offline distillation phase.Second, we find that training with the imbalanced off-policy data from multiple environments across the lifetime creates a significant performance drop. We identify that this performance drop is caused by the combination of the imbalanced quality and size among the datasets which exacerbate the extrapolation error of the Q-function. During the distillation phase, we apply a simple fix to the issue by keeping the policy closer to the behavior policy that generated the data. In the experiments, we demonstrate these two challenges and the proposed solutions with a simulated bipedal robot walk-ing task across various environment changes. We show that the Offline Distillation Pipeline achieves better performance across all the encountered environments without affecting data collection. We also provide a comprehensive empirical study to support our hypothesis on the data imbalance issue.

Eventually, the robots should perform well in all of the environment variations it has encountered. At the same time, it should still be able to learn fast in a new environment. We identify two challenges in Reinforcement Learning (RL) under such a lifelong learning setting with off-policy data: first, existing off-policy algorithms struggle with the trade-off between being conservative to maintain good performance in the old environment and learning efficiently in the new environment, despite keeping all the data in the replay buffer. We propose the Offline Distillation Pipeline to break this trade-off by separating the training procedure into an online interaction phase and an offline distillation phase.Second, we find that training with the imbalanced off-policy data from multiple environments across the lifetime creates a significant performance drop. We identify that this performance drop is caused by the combination of the imbalanced quality and size among the datasets which exacerbate the extrapolation error of the Q-function. During the distillation phase, we apply a simple fix to the issue by keeping the policy closer to the behavior policy that generated the data. In the experiments, we demonstrate these two challenges and the proposed solutions with a simulated bipedal robot walk-ing task across various environment changes. We show that the Offline Distillation Pipeline achieves better performance across all the encountered environments without affecting data collection. We also provide a comprehensive empirical study to support our hypothesis on the data imbalance issue.
abstract_zh: 机器人在其整个生命周期中都会经历非静态环境动态：机器人动态可能会因磨损而发生变化，或者其周围环境可能会随着时间的推移而发生变化。最终，机器人应该能够在遇到的所有环境变化中表现良好。同时，它仍然应该能够在新的环境中快速学习。我们发现，在这种使用离策略数据的终身学习环境下，强化学习（RL）面临着两个挑战：首先，现有的离策略算法在旧环境中保持良好性能的保守算法和新环境中高效学习之间的权衡（尽管将所有数据保留在重放缓冲区中）作斗争。我们提出离线蒸馏管道，通过将训练过程分为在线交互阶段和离线蒸馏阶段来打破这种权衡。其次，我们发现使用来自整个生命周期的多个环境的不平衡离策略数据进行训练会导致性能显着下降。我们发现这种性能下降是由数据集之间的质量和大小不平衡造成的，这加剧了 Q 函数的外推误差。在蒸馏阶段，我们通过使策略更接近生成数据的行为策略来对问题进行简单的修复。在实验中，我们通过模拟双足机器人在各种环境变化下的行走任务来演示这两个挑战和提出的解决方案。我们表明，离线蒸馏管道在所有遇到的环境中都能实现更好的性能，而不影响数据收集。我们还提供了全面的实证研究来支持我们关于数据不平衡问题的假设。

AI.tldr: 本文研究机器人终身学习中使用离线数据时面临的遗忘与数据不平衡问题，并提出解决方案。
AI.motivation: 机器人需适应环境变化并保持长期性能，但现有离线强化学习方法在应对环境动态变化和数据不平衡时存在显著挑战。
AI.method: 提出离线蒸馏流水线，将训练分为在线交互与离线蒸馏阶段，并通过约束策略接近数据生成策略来缓解数据不平衡问题。
AI.result: 在模拟双足机器人任务中，该方法在多种环境变化下均取得更优性能，且不影响数据收集效率。
AI.conclusion: 通过分离训练阶段和调整策略逼近方式，有效解决了终身学习中的遗忘与数据不平衡问题，并通过实验证实了方法的有效性。

authors_text: Florian Mahlknecht,Daniel Gehrig,Jeremy Nash,Friedrich M. Rockenbauer,Benjamin Morrell,Jeff Delaune,Davide Scaramuzza
title: Exploring Event Camera-based Odometry for Planetary Robots
title_zh: 探索行星机器人基于事件相机的里程计
abstract: Due to their resilience to motion blur and high robustness in low-light and high dynamic range conditions, event cameras are poised to become enabling sensors for vision-based exploration on future Mars helicopter missions. However, existing event-based visual-inertial odometry (VIO) algorithms either suffer from high tracking errors or are brittle, since they cannot cope with significant depth uncertainties caused by an unforeseen loss of tracking or other effects. In this work, we introduce EKLT-VIO, which addresses both limitations by combining a state-of-the-art event-based frontend with a filter-based backend. This makes it both accurate and robust to uncertainties, outperforming event- and frame-based VIO algorithms on challenging benchmarks by 32%. In addition, we demonstrate accurate performance in hover-like conditions (outperforming existing event-based methods) as well as high robustness in newly collected Mars-like and high-dynamic-range sequences, where existing frame-based methods fail. In doing so, we show that event-based VIO is the way forward for vision-based exploration on Mars.
summary: Due to their resilience to motion blur and high robustness in low-light and high dynamic range conditions, event cameras are poised to become enabling sensors for vision-based exploration on future Mars helicopter missions. However, existing event-based visual-inertial odometry (VIO) algorithms either suffer from high tracking errors or are brittle, since they cannot cope with significant depth uncertainties caused by an unforeseen loss of tracking or other effects. In this work, we introduce EKLT-VIO, which addresses both limitations by combining a state-of-the-art event-based frontend with a filter-based backend. This makes it both accurate and robust to uncertainties, outperforming event- and frame-based VIO algorithms on challenging benchmarks by 32%. In addition, we demonstrate accurate performance in hover-like conditions (outperforming existing event-based methods) as well as high robustness in newly collected Mars-like and high-dynamic-range sequences, where existing frame-based methods fail. In doing so, we show that event-based VIO is the way forward for vision-based exploration on Mars.
abstract_zh: 由于其对运动模糊的适应能力以及在低光和高动态范围条件下的高鲁棒性，事件相机有望成为未来火星直升机任务中基于视觉的探索的传感器。然而，现有的基于事件的视觉惯性里程计（VIO）算法要么存在高跟踪误差，要么很脆弱，因为它们无法应对由不可预见的跟踪丢失或其他影响引起的显着深度不确定性。在这项工作中，我们引入了 EKLT-VIO，它通过将最先进的基于事件的前端与基于过滤器的后端相结合来解决这两个限制。这使得它既准确又对不确定性具有鲁棒性，在具有挑战性的基准测试中比基于事件和帧的 VIO 算法高出 32%。此外，我们展示了在类悬停条件下的准确性能（优于现有的基于事件的方法），以及在新收集的类火星和高动态范围序列中的高鲁棒性，而现有的基于帧的方法在这些序列中失败了。在此过程中，我们表明基于事件的 VIO 是基于视觉的火星探索的前进方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究事件相机在行星机器人里程计中的应用，提出了一种新的事件视觉惯性里程计方法EKLT-VIO。
AI.motivation: 现有事件相机里程计算法在深度不确定性场景下存在高跟踪误差或鲁棒性不足的问题，而事件相机在低光和高动态范围环境中的优势尚未被充分挖掘。
AI.method: 结合先进的事件相机前端与基于滤波的后端，构建EKLT-VIO算法框架以提升定位精度和鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在挑战性基准测试中性能提升32%，在类似火星环境和高动态场景中均优于传统帧式方法。
AI.conclusion: 事件相机里程计技术是未来火星等极端环境视觉探测任务的关键解决方案。

motivation: 现有事件相机里程计算法在深度不确定性场景下存在高跟踪误差或鲁棒性不足的问题，而事件相机在低光和高动态范围环境中的优势尚未被充分挖掘。
method: 结合先进的事件相机前端与基于滤波的后端，构建EKLT-VIO算法框架以提升定位精度和鲁棒性。
result: 在挑战性基准测试中性能提升32%，在类似火星环境和高动态场景中均优于传统帧式方法。
conclusion: 事件相机里程计技术是未来火星等极端环境视觉探测任务的关键解决方案。
search_text: Exploring Event Camera-based Odometry for Planetary Robots 探索行星机器人基于事件相机的里程计 Due to their resilience to motion blur and high robustness in low-light and high dynamic range conditions, event cameras are poised to become enabling sensors for vision-based exploration on future Mars helicopter missions. However, existing event-based visual-inertial odometry (VIO) algorithms either suffer from high tracking errors or are brittle, since they cannot cope with significant depth uncertainties caused by an unforeseen loss of tracking or other effects. In this work, we introduce EKLT-VIO, which addresses both limitations by combining a state-of-the-art event-based frontend with a filter-based backend. This makes it both accurate and robust to uncertainties, outperforming event- and frame-based VIO algorithms on challenging benchmarks by 32%. In addition, we demonstrate accurate performance in hover-like conditions (outperforming existing event-based methods) as well as high robustness in newly collected Mars-like and high-dynamic-range sequences, where existing frame-based methods fail. In doing so, we show that event-based VIO is the way forward for vision-based exploration on Mars. 由于其对运动模糊的适应能力以及在低光和高动态范围条件下的高鲁棒性，事件相机有望成为未来火星直升机任务中基于视觉的探索的传感器。然而，现有的基于事件的视觉惯性里程计（VIO）算法要么存在高跟踪误差，要么很脆弱，因为它们无法应对由不可预见的跟踪丢失或其他影响引起的显着深度不确定性。在这项工作中，我们引入了 EKLT-VIO，它通过将最先进的基于事件的前端与基于过滤器的后端相结合来解决这两个限制。这使得它既准确又对不确定性具有鲁棒性，在具有挑战性的基准测试中比基于事件和帧的 VIO 算法高出 32%。此外，我们展示了在类悬停条件下的准确性能（优于现有的基于事件的方法），以及在新收集的类火星和高动态范围序列中的高鲁棒性，而现有的基于帧的方法在这些序列中失败了。在此过程中，我们表明基于事件的 VIO 是基于视觉的火星探索的前进方向。 本文研究事件相机在行星机器人里程计中的应用，提出了一种新的事件视觉惯性里程计方法EKLT-VIO。 Florian Mahlknecht,Daniel Gehrig,Jeremy Nash,Friedrich M. Rockenbauer,Benjamin Morrell,Jeff Delaune,Davide Scaramuzza cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Václav Rozhoň,Christoph Grunau,Bernhard Haeupler,Goran Zuzic,Jason Li
title: Undirected $(1+\varepsilon)$-Shortest Paths via Minor-Aggregates: Near-Optimal Deterministic Parallel & Distributed Algorithms
title_zh: 无向$(1+\varepsilon)$-通过次聚合的最短路径：近乎最优的确定性并行和分布式算法
abstract: This paper presents near-optimal deterministic parallel and distributed algorithms for computing $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximate single-source shortest paths in any undirected weighted graph. On a high level, we deterministically reduce this and other shortest-path problems to $\tilde{O}(1)$ Minor-Aggregations. A Minor-Aggregation computes an aggregate (e.g., max or sum) of node-values for every connected component of some subgraph. Our reduction immediately implies: Optimal deterministic parallel (PRAM) algorithms with $\tilde{O}(1)$ depth and near-linear work. Universally-optimal deterministic distributed (CONGEST) algorithms, whenever deterministic Minor-Aggregate algorithms exist. For example, an optimal $\tilde{O}(HopDiameter(G))$-round deterministic CONGEST algorithm for excluded-minor networks. Several novel tools developed for the above results are interesting in their own right: A local iterative approach for reducing shortest path computations "up to distance $D$" to computing low-diameter decompositions "up to distance $\frac{D}{2}$". Compared to the recursive vertex-reduction approach of [Li20], our approach is simpler, suitable for distributed algorithms, and eliminates many derandomization barriers. A simple graph-based $\tilde{O}(1)$-competitive $\ell_1$-oblivious routing based on low-diameter decompositions that can be evaluated in near-linear work. The previous such routing [ZGY+20] was $n^{o(1)}$-competitive and required $n^{o(1)}$ more work. A deterministic algorithm to round any fractional single-source transshipment flow into an integral tree solution. The first distributed algorithms for computing Eulerian orientations.
summary: This paper presents near-optimal deterministic parallel and distributed algorithms for computing $(1+\varepsilon)$-approximate single-source shortest paths in any undirected weighted graph. On a high level, we deterministically reduce this and other shortest-path problems to $\tilde{O}(1)$ Minor-Aggregations. A Minor-Aggregation computes an aggregate (e.g., max or sum) of node-values for every connected component of some subgraph. Our reduction immediately implies: Optimal deterministic parallel (PRAM) algorithms with $\tilde{O}(1)$ depth and near-linear work. Universally-optimal deterministic distributed (CONGEST) algorithms, whenever deterministic Minor-Aggregate algorithms exist. For example, an optimal $\tilde{O}(HopDiameter(G))$-round deterministic CONGEST algorithm for excluded-minor networks. Several novel tools developed for the above results are interesting in their own right: A local iterative approach for reducing shortest path computations "up to distance $D$" to computing low-diameter decompositions "up to distance $\frac{D}{2}$". Compared to the recursive vertex-reduction approach of [Li20], our approach is simpler, suitable for distributed algorithms, and eliminates many derandomization barriers. A simple graph-based $\tilde{O}(1)$-competitive $\ell_1$-oblivious routing based on low-diameter decompositions that can be evaluated in near-linear work. The previous such routing [ZGY+20] was $n^{o(1)}$-competitive and required $n^{o(1)}$ more work. A deterministic algorithm to round any fractional single-source transshipment flow into an integral tree solution. The first distributed algorithms for computing Eulerian orientations.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了近乎最优的确定性并行和分布式算法，用于计算任何无向加权图中的 $(1+\varepsilon)$ 近似单源最短路径。在较高的层面上，我们确定性地将这个问题和其他最短路径问题减少到 $\tilde{O}(1)$ 小聚合。次聚合计算某个子图的每个连接组件的节点值的聚合（例如，最大值或总和）。我们的简化立即意味着：具有 $\tilde{O}(1)$ 深度和近线性工作的最佳确定性并行 (PRAM) 算法。只要存在确定性次聚合算法，就采用通用最优确定性分布式 (CONGEST) 算法。例如，用于排除次要网络的最优 $\tilde{O}(HopDiameter(G))$ 轮确定性 CONGEST 算法。针对上述结果开发的几种新颖工具本身就很有趣：一种局部迭代方法，用于将“直到距离 $D$”的最短路径计算减少到计算“直到距离 $\frac{D}{2}$”的低直径分解。与[Li20]的递归顶点缩减方法相比，我们的方法更简单，适合分布式算法，并消除了许多去随机化障碍。一个简单的基于图的 $\tilde{O}(1)$-竞争性 $\ell_1$-oblivious 路由，基于低直径分解，可以在近线性工作中进行评估。以前的此类路由 [ZGY+20] 具有 $n^{o(1)}$ 竞争性，并且需要 $n^{o(1)}$ 更多工作。一种确定性算法，可将任何部分单源转运流舍入为完整的树解决方案。第一个用于计算欧拉方向的分布式算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种近似最优的确定性并行和分布式算法，用于计算任意无向加权图中的(1+ε)近似单源最短路径问题。
AI.motivation: 传统最短路径算法在并行和分布式环境中存在效率瓶颈，且随机化方法可能带来不可预测性，需开发确定性高效方案。
AI.method: 通过将最短路径问题归约到少量Minor-Aggregation操作，结合局部迭代方法、低直径分解及流体积分技术实现算法优化。
AI.result: 获得PRAM模型下近线性工作量的最优并行算法，以及CONGEST模型中适用于排除小图网络的最优分布式算法，并提出多项新型工具。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为确定性并行/分布式最短路径计算提供了理论突破，其技术框架对其他图问题具有普适性价值。
