authors_text: Karl Schmeckpeper,Philip R. Osteen,Yufu Wang,Georgios Pavlakos,Kenneth Chaney,Wyatt Jordan,Xiaowei Zhou,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Kostas Daniilidis
title: Semantic keypoint-based pose estimation from single RGB frames
title_zh: 基于单个 RGB 帧的基于语义关键点的姿态估计
comment: https://sites.google.com/view/rcta-object-keypoints-dataset/home. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1703.04670
comments: https://sites.google.com/view/rcta-object-keypoints-dataset/home. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:1703.04670
abstract: This paper presents an approach to estimating the continuous 6-DoF pose of an object from a single RGB image. The approach combines semantic keypoints predicted by a convolutional network (convnet) with a deformable shape model. Unlike prior investigators, we are agnostic to whether the object is textured or textureless, as the convnet learns the optimal representation from the available training-image data. Furthermore, the approach can be applied to instance- and class-based pose recovery. Additionally, we accompany our main pipeline with a technique for semi-automatic data generation from unlabeled videos. This procedure allows us to train the learnable components of our method with minimal manual intervention in the labeling process. Empirically, we show that our approach can accurately recover the 6-DoF object pose for both instance- and class-based scenarios even against a cluttered background. We apply our approach both to several, existing, large-scale datasets - including PASCAL3D+, LineMOD-Occluded, YCB-Video, and TUD-Light - and, using our labeling pipeline, to a new dataset with novel object classes that we introduce here. Extensive empirical evaluations show that our approach is able to provide pose estimation results comparable to the state of the art.
summary: This paper presents an approach to estimating the continuous 6-DoF pose of an object from a single RGB image. The approach combines semantic keypoints predicted by a convolutional network (convnet) with a deformable shape model. Unlike prior investigators, we are agnostic to whether the object is textured or textureless, as the convnet learns the optimal representation from the available training-image data. Furthermore, the approach can be applied to instance- and class-based pose recovery. Additionally, we accompany our main pipeline with a technique for semi-automatic data generation from unlabeled videos. This procedure allows us to train the learnable components of our method with minimal manual intervention in the labeling process. Empirically, we show that our approach can accurately recover the 6-DoF object pose for both instance- and class-based scenarios even against a cluttered background. We apply our approach both to several, existing, large-scale datasets - including PASCAL3D+, LineMOD-Occluded, YCB-Video, and TUD-Light - and, using our labeling pipeline, to a new dataset with novel object classes that we introduce here. Extensive empirical evaluations show that our approach is able to provide pose estimation results comparable to the state of the art.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种从单个 RGB 图像估计物体连续 6-DoF 位姿的方法。该方法将卷积网络（Convnet）预测的语义关键点与可变形形状模型相结合。与之前的研究人员不同，我们不知道物体是有纹理的还是无纹理的，因为卷积网络从可用的训练图像数据中学习最佳表示。此外，该方法可以应用于基于实例和基于类的姿势恢复。此外，我们还为我们的主管道提供了一种从未标记视频中半自动生成数据的技术。这个过程使我们能够在标签过程中以最少的人工干预来训练我们方法的可学习组件。根据经验，我们表明，即使在杂乱的背景下，我们的方法也可以准确地恢复基于实例和基于类的场景的 6-DoF 对象姿势。我们将我们的方法应用于多个现有的大型数据集（包括 PASCAL3D+、LineMOD-Occlusion、YCB-Video 和 TUD-Light），并使用我们的标签管道应用于我们在此介绍的具有新颖对象类的新数据集。广泛的实证评估表明，我们的方法能够提供与现有技术相当的姿态估计结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于语义关键点的单目RGB图像6自由度物体姿态估计方法。
AI.motivation: 传统方法对物体纹理敏感且难以处理无纹理或复杂背景场景，需开发一种无需人工标注且适用于实例与类别级姿态恢复的通用方案。
AI.method: 结合卷积网络预测的语义关键点与可变形形状模型，通过半自动标注技术从无标签视频生成训练数据，实现对纹理无关的鲁棒姿态估计。
AI.result: 在PASCAL3D+、LineMOD-Occluded等数据集及新构建的数据集上验证，姿态估计精度达到现有最佳水平，且能有效处理杂乱背景场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过融合语义关键点与形状模型，在无需人工干预的情况下实现了跨类别和实例的高精度姿态估计，为复杂场景下的视觉任务提供了新思路。

result: 在PASCAL3D+、LineMOD-Occluded等数据集及新构建的数据集上验证，姿态估计精度达到现有最佳水平，且能有效处理杂乱背景场景。
conclusion: 该方法通过融合语义关键点与形状模型，在无需人工干预的情况下实现了跨类别和实例的高精度姿态估计，为复杂场景下的视觉任务提供了新思路。
search_text: Semantic keypoint-based pose estimation from single RGB frames 基于单个 RGB 帧的基于语义关键点的姿态估计 This paper presents an approach to estimating the continuous 6-DoF pose of an object from a single RGB image. The approach combines semantic keypoints predicted by a convolutional network (convnet) with a deformable shape model. Unlike prior investigators, we are agnostic to whether the object is textured or textureless, as the convnet learns the optimal representation from the available training-image data. Furthermore, the approach can be applied to instance- and class-based pose recovery. Additionally, we accompany our main pipeline with a technique for semi-automatic data generation from unlabeled videos. This procedure allows us to train the learnable components of our method with minimal manual intervention in the labeling process. Empirically, we show that our approach can accurately recover the 6-DoF object pose for both instance- and class-based scenarios even against a cluttered background. We apply our approach both to several, existing, large-scale datasets - including PASCAL3D+, LineMOD-Occluded, YCB-Video, and TUD-Light - and, using our labeling pipeline, to a new dataset with novel object classes that we introduce here. Extensive empirical evaluations show that our approach is able to provide pose estimation results comparable to the state of the art. 本文提出了一种从单个 RGB 图像估计物体连续 6-DoF 位姿的方法。该方法将卷积网络（Convnet）预测的语义关键点与可变形形状模型相结合。与之前的研究人员不同，我们不知道物体是有纹理的还是无纹理的，因为卷积网络从可用的训练图像数据中学习最佳表示。此外，该方法可以应用于基于实例和基于类的姿势恢复。此外，我们还为我们的主管道提供了一种从未标记视频中半自动生成数据的技术。这个过程使我们能够在标签过程中以最少的人工干预来训练我们方法的可学习组件。根据经验，我们表明，即使在杂乱的背景下，我们的方法也可以准确地恢复基于实例和基于类的场景的 6-DoF 对象姿势。我们将我们的方法应用于多个现有的大型数据集（包括 PASCAL3D+、LineMOD-Occlusion、YCB-Video 和 TUD-Light），并使用我们的标签管道应用于我们在此介绍的具有新颖对象类的新数据集。广泛的实证评估表明，我们的方法能够提供与现有技术相当的姿态估计结果。 本文提出一种基于语义关键点的单目RGB图像6自由度物体姿态估计方法。 Karl Schmeckpeper,Philip R. Osteen,Yufu Wang,Georgios Pavlakos,Kenneth Chaney,Wyatt Jordan,Xiaowei Zhou,Konstantinos G. Derpanis,Kostas Daniilidis cs.CV

authors_text: Maosheng Ye,Jiamiao Xu,Xunnong Xu,Tengfei Wang,Tongyi Cao,Qifeng Chen
title: Bootstrap Motion Forecasting With Self-Consistent Constraints
title_zh: 具有自洽约束的引导运动预测
abstract: We present a novel framework to bootstrap Motion forecasting with Self-consistent Constraints (MISC). The motion forecasting task aims at predicting future trajectories of vehicles by incorporating spatial and temporal information from the past. A key design of MISC is the proposed Dual Consistency Constraints that regularize the predicted trajectories under spatial and temporal perturbation during training. Also, to model the multi-modality in motion forecasting, we design a novel self-ensembling scheme to obtain accurate teacher targets to enforce the self-constraints with multi-modality supervision. With explicit constraints from multiple teacher targets, we observe a clear improvement in the prediction performance. Extensive experiments on the Argoverse motion forecasting benchmark and Waymo Open Motion dataset show that MISC significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. As the proposed strategies are general and can be easily incorporated into other motion forecasting approaches, we also demonstrate that our proposed scheme consistently improves the prediction performance of several existing methods.
summary: We present a novel framework to bootstrap Motion forecasting with Self-consistent Constraints (MISC). The motion forecasting task aims at predicting future trajectories of vehicles by incorporating spatial and temporal information from the past. A key design of MISC is the proposed Dual Consistency Constraints that regularize the predicted trajectories under spatial and temporal perturbation during training. Also, to model the multi-modality in motion forecasting, we design a novel self-ensembling scheme to obtain accurate teacher targets to enforce the self-constraints with multi-modality supervision. With explicit constraints from multiple teacher targets, we observe a clear improvement in the prediction performance. Extensive experiments on the Argoverse motion forecasting benchmark and Waymo Open Motion dataset show that MISC significantly outperforms the state-of-the-art methods. As the proposed strategies are general and can be easily incorporated into other motion forecasting approaches, we also demonstrate that our proposed scheme consistently improves the prediction performance of several existing methods.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的框架来引导具有自洽约束（MISC）的运动预测。运动预测任务旨在通过结合过去的空间和时间信息来预测车辆的未来轨迹。 MISC 的一个关键设计是提出的双重一致性约束，它可以在训练过程中在空间和时间扰动下对预测轨迹进行正则化。此外，为了对运动预测中的多模态进行建模，我们设计了一种新颖的自集成方案来获得准确的教师目标，以通过多模态监督来实施自我约束。通过多个教师目标的明确约束，我们观察到预测性能明显提高。对 Argoverse 运动预测基准和 Waymo Open Motion 数据集的大量实验表明，MISC 的性能显着优于最先进的方法。由于所提出的策略是通用的，并且可以很容易地合并到其他运动预测方法中，我们还证明了我们提出的方案持续提高了几种现有方法的预测性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为MISC的新型运动预测框架，通过自洽约束提升轨迹预测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有运动预测方法在处理多模态性和时空不确定性时存在不足，需引入更有效的约束机制提升预测准确性。
AI.method: 设计双一致性约束正则化空间时间扰动下的轨迹预测，并采用自集成方案生成多模态教师目标进行监督学习。
AI.result: 在Argoverse和Waymo数据集上显著优于现有方法，且该策略可有效提升多种现有方法的预测性能。
AI.conclusion: MISC框架通过自洽约束机制有效解决了运动预测中的多模态建模问题，具有通用性和可扩展性。

authors_text: Julian Blank,Kalyanmoy Deb
title: pysamoo: Surrogate-Assisted Multi-Objective Optimization in Python
title_zh: pysamoo：Python 中的代理辅助多目标优化
abstract: Significant effort has been made to solve computationally expensive optimization problems in the past two decades, and various optimization methods incorporating surrogates into optimization have been proposed. However, most optimization toolboxes do not consist of ready-to-run algorithms for computationally expensive problems, especially in combination with other key requirements, such as handling multiple conflicting objectives or constraints. Thus, the lack of appropriate software packages has become a bottleneck for solving real-world applications. The proposed framework, pysamoo, addresses these shortcomings of existing optimization frameworks and provides multiple optimization methods for handling problems involving time-consuming evaluation functions. The framework extends the functionalities of pymoo, a popular and comprehensive toolbox for multi-objective optimization, and incorporates surrogates to support expensive function evaluations. The framework is available under the GNU Affero General Public License (AGPL) and is primarily designed for research purposes. For more information about pysamoo, readers are encouraged to visit: anyoptimization.com/projects/pysamoo.
summary: Significant effort has been made to solve computationally expensive optimization problems in the past two decades, and various optimization methods incorporating surrogates into optimization have been proposed. However, most optimization toolboxes do not consist of ready-to-run algorithms for computationally expensive problems, especially in combination with other key requirements, such as handling multiple conflicting objectives or constraints. Thus, the lack of appropriate software packages has become a bottleneck for solving real-world applications. The proposed framework, pysamoo, addresses these shortcomings of existing optimization frameworks and provides multiple optimization methods for handling problems involving time-consuming evaluation functions. The framework extends the functionalities of pymoo, a popular and comprehensive toolbox for multi-objective optimization, and incorporates surrogates to support expensive function evaluations. The framework is available under the GNU Affero General Public License (AGPL) and is primarily designed for research purposes. For more information about pysamoo, readers are encouraged to visit: anyoptimization.com/projects/pysamoo.
abstract_zh: 在过去的二十年中，人们为解决计算量大的优化问题做出了巨大的努力，并且已经提出了将代理纳入优化的各种优化方法。然而，大多数优化工具箱并不包含用于计算成本高昂的问题的现成运行算法，特别是与其他关键要求相结合，例如处理多个相互冲突的目标或约束。因此，缺乏合适的软件包已成为解决实际应用的瓶颈。所提出的框架 pysamoo 解决了现有优化框架的这些缺点，并提供了多种优化方法来处理涉及耗时评估函数的问题。该框架扩展了 pymoo 的功能，pymoo 是一个流行的综合性多目标优化工具箱，并结合了代理来支持昂贵的函数评估。该框架可根据 GNU Affero 通用公共许可证 (AGPL) 使用，主要设计用于研究目的。有关 pysamoo 的更多信息，鼓励读者访问：anyoptimization.com/projects/pysamoo。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为pysamoo的Python框架，用于解决计算成本高昂的多目标优化问题，通过引入代理模型辅助优化过程。
AI.motivation: 现有优化工具箱缺乏针对计算昂贵问题的现成算法，尤其难以处理多目标或约束条件，限制了实际应用的解决能力。
AI.method: 扩展了流行的多目标优化工具箱pymoo，整合代理模型以支持昂贵函数评估，提供多种优化方法。
AI.result: 开发了开源框架pysamoo（AGPL许可），专为研究设计，可处理计算密集型多目标优化问题。
AI.conclusion: pysamoo弥补了现有框架的不足，为复杂优化问题提供了高效的软件解决方案。

authors_text: Andrei Neculai,Yanbei Chen,Zeynep Akata
title: Probabilistic Compositional Embeddings for Multimodal Image Retrieval
title_zh: 用于多模态图像检索的概率组合嵌入
abstract: Existing works in image retrieval often consider retrieving images with one or two query inputs, which do not generalize to multiple queries. In this work, we investigate a more challenging scenario for composing multiple multimodal queries in image retrieval. Given an arbitrary number of query images and (or) texts, our goal is to retrieve target images containing the semantic concepts specified in multiple multimodal queries. To learn an informative embedding that can flexibly encode the semantics of various queries, we propose a novel multimodal probabilistic composer (MPC). Specifically, we model input images and texts as probabilistic embeddings, which can be further composed by a probabilistic composition rule to facilitate image retrieval with multiple multimodal queries. We propose a new benchmark based on the MS-COCO dataset and evaluate our model on various setups that compose multiple images and (or) text queries for multimodal image retrieval. Without bells and whistles, we show that our probabilistic model formulation significantly outperforms existing related methods on multimodal image retrieval while generalizing well to query with different amounts of inputs given in arbitrary visual and (or) textual modalities. Code is available here: https://github.com/andreineculai/MPC.
summary: Existing works in image retrieval often consider retrieving images with one or two query inputs, which do not generalize to multiple queries. In this work, we investigate a more challenging scenario for composing multiple multimodal queries in image retrieval. Given an arbitrary number of query images and (or) texts, our goal is to retrieve target images containing the semantic concepts specified in multiple multimodal queries. To learn an informative embedding that can flexibly encode the semantics of various queries, we propose a novel multimodal probabilistic composer (MPC). Specifically, we model input images and texts as probabilistic embeddings, which can be further composed by a probabilistic composition rule to facilitate image retrieval with multiple multimodal queries. We propose a new benchmark based on the MS-COCO dataset and evaluate our model on various setups that compose multiple images and (or) text queries for multimodal image retrieval. Without bells and whistles, we show that our probabilistic model formulation significantly outperforms existing related methods on multimodal image retrieval while generalizing well to query with different amounts of inputs given in arbitrary visual and (or) textual modalities. Code is available here: https://github.com/andreineculai/MPC.
abstract_zh: 图像检索中的现有工作通常考虑使用一两个查询输入来检索图像，这不能推广到多个查询。在这项工作中，我们研究了在图像检索中组合多个多模态查询的更具挑战性的场景。给定任意数量的查询图像和（或）文本，我们的目标是检索包含多个多模态查询中指定的语义概念的目标图像。为了学习可以灵活编码各种查询语义的信息嵌入，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态概率组合器（MPC）。具体来说，我们将输入图像和文本建模为概率嵌入，可以通过概率组合规则进一步组合，以方便使用多个多模态查询进行图像检索。我们提出了一个基于 MS-COCO 数据集的新基准，并在组成多个图像和（或）文本查询以进行多模态图像检索的各种设置上评估我们的模型。没有花哨的东西，我们表明我们的概率模型公式在多模态图像检索方面显着优于现有的相关方法，同时很好地推广到以任意视觉和（或）文本模态给出的不同数量的输入进行查询。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/andreineculai/MPC。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于多模态图像检索的概率组合嵌入方法，以处理多个图像和文本查询的组合检索任务。
AI.motivation: 现有图像检索方法通常仅支持单个或两个查询输入，难以处理多查询组合场景，且缺乏对任意数量视觉和文本模态输入的泛化能力。
AI.method: 提出多模态概率组合器（MPC），将输入图像和文本建模为概率嵌入，并通过概率组合规则实现多模态查询的语义融合，基于MS-COCO构建新基准进行验证。
AI.result: 在多种多模态查询组合设置下，MPC方法显著优于现有方法，且能有效适应不同数量和模态的输入组合。
AI.conclusion: 概率组合嵌入框架有效解决了多模态图像检索中多查询组合的挑战，展现出优越的性能和泛化能力。

search_text: Probabilistic Compositional Embeddings for Multimodal Image Retrieval 用于多模态图像检索的概率组合嵌入 Existing works in image retrieval often consider retrieving images with one or two query inputs, which do not generalize to multiple queries. In this work, we investigate a more challenging scenario for composing multiple multimodal queries in image retrieval. Given an arbitrary number of query images and (or) texts, our goal is to retrieve target images containing the semantic concepts specified in multiple multimodal queries. To learn an informative embedding that can flexibly encode the semantics of various queries, we propose a novel multimodal probabilistic composer (MPC). Specifically, we model input images and texts as probabilistic embeddings, which can be further composed by a probabilistic composition rule to facilitate image retrieval with multiple multimodal queries. We propose a new benchmark based on the MS-COCO dataset and evaluate our model on various setups that compose multiple images and (or) text queries for multimodal image retrieval. Without bells and whistles, we show that our probabilistic model formulation significantly outperforms existing related methods on multimodal image retrieval while generalizing well to query with different amounts of inputs given in arbitrary visual and (or) textual modalities. Code is available here: https://github.com/andreineculai/MPC. 图像检索中的现有工作通常考虑使用一两个查询输入来检索图像，这不能推广到多个查询。在这项工作中，我们研究了在图像检索中组合多个多模态查询的更具挑战性的场景。给定任意数量的查询图像和（或）文本，我们的目标是检索包含多个多模态查询中指定的语义概念的目标图像。为了学习可以灵活编码各种查询语义的信息嵌入，我们提出了一种新颖的多模态概率组合器（MPC）。具体来说，我们将输入图像和文本建模为概率嵌入，可以通过概率组合规则进一步组合，以方便使用多个多模态查询进行图像检索。我们提出了一个基于 MS-COCO 数据集的新基准，并在组成多个图像和（或）文本查询以进行多模态图像检索的各种设置上评估我们的模型。没有花哨的东西，我们表明我们的概率模型公式在多模态图像检索方面显着优于现有的相关方法，同时很好地推广到以任意视觉和（或）文本模态给出的不同数量的输入进行查询。代码可在此处获取：https://github.com/andreineculai/MPC。 本文提出了一种用于多模态图像检索的概率组合嵌入方法，以处理多个图像和文本查询的组合检索任务。 Andrei Neculai,Yanbei Chen,Zeynep Akata cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Gabriele Graffieti,Davide Maltoni,Lorenzo Pellegrini,Vincenzo Lomonaco
title: Generative Negative Replay for Continual Learning
title_zh: 用于持续学习的生成式负重播
comment: 18 pages, 10 figures, 16 tables, 2 algorithms. Under review
comments: 18 pages, 10 figures, 16 tables, 2 algorithms. Under review
abstract: Learning continually is a key aspect of intelligence and a necessary ability to solve many real-life problems. One of the most effective strategies to control catastrophic forgetting, the Achilles' heel of continual learning, is storing part of the old data and replaying them interleaved with new experiences (also known as the replay approach). Generative replay, which is using generative models to provide replay patterns on demand, is particularly intriguing, however, it was shown to be effective mainly under simplified assumptions, such as simple scenarios and low-dimensional data. In this paper, we show that, while the generated data are usually not able to improve the classification accuracy for the old classes, they can be effective as negative examples (or antagonists) to better learn the new classes, especially when the learning experiences are small and contain examples of just one or few classes. The proposed approach is validated on complex class-incremental and data-incremental continual learning scenarios (CORe50 and ImageNet-1000) composed of high-dimensional data and a large number of training experiences: a setup where existing generative replay approaches usually fail.
summary: Learning continually is a key aspect of intelligence and a necessary ability to solve many real-life problems. One of the most effective strategies to control catastrophic forgetting, the Achilles' heel of continual learning, is storing part of the old data and replaying them interleaved with new experiences (also known as the replay approach). Generative replay, which is using generative models to provide replay patterns on demand, is particularly intriguing, however, it was shown to be effective mainly under simplified assumptions, such as simple scenarios and low-dimensional data. In this paper, we show that, while the generated data are usually not able to improve the classification accuracy for the old classes, they can be effective as negative examples (or antagonists) to better learn the new classes, especially when the learning experiences are small and contain examples of just one or few classes. The proposed approach is validated on complex class-incremental and data-incremental continual learning scenarios (CORe50 and ImageNet-1000) composed of high-dimensional data and a large number of training experiences: a setup where existing generative replay approaches usually fail.
abstract_zh: 持续学习是智力的一个关键方面，也是解决许多现实生活问题的必要能力。控制灾难性遗忘的最有效策略之一是持续学习的致命弱点，即存储部分旧数据并与新体验交织重放（也称为重放方法）。生成重放，即使用生成模型按需提供重放模式，特别有趣，但是，它被证明主要在简化假设下有效，例如简单场景和低维数据。在本文中，我们表明，虽然生成的数据通常无法提高旧类的分类精度，但它们可以有效地作为反面例子（或对抗者）来更好地学习新类，特别是当学习经验较小且仅包含一个或几个类的示例时。所提出的方法在由高维数据和大量训练经验组成的复杂类增量和数据增量持续学习场景（CORe50 和 ImageNet-1000）上得到了验证：现有的生成重放方法通常会失败。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种生成负样本回放的方法，用于解决持续学习中的灾难性遗忘问题，通过生成模型创建负样本以增强新类别的学习效果。
AI.motivation: 现有生成回放方法在复杂场景和高维数据中效果不佳，而生成数据作为负样本（对抗性示例）可有效提升新类别的学习，尤其在数据量有限时表现更优。
AI.method: 利用生成模型生成负样本而非传统正样本回放，通过对比学习机制强化新类特征区分度，适用于高维数据和大规模训练场景。
AI.result: 在CORe50和ImageNet-1000等复杂持续学习任务中验证，相较现有生成回放方法显著提升分类性能，尤其在数据增量和类别增量场景下表现突出。
AI.conclusion: 生成负样本回放为持续学习提供了新视角，通过对抗性样本增强新知识学习，有效缓解灾难性遗忘问题。

authors_text: Haohe Liu,Xubo Liu,Qiuqiang Kong,Qiao Tian,Yan Zhao,DeLiang Wang,Chuanzeng Huang,Yuxuan Wang
title: VoiceFixer: A Unified Framework for High-Fidelity Speech Restoration
title_zh: VoiceFixer：高保真语音恢复的统一框架
abstract: Speech restoration aims to remove distortions in speech signals. Prior methods mainly focus on a single type of distortion, such as speech denoising or dereverberation. However, speech signals can be degraded by several different distortions simultaneously in the real world. It is thus important to extend speech restoration models to deal with multiple distortions. In this paper, we introduce VoiceFixer, a unified framework for high-fidelity speech restoration. VoiceFixer restores speech from multiple distortions (e.g., noise, reverberation, and clipping) and can expand degraded speech (e.g., noisy speech) with a low bandwidth to 44.1 kHz full-bandwidth high-fidelity speech. We design VoiceFixer based on (1) an analysis stage that predicts intermediate-level features from the degraded speech, and (2) a synthesis stage that generates waveform using a neural vocoder. Both objective and subjective evaluations show that VoiceFixer is effective on severely degraded speech, such as real-world historical speech recordings. Samples of VoiceFixer are available at https://haoheliu.github.io/voicefixer.
summary: Speech restoration aims to remove distortions in speech signals. Prior methods mainly focus on a single type of distortion, such as speech denoising or dereverberation. However, speech signals can be degraded by several different distortions simultaneously in the real world. It is thus important to extend speech restoration models to deal with multiple distortions. In this paper, we introduce VoiceFixer, a unified framework for high-fidelity speech restoration. VoiceFixer restores speech from multiple distortions (e.g., noise, reverberation, and clipping) and can expand degraded speech (e.g., noisy speech) with a low bandwidth to 44.1 kHz full-bandwidth high-fidelity speech. We design VoiceFixer based on (1) an analysis stage that predicts intermediate-level features from the degraded speech, and (2) a synthesis stage that generates waveform using a neural vocoder. Both objective and subjective evaluations show that VoiceFixer is effective on severely degraded speech, such as real-world historical speech recordings. Samples of VoiceFixer are available at https://haoheliu.github.io/voicefixer.
abstract_zh: 语音恢复旨在消除语音信号中的失真。现有方法主要关注单一类型的失真，例如语音降噪或去混响。然而，在现实世界中，语音信号可能会同时受到多种不同失真的影响。因此，扩展语音恢复模型以处理多重失真非常重要。在本文中，我们介绍了 VoiceFixer，一个用于高保真语音恢复的统一框架。 VoiceFixer 可从多种失真（例如噪声、混响和削波）中恢复语音，并且可以将低带宽的降级语音（例如噪声语音）扩展到 44.1 kHz 全带宽高保真语音。我们设计 VoiceFixer 的基础是（1）从退化语音中预测中间级特征的分析阶段，以及（2）使用神经声码器生成波形的合成阶段。客观和主观评估都表明，VoiceFixer 对于严重退化的语音（例如现实世界的历史语音录音）是有效的。 VoiceFixer 的示例可在 https://haoheliu.github.io/voicefixer 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出VoiceFixer框架，用于从多种失真（如噪声、混响、削波）中恢复高保真语音信号。
AI.motivation: 现有语音修复方法仅针对单一失真类型，而实际场景中语音信号常同时受多种失真影响，需统一处理多类型失真并提升保真度。
AI.method: 框架分为分析阶段（提取退化语音的中间特征）和合成阶段（通过神经声码器生成波形），支持多失真联合修复及低带宽语音扩展至44.1kHz全频段。
AI.result: 客观与主观评估表明，VoiceFixer在严重退化语音（如历史录音）中表现优异，修复效果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: VoiceFixer为多失真语音修复提供了统一高效解决方案，可广泛应用于真实场景的语音增强与历史音频修复。

search_text: VoiceFixer: A Unified Framework for High-Fidelity Speech Restoration VoiceFixer：高保真语音恢复的统一框架 Speech restoration aims to remove distortions in speech signals. Prior methods mainly focus on a single type of distortion, such as speech denoising or dereverberation. However, speech signals can be degraded by several different distortions simultaneously in the real world. It is thus important to extend speech restoration models to deal with multiple distortions. In this paper, we introduce VoiceFixer, a unified framework for high-fidelity speech restoration. VoiceFixer restores speech from multiple distortions (e.g., noise, reverberation, and clipping) and can expand degraded speech (e.g., noisy speech) with a low bandwidth to 44.1 kHz full-bandwidth high-fidelity speech. We design VoiceFixer based on (1) an analysis stage that predicts intermediate-level features from the degraded speech, and (2) a synthesis stage that generates waveform using a neural vocoder. Both objective and subjective evaluations show that VoiceFixer is effective on severely degraded speech, such as real-world historical speech recordings. Samples of VoiceFixer are available at https://haoheliu.github.io/voicefixer. 语音恢复旨在消除语音信号中的失真。现有方法主要关注单一类型的失真，例如语音降噪或去混响。然而，在现实世界中，语音信号可能会同时受到多种不同失真的影响。因此，扩展语音恢复模型以处理多重失真非常重要。在本文中，我们介绍了 VoiceFixer，一个用于高保真语音恢复的统一框架。 VoiceFixer 可从多种失真（例如噪声、混响和削波）中恢复语音，并且可以将低带宽的降级语音（例如噪声语音）扩展到 44.1 kHz 全带宽高保真语音。我们设计 VoiceFixer 的基础是（1）从退化语音中预测中间级特征的分析阶段，以及（2）使用神经声码器生成波形的合成阶段。客观和主观评估都表明，VoiceFixer 对于严重退化的语音（例如现实世界的历史语音录音）是有效的。 VoiceFixer 的示例可在 https://haoheliu.github.io/voicefixer 获取。 本文提出VoiceFixer框架，用于从多种失真（如噪声、混响、削波）中恢复高保真语音信号。 Haohe Liu,Xubo Liu,Qiuqiang Kong,Qiao Tian,Yan Zhao,DeLiang Wang,Chuanzeng Huang,Yuxuan Wang eess.AS,cs.SD,eess.SP

authors_text: Mine Sarac,Allison M. Okamura,Massimiliano Di Luca
title: Effects of Haptic Feedback on the Wrist during Virtual Manipulation
title_zh: 虚拟操作过程中触觉反馈对手腕的影响
comment: 2 pages, work-in-progress paper on haptics symposium, 2020
comments: 2 pages, work-in-progress paper on haptics symposium, 2020
abstract: We propose a haptic system for virtual manipulation to provide feedback on the user's forearm instead of the fingertips. In addition to visual rendering of the manipulation with virtual fingertips, we employ a device to deliver normal or shear skin-stretch at multiple points near the wrist. To understand how design parameters influence the experience, we investigated the effect of the number and location of sensory feedback on stiffness perception. Participants compared stiffness values of virtual objects, while the haptic bracelet provided interaction feedback on the dorsal, ventral, or both sides of the wrist. Stiffness discrimination judgments and duration, as well as qualitative results collected verbally, indicate no significant difference in stiffness perception with stimulation at different and multiple locations.
summary: We propose a haptic system for virtual manipulation to provide feedback on the user's forearm instead of the fingertips. In addition to visual rendering of the manipulation with virtual fingertips, we employ a device to deliver normal or shear skin-stretch at multiple points near the wrist. To understand how design parameters influence the experience, we investigated the effect of the number and location of sensory feedback on stiffness perception. Participants compared stiffness values of virtual objects, while the haptic bracelet provided interaction feedback on the dorsal, ventral, or both sides of the wrist. Stiffness discrimination judgments and duration, as well as qualitative results collected verbally, indicate no significant difference in stiffness perception with stimulation at different and multiple locations.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种用于虚拟操作的触觉系统，以在用户的​​前臂而不是指尖上提供反馈。除了使用虚拟指尖进行操作的视觉渲染之外，我们还使用一种设备在手腕附近的多个点处提供正常或剪切的皮肤拉伸。为了了解设计参数如何影响体验，我们研究了感官反馈的数量和位置对刚度感知的影响。参与者比较虚拟物体的刚度值，而触觉手环则提供手腕背侧、腹侧或两侧的交互反馈。僵硬辨别判断和持续时间以及口头收集的定性结果表明，在不同和多个位置进行刺激时，僵硬感知没有显着差异。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过腕部触觉反馈提升虚拟操作体验的系统，替代传统指尖反馈方式。
AI.motivation: 传统触觉反馈多依赖指尖，但腕部反馈可能更符合人体工学且减少设备复杂度，需验证其有效性。
AI.method: 设计可于腕部背侧、掌侧或多点同时提供皮肤拉伸反馈的触觉手环，通过对比实验测试不同刺激位置对虚拟物体刚度感知的影响。
AI.result: 实验显示，无论刺激点数量和位置如何变化，用户对虚拟物体刚度的感知无显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 腕部多点触觉反馈可有效传递操作信息，其感知效果不受刺激位置和数量影响，为简化触觉设备设计提供依据。

authors_text: Jin-Yu Yang,Heng-Chao Li,Wen-Shuai Hu,Lei Pan,Qian Du
title: Adaptive Cross-Attention-Driven Spatial-Spectral Graph Convolutional Network for Hyperspectral Image Classification
title_zh: 用于高光谱图像分类的自适应交叉注意力驱动的空间光谱图卷积网络
abstract: Recently, graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have been developed to explore spatial relationship between pixels, achieving better classification performance of hyperspectral images (HSIs). However, these methods fail to sufficiently leverage the relationship between spectral bands in HSI data. As such, we propose an adaptive cross-attention-driven spatial-spectral graph convolutional network (ACSS-GCN), which is composed of a spatial GCN (Sa-GCN) subnetwork, a spectral GCN (Se-GCN) subnetwork, and a graph cross-attention fusion module (GCAFM). Specifically, Sa-GCN and Se-GCN are proposed to extract the spatial and spectral features by modeling correlations between spatial pixels and between spectral bands, respectively. Then, by integrating attention mechanism into information aggregation of graph, the GCAFM, including three parts, i.e., spatial graph attention block, spectral graph attention block, and fusion block, is designed to fuse the spatial and spectral features and suppress noise interference in Sa-GCN and Se-GCN. Moreover, the idea of the adaptive graph is introduced to explore an optimal graph through back propagation during the training process. Experiments on two HSI data sets show that the proposed method achieves better performance than other classification methods.
summary: Recently, graph convolutional networks (GCNs) have been developed to explore spatial relationship between pixels, achieving better classification performance of hyperspectral images (HSIs). However, these methods fail to sufficiently leverage the relationship between spectral bands in HSI data. As such, we propose an adaptive cross-attention-driven spatial-spectral graph convolutional network (ACSS-GCN), which is composed of a spatial GCN (Sa-GCN) subnetwork, a spectral GCN (Se-GCN) subnetwork, and a graph cross-attention fusion module (GCAFM). Specifically, Sa-GCN and Se-GCN are proposed to extract the spatial and spectral features by modeling correlations between spatial pixels and between spectral bands, respectively. Then, by integrating attention mechanism into information aggregation of graph, the GCAFM, including three parts, i.e., spatial graph attention block, spectral graph attention block, and fusion block, is designed to fuse the spatial and spectral features and suppress noise interference in Sa-GCN and Se-GCN. Moreover, the idea of the adaptive graph is introduced to explore an optimal graph through back propagation during the training process. Experiments on two HSI data sets show that the proposed method achieves better performance than other classification methods.
abstract_zh: 最近，图卷积网络（GCN）被开发来探索像素之间的空间关系，实现高光谱图像（HSIs）更好的分类性能。然而，这些方法未能充分利用 HSI 数据中光谱带之间的关系。因此，我们提出了一种自适应交叉注意力驱动的空间频谱图卷积网络（ACSS-GCN），它由空间GCN（Sa-GCN）子网络、频谱GCN（Se-GCN）子网络和图交叉注意力融合模块（GCAFM）组成。具体来说，Sa-GCN 和 Se-GCN 被提出分别通过建模空间像素之间和光谱带之间的相关性来提取空间和光谱特征。然后，通过将注意力机制融入图的信息聚合中，设计了GCAFM，包括空间图注意块、谱图注意块和融合块三部分，以融合空间和谱特征并抑制Sa-GCN和Se-GCN中的噪声干扰。此外，引入自适应图的思想，在训练过程中通过反向传播探索最优图。在两个HSI数据集上的实验表明，该方法比其他分类方法取得了更好的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种自适应跨注意力驱动的空谱图卷积网络（ACSS-GCN），用于高光谱图像分类，通过结合空间和光谱特征提升分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有图卷积网络（GCNs）主要关注像素空间关系，未能充分挖掘高光谱数据中光谱波段间的关联性，限制了分类效果。
AI.method: 设计包含空间GCN（Sa-GCN）、光谱GCN（Se-GCN）和图跨注意力融合模块（GCAFM）的ACSS-GCN网络，通过自适应图结构和注意力机制融合空谱特征并抑制噪声。
AI.result: 在两个高光谱数据集上的实验表明，该方法分类性能优于其他主流方法。
AI.conclusion: ACSS-GCN通过有效整合空间与光谱信息，结合自适应图优化，显著提升了高光谱图像分类的准确性。

authors_text: Jannik Rau,David Richerby,Ansgar Scherp
title: Computing $k$-Bisimulations for Large Graphs: A Comparison and Efficiency Analysis
title_zh: 计算大图的 $k$ 互模拟：比较和效率分析
abstract: Summarizing graphs w.r.t. structural features is important to reduce the graph's size and make tasks like indexing, querying, and visualization feasible. Our generic parallel BRS algorithm efficiently summarizes large graphs w.r.t. a custom equivalence relation $\sim$ defined on the graph's vertices $V$. Moreover, the definition of $\sim$ can be chained $k\geq 1$ times, so the defined equivalence relation becomes a $k$-bisimulation. We evaluate the runtime and memory performance of the BRS algorithm for $k$-bisimulation with $k=1,\ldots,10$ against two algorithms found in the literature (a sequential algorithm due to Kaushik et al. and a parallel algorithm of Schätzle et al.), which we implemented in the same software stack as BRS. We use five real-world and synthetic graph datasets containing 100 million to two billion edges. Our results show that the generic BRS algorithm outperforms the respective native bisimulation algorithms on all datasets for all $k\geq5$ and for smaller $k$ in some cases. The BRS implementations of the two bisimulation algorithms run almost as fast as each other. Thus, the BRS algorithm is an effective parallelization of the sequential Kaushik et al. bisimulation algorithm.

abstract_zh: 总结图表结构特征对于减小图的大小并使索引、查询和可视化等任务变得可行非常重要。我们的通用并行 BRS 算法有效地总结了大型图。在图的顶点 $V$ 上定义的自定义等价关系 $\sim$。此外，$\sim$的定义可以链接$k\geq 1$次，因此定义的等价关系变成$k$-互模拟。我们根据文献中发现的两种算法（Kaushik 等人提出的顺序算法和 Schätzle 等人提出的并行算法）评估 $k$-bisimulation 的 BRS 算法的运行时和内存性能，其中 $k=1,\ldots,10$，我们在与 BRS 相同的软件堆栈中实现了这两种算法。我们使用五个真实世界和合成图数据集，其中包含 1 亿到 20 亿条边。我们的结果表明，对于所有 $k\geq5$ 以及在某些情况下较小的 $k$，通用 BRS 算法在所有数据集上均优于各自的本机互模拟算法。两种互模拟算法的 BRS 实现运行速度几乎一样快。因此，BRS 算法是顺序 Kaushik 等人算法的有效并行化。互模拟算法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通用的并行BRS算法，用于计算大规模图的k-二相似关系，并与现有算法进行效率对比分析。
AI.motivation: 图结构的简化对于索引、查询和可视化等任务至关重要，但现有算法在处理大规模图的k-二相似计算时效率不足。
AI.method: 基于自定义等价关系的BRS算法，通过多次链式定义生成k-二相似关系，并在五个真实和合成数据集上与Kaushik等人的顺序算法及Schätzle等人的并行算法进行性能对比。
AI.result: BRS算法在所有数据集上对k≥5的场景表现优于现有算法，且在部分小k值场景中也有优势，两种二相似算法实现性能接近。
AI.conclusion: BRS算法是Kaushik顺序算法的有效并行化方案，能够高效处理大规模图的k-二相似计算。

authors_text: Zilong Wang,Jingbo Shang
title: Towards Few-shot Entity Recognition in Document Images: A Label-aware Sequence-to-Sequence Framework
title_zh: 文档图像中的小样本实体识别：标签感知的序列到序列框架
abstract: Entity recognition is a fundamental task in understanding document images. Traditional sequence labeling frameworks treat the entity types as class IDs and rely on extensive data and high-quality annotations to learn semantics which are typically expensive in practice. In this paper, we aim to build an entity recognition model requiring only a few shots of annotated document images. To overcome the data limitation, we propose to leverage the label surface names to better inform the model of the target entity type semantics and also embed the labels into the spatial embedding space to capture the spatial correspondence between regions and labels. Specifically, we go beyond sequence labeling and develop a novel label-aware seq2seq framework, LASER. The proposed model follows a new labeling scheme that generates the label surface names word-by-word explicitly after generating the entities. During training, LASER refines the label semantics by updating the label surface name representations and also strengthens the label-region correlation. In this way, LASER recognizes the entities from document images through both semantic and layout correspondence. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of LASER under the few-shot setting.
summary: Entity recognition is a fundamental task in understanding document images. Traditional sequence labeling frameworks treat the entity types as class IDs and rely on extensive data and high-quality annotations to learn semantics which are typically expensive in practice. In this paper, we aim to build an entity recognition model requiring only a few shots of annotated document images. To overcome the data limitation, we propose to leverage the label surface names to better inform the model of the target entity type semantics and also embed the labels into the spatial embedding space to capture the spatial correspondence between regions and labels. Specifically, we go beyond sequence labeling and develop a novel label-aware seq2seq framework, LASER. The proposed model follows a new labeling scheme that generates the label surface names word-by-word explicitly after generating the entities. During training, LASER refines the label semantics by updating the label surface name representations and also strengthens the label-region correlation. In this way, LASER recognizes the entities from document images through both semantic and layout correspondence. Extensive experiments on two benchmark datasets demonstrate the superiority of LASER under the few-shot setting.
abstract_zh: 实体识别是理解文档图像的一项基本任务。传统的序列标记框架将实体类型视为类 ID，并依赖大量数据和高质量注释来学习语义，这在实践中通常非常昂贵。在本文中，我们的目标是构建一个仅需要少量带注释文档图像的实体识别模型。为了克服数据限制，我们建议利用标签表面名称来更好地告知目标实体类型语义的模型，并将标签嵌入到空间嵌入空间中以捕获区域和标签之间的空间对应关系。具体来说，我们超越了序列标记，并开发了一种新颖的标签感知 seq2seq 框架 LASER。所提出的模型遵循新的标签方案，该方案在生成实体后显式地逐字生成标签表面名称。在训练过程中，LASER 通过更新标签表面名称表示来细化标签语义，并加强标签与区域的相关性。通过这种方式，LASER 通过语义和布局对应来识别文档图像中的实体。对两个基准数据集的大量实验证明了 LASER 在少样本设置下的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种标签感知的序列到序列框架LASER，用于在少量标注的文档图像中进行实体识别。
AI.motivation: 传统方法依赖大量标注数据，成本高昂，而实际中数据获取困难，需利用标签语义和空间信息提升少样本学习效果。
AI.method: 提出LASER框架，通过生成标签表面名称并嵌入空间嵌入空间，强化标签与区域的关联，结合语义和布局信息进行实体识别。
AI.result: 在两个基准数据集上，LASER在少样本设置下表现出色，验证了其有效性。
AI.conclusion: LASER通过结合语义和布局信息，有效解决了少样本文档图像实体识别问题，为相关研究提供了新思路。

authors_text: Zhiyuan Xie,Umesh K. Haritashya,Vijayan K. Asari,Michael P. Bishop,Jeffrey S. Kargel,Theus H. Aspiras
title: GlacierNet2: A Hybrid Multi-Model Learning Architecture for Alpine Glacier Mapping
title_zh: GlacierNet2：用于高山冰川测绘的混合多模型学习架构
comment: ef:International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation, 2022
comments: ef:International Journal of Applied Earth Observation and Geoinformation, 2022
abstract: In recent decades, climate change has significantly affected glacier dynamics, resulting in mass loss and an increased risk of glacier-related hazards including supraglacial and proglacial lake development, as well as catastrophic outburst flooding. Rapidly changing conditions dictate the need for continuous and detailed observations and analysis of climate-glacier dynamics. Thematic and quantitative information regarding glacier geometry is fundamental for understanding climate forcing and the sensitivity of glaciers to climate change, however, accurately mapping debris-cover glaciers (DCGs) is notoriously difficult based upon the use of spectral information and conventional machine-learning techniques. The objective of this research is to improve upon an earlier proposed deep-learning-based approach, GlacierNet, which was developed to exploit a convolutional neural-network segmentation model to accurately outline regional DCG ablation zones. Specifically, we developed an enhanced GlacierNet2 architecture thatincorporates multiple models, automatic post-processing, and basin-level hydrological flow techniques to improve the mapping of DCGs such that it includes both the ablation and accumulation zones. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that GlacierNet2 improves the estimation of the ablation zone and allows a high level of intersection over union (IOU: 0.8839) score. The proposed architecture provides complete glacier (both accumulation and ablation zone) outlines at regional scales, with an overall IOU score of 0.8619. This is a crucial first step in automating complete glacier mapping that can be used for accurate glacier modeling or mass-balance analysis.
summary: In recent decades, climate change has significantly affected glacier dynamics, resulting in mass loss and an increased risk of glacier-related hazards including supraglacial and proglacial lake development, as well as catastrophic outburst flooding. Rapidly changing conditions dictate the need for continuous and detailed observations and analysis of climate-glacier dynamics. Thematic and quantitative information regarding glacier geometry is fundamental for understanding climate forcing and the sensitivity of glaciers to climate change, however, accurately mapping debris-cover glaciers (DCGs) is notoriously difficult based upon the use of spectral information and conventional machine-learning techniques. The objective of this research is to improve upon an earlier proposed deep-learning-based approach, GlacierNet, which was developed to exploit a convolutional neural-network segmentation model to accurately outline regional DCG ablation zones. Specifically, we developed an enhanced GlacierNet2 architecture thatincorporates multiple models, automatic post-processing, and basin-level hydrological flow techniques to improve the mapping of DCGs such that it includes both the ablation and accumulation zones. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that GlacierNet2 improves the estimation of the ablation zone and allows a high level of intersection over union (IOU: 0.8839) score. The proposed architecture provides complete glacier (both accumulation and ablation zone) outlines at regional scales, with an overall IOU score of 0.8619. This is a crucial first step in automating complete glacier mapping that can be used for accurate glacier modeling or mass-balance analysis.
abstract_zh: 近几十年来，气候变化显着影响了冰川动态，导致质量损失和冰川相关灾害的风险增加，包括冰上和冰前湖泊发育以及灾难性溃决洪水。快速变化的条件决定了需要对气候冰川动力学进行连续和详细的观测和分析。有关冰川几何形状的专题和定量信息对于了解气候强迫和冰川对气候变化的敏感性至关重要，然而，基于光谱信息和传统机器学习技术的使用，准确绘制碎片覆盖冰川（DCG）是非常困难的。这项研究的目的是改进早期提出的基于深度学习的方法 GlacierNet，该方法的开发是为了利用卷积神经网络分割模型来准确勾勒出区域 DCG 消融区域。具体来说，我们开发了一种增强的 GlacierNet2 架构，该架构结合了多个模型、自动后处理和流域级水文流量技术，以改进 DCG 的绘图，使其包括消融区和堆积区。实验评估表明，GlacierNet2 改进了消融区域的估计，并允许高水平的交并集（IOU：0.8839）得分。所提出的架构提供了区域尺度的完整冰川（包括堆积区和消融区）轮廓，总体 IOU 得分为 0.8619。这是自动化完整冰川测绘的关键第一步，可用于精确的冰川建模或质量平衡分析。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种混合多模型学习架构GlacierNet2，用于改进高山冰川的测绘，特别是提高对覆盖碎屑的冰川（DCGs）的映射精度。
AI.motivation: 气候变化导致冰川动态变化加剧，传统方法基于光谱信息和常规机器学习技术难以准确测绘覆盖碎屑的冰川几何信息，尤其是积累区和消融区的完整映射。
AI.method: 改进了之前的GlacierNet架构，结合多模型集成、自动后处理和流域尺度水文流动技术，实现对DCGs消融区和积累区的全面映射。
AI.result: 实验表明，GlacierNet2在消融区映射中达到0.8839的交并比（IOU），整体冰川轮廓映射IOU为0.8619，显著优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: 该架构为自动化冰川测绘提供了关键基础，可支持精确的冰川建模和质量平衡分析，推动冰川对气候变化响应的研究。

search_text: GlacierNet2: A Hybrid Multi-Model Learning Architecture for Alpine Glacier Mapping GlacierNet2：用于高山冰川测绘的混合多模型学习架构 In recent decades, climate change has significantly affected glacier dynamics, resulting in mass loss and an increased risk of glacier-related hazards including supraglacial and proglacial lake development, as well as catastrophic outburst flooding. Rapidly changing conditions dictate the need for continuous and detailed observations and analysis of climate-glacier dynamics. Thematic and quantitative information regarding glacier geometry is fundamental for understanding climate forcing and the sensitivity of glaciers to climate change, however, accurately mapping debris-cover glaciers (DCGs) is notoriously difficult based upon the use of spectral information and conventional machine-learning techniques. The objective of this research is to improve upon an earlier proposed deep-learning-based approach, GlacierNet, which was developed to exploit a convolutional neural-network segmentation model to accurately outline regional DCG ablation zones. Specifically, we developed an enhanced GlacierNet2 architecture thatincorporates multiple models, automatic post-processing, and basin-level hydrological flow techniques to improve the mapping of DCGs such that it includes both the ablation and accumulation zones. Experimental evaluations demonstrate that GlacierNet2 improves the estimation of the ablation zone and allows a high level of intersection over union (IOU: 0.8839) score. The proposed architecture provides complete glacier (both accumulation and ablation zone) outlines at regional scales, with an overall IOU score of 0.8619. This is a crucial first step in automating complete glacier mapping that can be used for accurate glacier modeling or mass-balance analysis. 近几十年来，气候变化显着影响了冰川动态，导致质量损失和冰川相关灾害的风险增加，包括冰上和冰前湖泊发育以及灾难性溃决洪水。快速变化的条件决定了需要对气候冰川动力学进行连续和详细的观测和分析。有关冰川几何形状的专题和定量信息对于了解气候强迫和冰川对气候变化的敏感性至关重要，然而，基于光谱信息和传统机器学习技术的使用，准确绘制碎片覆盖冰川（DCG）是非常困难的。这项研究的目的是改进早期提出的基于深度学习的方法 GlacierNet，该方法的开发是为了利用卷积神经网络分割模型来准确勾勒出区域 DCG 消融区域。具体来说，我们开发了一种增强的 GlacierNet2 架构，该架构结合了多个模型、自动后处理和流域级水文流量技术，以改进 DCG 的绘图，使其包括消融区和堆积区。实验评估表明，GlacierNet2 改进了消融区域的估计，并允许高水平的交并集（IOU：0.8839）得分。所提出的架构提供了区域尺度的完整冰川（包括堆积区和消融区）轮廓，总体 IOU 得分为 0.8619。这是自动化完整冰川测绘的关键第一步，可用于精确的冰川建模或质量平衡分析。 本文提出了一种混合多模型学习架构GlacierNet2，用于改进高山冰川的测绘，特别是提高对覆盖碎屑的冰川（DCGs）的映射精度。 Zhiyuan Xie,Umesh K. Haritashya,Vijayan K. Asari,Michael P. Bishop,Jeffrey S. Kargel,Theus H. Aspiras eess.IV,cs.LG

authors_text: Mario Alejandro Hevia Fajardo,Dirk Sudholt
title: Hard Problems are Easier for Success-based Parameter Control
title_zh: 基于成功的参数控制使困难问题变得更容易
abstract: Recent works showed that simple success-based rules for self-adjusting parameters in evolutionary algorithms (EAs) can match or outperform the best fixed parameters on discrete problems. Non-elitism in a (1,$λ$) EA combined with a self-adjusting offspring population size $λ$ outperforms common EAs on the multimodal Cliff problem. However, it was shown that this only holds if the success rate $s$ that governs self-adjustment is small enough. Otherwise, even on OneMax, the self-adjusting (1,$λ$) EA stagnates on an easy slope, where frequent successes drive down the offspring population size. We show that self-adjustment works as intended in the absence of easy slopes. We define everywhere hard functions, for which successes are never easy to find and show that the self-adjusting (1,$λ$) EA is robust with respect to the choice of success rates $s$. We give a general fitness-level upper bound on the number of evaluations and show that the expected number of generations is at most $O(d + \log(1/p_{\min}))$ where $d$ is the number of non-optimal fitness values and $p_{\min}$ is the smallest probability of finding an improvement from a non-optimal search point. We discuss implications for the everywhere hard function LeadingOnes and a new class OneMaxBlocks of everywhere hard functions with tunable difficulty.
summary: Recent works showed that simple success-based rules for self-adjusting parameters in evolutionary algorithms (EAs) can match or outperform the best fixed parameters on discrete problems. Non-elitism in a (1,$λ$) EA combined with a self-adjusting offspring population size $λ$ outperforms common EAs on the multimodal Cliff problem. However, it was shown that this only holds if the success rate $s$ that governs self-adjustment is small enough. Otherwise, even on OneMax, the self-adjusting (1,$λ$) EA stagnates on an easy slope, where frequent successes drive down the offspring population size. We show that self-adjustment works as intended in the absence of easy slopes. We define everywhere hard functions, for which successes are never easy to find and show that the self-adjusting (1,$λ$) EA is robust with respect to the choice of success rates $s$. We give a general fitness-level upper bound on the number of evaluations and show that the expected number of generations is at most $O(d + \log(1/p_{\min}))$ where $d$ is the number of non-optimal fitness values and $p_{\min}$ is the smallest probability of finding an improvement from a non-optimal search point. We discuss implications for the everywhere hard function LeadingOnes and a new class OneMaxBlocks of everywhere hard functions with tunable difficulty.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，进化算法（EA）中基于成功的简单参数自调整规则可以匹配或优于离散问题上的最佳固定参数。 (1,$λ$) EA 中的非精英主义与自我调整后代种群规模 $λ$ 相结合，在多峰 Cliff 问题上优于普通 EA。然而，研究表明，只有当控制自我调整的成功率 $s$ 足够小时，这才成立。否则，即使在 OneMax 上，自我调整的 (1,$λ$) EA 也会停滞在一个缓坡上，频繁的成功会降低后代种群规模。我们证明，在没有轻松斜坡的情况下，自我调整可以按预期发挥作用。我们定义了无处不在的硬函数，对于这些函数来说，成功从来都不容易找到，并且表明自调整 (1,$λ$) EA 在成功率 $s$ 的选择方面具有鲁棒性。我们给出了评估次数的一般适应度上限，并表明预期的代数最多为 $O(d + \log(1/p_{\min}))$，其中 $d$ 是非最佳适应度值的数量，$p_{\min}$ 是从非最佳搜索点找到改进的最小概率。我们讨论了无处不在的硬函数LeadingOnes和具有可调难度的无处不在的硬函数的新类OneMaxBlocks的含义。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于成功率的参数控制在进化算法中对困难问题的适应性，提出了一种新的理论分析框架。
AI.motivation: 现有研究表明基于成功率的参数调整在离散问题中表现优异，但存在参数选择敏感性问题，尤其在简单斜坡问题上易陷入停滞。
AI.method: 定义了'处处困难函数'概念，通过理论分析证明自适应(1,λ)EA在合理成功率下的鲁棒性，并给出评估次数的上界证明。
AI.result: 证明了在处处困难函数上，自适应算法对成功率参数不敏感，且评估次数上限为O(d+log(1/p_min))，并在LeadingOnes和OneMaxBlocks实例中验证了理论结论。
AI.conclusion: 成功率参数控制机制在持续困难问题中表现稳定，为进化算法参数自适应设计提供了新的理论依据和函数类分析框架。

authors_text: Gokul Karthik Kumar,Abhishek Singh Gehlot,Sahal Shaji Mullappilly,Karthik Nandakumar
title: MuCoT: Multilingual Contrastive Training for Question-Answering in Low-resource Languages
title_zh: MuCoT：低资源语言问答的多语言对比训练
comment: Accepted for oral presentation at ACL 2022 Workshop on Speech and Language Technologies for Dravidian Languages
comments: Accepted for oral presentation at ACL 2022 Workshop on Speech and Language Technologies for Dravidian Languages
abstract: Accuracy of English-language Question Answering (QA) systems has improved significantly in recent years with the advent of Transformer-based models (e.g., BERT). These models are pre-trained in a self-supervised fashion with a large English text corpus and further fine-tuned with a massive English QA dataset (e.g., SQuAD). However, QA datasets on such a scale are not available for most of the other languages. Multi-lingual BERT-based models (mBERT) are often used to transfer knowledge from high-resource languages to low-resource languages. Since these models are pre-trained with huge text corpora containing multiple languages, they typically learn language-agnostic embeddings for tokens from different languages. However, directly training an mBERT-based QA system for low-resource languages is challenging due to the paucity of training data. In this work, we augment the QA samples of the target language using translation and transliteration into other languages and use the augmented data to fine-tune an mBERT-based QA model, which is already pre-trained in English. Experiments on the Google ChAII dataset show that fine-tuning the mBERT model with translations from the same language family boosts the question-answering performance, whereas the performance degrades in the case of cross-language families. We further show that introducing a contrastive loss between the translated question-context feature pairs during the fine-tuning process, prevents such degradation with cross-lingual family translations and leads to marginal improvement. The code for this work is available at https://github.com/gokulkarthik/mucot.
summary: Accuracy of English-language Question Answering (QA) systems has improved significantly in recent years with the advent of Transformer-based models (e.g., BERT). These models are pre-trained in a self-supervised fashion with a large English text corpus and further fine-tuned with a massive English QA dataset (e.g., SQuAD). However, QA datasets on such a scale are not available for most of the other languages. Multi-lingual BERT-based models (mBERT) are often used to transfer knowledge from high-resource languages to low-resource languages. Since these models are pre-trained with huge text corpora containing multiple languages, they typically learn language-agnostic embeddings for tokens from different languages. However, directly training an mBERT-based QA system for low-resource languages is challenging due to the paucity of training data. In this work, we augment the QA samples of the target language using translation and transliteration into other languages and use the augmented data to fine-tune an mBERT-based QA model, which is already pre-trained in English. Experiments on the Google ChAII dataset show that fine-tuning the mBERT model with translations from the same language family boosts the question-answering performance, whereas the performance degrades in the case of cross-language families. We further show that introducing a contrastive loss between the translated question-context feature pairs during the fine-tuning process, prevents such degradation with cross-lingual family translations and leads to marginal improvement. The code for this work is available at https://github.com/gokulkarthik/mucot.
abstract_zh: 近年来，随着基于 Transformer 的模型（例如 BERT）的出现，英语问答 (QA) 系统的准确性显着提高。这些模型使用大型英语文本语料库以自我监督的方式进行预训练，并使用大量英语 QA 数据集（例如 SQuAD）进行进一步微调。然而，大多数其他语言都无法获得如此规模的 QA 数据集。基于多语言 BERT 的模型 (mBERT) 通常用于将知识从高资源语言迁移到低资源语言。由于这些模型是使用包含多种语言的庞大文本语料库进行预训练的，因此它们通常会学习来自不同语言的标记的与语言无关的嵌入。然而，由于训练数据的缺乏，直接训练基于 mBERT 的低资源语言 QA 系统具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们通过翻译和音译为其他语言来增强目标语言的 QA 样本，并使用增强的数据来微调基于 mBERT 的 QA 模型，该模型已经用英语进行了预训练。在 Google ChAII 数据集上的实验表明，使用同一语系的翻译对 mBERT 模型进行微调可以提高问答性能，而在跨语系的情况下，性能会下降。我们进一步表明，在微调过程中在翻译的问题上下文特征对之间引入对比损失，可以防止跨语言家族翻译的这种退化，并带来边际改进。这项工作的代码可在 https://github.com/gokulkarthik/mucot 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MuCoT方法，通过多语言对比训练提升低资源语言的问答系统性能。
AI.motivation: 英语问答系统因大量数据和预训练模型表现优异，但其他语言缺乏相应数据，多语言BERT（mBERT）在低资源语言上直接训练效果不佳。
AI.method: 利用翻译和音译扩充目标语言问答样本，基于预训练mBERT模型进行微调，并引入对比损失优化跨语言家族翻译的特征对齐。
AI.result: 在Google ChAII数据集上，同语言家族翻译提升性能，跨语言家族翻译导致下降，但对比损失有效缓解下降并带来小幅提升。
AI.conclusion: 通过翻译数据增强与对比训练，可有效提升低资源语言问答性能，尤其在语言家族内表现更佳。

search_text: MuCoT: Multilingual Contrastive Training for Question-Answering in Low-resource Languages MuCoT：低资源语言问答的多语言对比训练 Accuracy of English-language Question Answering (QA) systems has improved significantly in recent years with the advent of Transformer-based models (e.g., BERT). These models are pre-trained in a self-supervised fashion with a large English text corpus and further fine-tuned with a massive English QA dataset (e.g., SQuAD). However, QA datasets on such a scale are not available for most of the other languages. Multi-lingual BERT-based models (mBERT) are often used to transfer knowledge from high-resource languages to low-resource languages. Since these models are pre-trained with huge text corpora containing multiple languages, they typically learn language-agnostic embeddings for tokens from different languages. However, directly training an mBERT-based QA system for low-resource languages is challenging due to the paucity of training data. In this work, we augment the QA samples of the target language using translation and transliteration into other languages and use the augmented data to fine-tune an mBERT-based QA model, which is already pre-trained in English. Experiments on the Google ChAII dataset show that fine-tuning the mBERT model with translations from the same language family boosts the question-answering performance, whereas the performance degrades in the case of cross-language families. We further show that introducing a contrastive loss between the translated question-context feature pairs during the fine-tuning process, prevents such degradation with cross-lingual family translations and leads to marginal improvement. The code for this work is available at https://github.com/gokulkarthik/mucot. 近年来，随着基于 Transformer 的模型（例如 BERT）的出现，英语问答 (QA) 系统的准确性显着提高。这些模型使用大型英语文本语料库以自我监督的方式进行预训练，并使用大量英语 QA 数据集（例如 SQuAD）进行进一步微调。然而，大多数其他语言都无法获得如此规模的 QA 数据集。基于多语言 BERT 的模型 (mBERT) 通常用于将知识从高资源语言迁移到低资源语言。由于这些模型是使用包含多种语言的庞大文本语料库进行预训练的，因此它们通常会学习来自不同语言的标记的与语言无关的嵌入。然而，由于训练数据的缺乏，直接训练基于 mBERT 的低资源语言 QA 系统具有挑战性。在这项工作中，我们通过翻译和音译为其他语言来增强目标语言的 QA 样本，并使用增强的数据来微调基于 mBERT 的 QA 模型，该模型已经用英语进行了预训练。在 Google ChAII 数据集上的实验表明，使用同一语系的翻译对 mBERT 模型进行微调可以提高问答性能，而在跨语系的情况下，性能会下降。我们进一步表明，在微调过程中在翻译的问题上下文特征对之间引入对比损失，可以防止跨语言家族翻译的这种退化，并带来边际改进。这项工作的代码可在 https://github.com/gokulkarthik/mucot 获取。 本文提出MuCoT方法，通过多语言对比训练提升低资源语言的问答系统性能。 Gokul Karthik Kumar,Abhishek Singh Gehlot,Sahal Shaji Mullappilly,Karthik Nandakumar cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Pierre Bergé,Anthony Busson,Carl Feghali,Rémi Watrigant
title: 1-Extendability of independent sets
title_zh: 1-独立集的可扩展性
abstract: In the 70s, Berge introduced 1-extendable graphs (also called B-graphs), which are graphs where every vertex belongs to a maximum independent set. Motivated by an application in the design of wireless networks, we study the computational complexity of 1-extendability, the problem of deciding whether a graph is 1-extendable. We show that, in general, 1-extendability cannot be solved in $2^{o(n)}$ time assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis, where $n$ is the number of vertices of the input graph, and that it remains NP-hard in subcubic planar graphs and in unit disk graphs (which is a natural model for wireless networks). Although 1-extendability seems to be very close to the problem of finding an independent set of maximum size (a.k.a. Maximum Independent Set), we show that, interestingly, there exist 1-extendable graphs for which Maximum Independent Set is NP-hard. Finally, we investigate a parameterized version of 1-extendability.
summary: In the 70s, Berge introduced 1-extendable graphs (also called B-graphs), which are graphs where every vertex belongs to a maximum independent set. Motivated by an application in the design of wireless networks, we study the computational complexity of 1-extendability, the problem of deciding whether a graph is 1-extendable. We show that, in general, 1-extendability cannot be solved in $2^{o(n)}$ time assuming the Exponential Time Hypothesis, where $n$ is the number of vertices of the input graph, and that it remains NP-hard in subcubic planar graphs and in unit disk graphs (which is a natural model for wireless networks). Although 1-extendability seems to be very close to the problem of finding an independent set of maximum size (a.k.a. Maximum Independent Set), we show that, interestingly, there exist 1-extendable graphs for which Maximum Independent Set is NP-hard. Finally, we investigate a parameterized version of 1-extendability.
abstract_zh: 在 70 年代，Berge 引入了 1-可扩展图（也称为 B 图），即每个顶点都属于最大独立集的图。受无线网络设计中应用的启发，我们研究了 1-可扩展性的计算复杂性，即决定图是否可 1-可扩展的问题。我们表明，一般来说，假设指数时间假设，1-可扩展性不能在 $2^{o(n)}$ 时间内解决，其中 $n$ 是输入图的顶点数，并且它在次立方平面图和单位圆盘图（这是无线网络的自然模型）中仍然是 NP 难的。尽管 1-可扩展性似乎非常接近于寻找最大尺寸的独立集（又名最大独立集）的问题，但有趣的是，我们表明存在 1-可扩展图，其中最大独立集是 NP 困难的。最后，我们研究了 1-可扩展性的参数化版本。

AI.tldr: 研究图是否是1-可扩展图（每个顶点都属于某个最大独立集）的计算复杂性，即1-可扩展性判定问题。
AI.motivation: 受无线网络设计应用的启发，研究1-可扩展性问题的计算复杂性，以理解其与最大独立集问题之间的关系。
AI.method: 通过归约和复杂性理论分析，证明1-可扩展性在一般图上的时间复杂度下界（基于指数时间假设），并证明其在亚三次平面图和单位圆盘图中仍为NP难问题。同时构造反例展示1-可扩展图与最大独立集问题的关系，并研究参数化版本。
AI.result: 1-可扩展性在一般图上不能在$2^{o(n)}$时间内求解（假设指数时间假设成立）；在亚三次平面图和单位圆盘图中仍NP难；存在1-可扩展图，其最大独立集问题仍是NP难的。
AI.conclusion: 1-可扩展性问题的计算复杂性较高，即使在大规模稀疏图或无线网络模型图中也难以高效求解，且该问题与最大独立集问题存在本质差异。

authors_text: Zexuan Yin,Paolo Barucca
title: Variational Heteroscedastic Volatility Model
title_zh: 变分异方差波动率模型
abstract: We propose Variational Heteroscedastic Volatility Model (VHVM) -- an end-to-end neural network architecture capable of modelling heteroscedastic behaviour in multivariate financial time series. VHVM leverages recent advances in several areas of deep learning, namely sequential modelling and representation learning, to model complex temporal dynamics between different asset returns. At its core, VHVM consists of a variational autoencoder to capture relationships between assets, and a recurrent neural network to model the time-evolution of these dependencies. The outputs of VHVM are time-varying conditional volatilities in the form of covariance matrices. We demonstrate the effectiveness of VHVM against existing methods such as Generalised AutoRegressive Conditional Heteroscedasticity (GARCH) and Stochastic Volatility (SV) models on a wide range of multivariate foreign currency (FX) datasets.
summary: We propose Variational Heteroscedastic Volatility Model (VHVM) -- an end-to-end neural network architecture capable of modelling heteroscedastic behaviour in multivariate financial time series. VHVM leverages recent advances in several areas of deep learning, namely sequential modelling and representation learning, to model complex temporal dynamics between different asset returns. At its core, VHVM consists of a variational autoencoder to capture relationships between assets, and a recurrent neural network to model the time-evolution of these dependencies. The outputs of VHVM are time-varying conditional volatilities in the form of covariance matrices. We demonstrate the effectiveness of VHVM against existing methods such as Generalised AutoRegressive Conditional Heteroscedasticity (GARCH) and Stochastic Volatility (SV) models on a wide range of multivariate foreign currency (FX) datasets.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了变分异方差波动率模型（VHVM）——一种端到端的神经网络架构，能够对多元金融时间序列中的异方差行为进行建模。 VHVM 利用深度学习多个领域的最新进展，即顺序建模和表示学习，对不同资产回报之间的复杂时间动态进行建模。 VHVM 的核心由一个用于捕获资产之间关系的变分自动编码器和一个用于对这些依赖关系的时间演化进行建模的循环神经网络组成。 VHVM 的输出是协方差矩阵形式的时变条件波动率。我们在各种多元外币 (FX) 数据集上证明了 VHVM 相对于现有方法（例如广义自回归条件异方差 (GARCH) 和随机波动率 (SV) 模型）的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端神经网络架构VHVM，用于建模多变量金融时间序列中的异方差波动率行为，输出时间变化的协方差矩阵。
AI.motivation: 传统GARCH和SV模型在处理高维金融数据时存在局限性，需更灵活的方法捕捉资产间复杂动态关系及时间演变特征。
AI.method: 结合变分自编码器（VAE）建模资产间关系与循环神经网络（RNN）捕捉时间依赖性，输出时间变化的条件协方差矩阵。
AI.result: 在多变量外汇数据集上验证了VHVM优于GARCH和SV模型，有效捕捉异方差波动率特征。
AI.conclusion: VHVM通过深度学习方法有效建模金融时间序列的异方差波动率，为高维资产分析提供新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种端到端神经网络架构VHVM，用于建模多变量金融时间序列中的异方差波动率行为，输出时间变化的协方差矩阵。
ai_content.motivation: 传统GARCH和SV模型在处理高维金融数据时存在局限性，需更灵活的方法捕捉资产间复杂动态关系及时间演变特征。

ai_content.conclusion: VHVM通过深度学习方法有效建模金融时间序列的异方差波动率，为高维资产分析提供新思路。

search_text: Variational Heteroscedastic Volatility Model 变分异方差波动率模型 We propose Variational Heteroscedastic Volatility Model (VHVM) -- an end-to-end neural network architecture capable of modelling heteroscedastic behaviour in multivariate financial time series. VHVM leverages recent advances in several areas of deep learning, namely sequential modelling and representation learning, to model complex temporal dynamics between different asset returns. At its core, VHVM consists of a variational autoencoder to capture relationships between assets, and a recurrent neural network to model the time-evolution of these dependencies. The outputs of VHVM are time-varying conditional volatilities in the form of covariance matrices. We demonstrate the effectiveness of VHVM against existing methods such as Generalised AutoRegressive Conditional Heteroscedasticity (GARCH) and Stochastic Volatility (SV) models on a wide range of multivariate foreign currency (FX) datasets. 我们提出了变分异方差波动率模型（VHVM）——一种端到端的神经网络架构，能够对多元金融时间序列中的异方差行为进行建模。 VHVM 利用深度学习多个领域的最新进展，即顺序建模和表示学习，对不同资产回报之间的复杂时间动态进行建模。 VHVM 的核心由一个用于捕获资产之间关系的变分自动编码器和一个用于对这些依赖关系的时间演化进行建模的循环神经网络组成。 VHVM 的输出是协方差矩阵形式的时变条件波动率。我们在各种多元外币 (FX) 数据集上证明了 VHVM 相对于现有方法（例如广义自回归条件异方差 (GARCH) 和随机波动率 (SV) 模型）的有效性。 本文提出一种端到端神经网络架构VHVM，用于建模多变量金融时间序列中的异方差波动率行为，输出时间变化的协方差矩阵。 Zexuan Yin,Paolo Barucca q-fin.ST,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Anastasiia Kornilova,Dmitrii Iarosh,Denis Kukushkin,Nikolai Goncharov,Pavel Mokeev,Arthur Saliou,Gonzalo Ferrer
title: EVOPS Benchmark: Evaluation of Plane Segmentation from RGBD and LiDAR Data
title_zh: EVOPS 基准：根据 RGBD 和 LiDAR 数据评估平面分割
abstract: This paper provides the EVOPS dataset for plane segmentation from 3D data, both from RGBD images and LiDAR point clouds. We have designed two annotation methodologies (RGBD and LiDAR) running on well-known and widely-used datasets for SLAM evaluation and we have provided a complete set of benchmarking tools including point, planes and segmentation metrics. The data includes a total number of 10k RGBD and 7K LiDAR frames over different selected scenes which consist of high quality segmented planes. The experiments report quality of SOTA methods for RGBD plane segmentation on our annotated data. We also have provided learnable baseline for plane segmentation in LiDAR point clouds. All labeled data and benchmark tools used have been made publicly available at https://evops.netlify.app/.
summary: This paper provides the EVOPS dataset for plane segmentation from 3D data, both from RGBD images and LiDAR point clouds. We have designed two annotation methodologies (RGBD and LiDAR) running on well-known and widely-used datasets for SLAM evaluation and we have provided a complete set of benchmarking tools including point, planes and segmentation metrics. The data includes a total number of 10k RGBD and 7K LiDAR frames over different selected scenes which consist of high quality segmented planes. The experiments report quality of SOTA methods for RGBD plane segmentation on our annotated data. We also have provided learnable baseline for plane segmentation in LiDAR point clouds. All labeled data and benchmark tools used have been made publicly available at https://evops.netlify.app/.
abstract_zh: 本文提供了用于从 RGBD 图像和 LiDAR 点云的 3D 数据进行平面分割的 EVOPS 数据集。我们设计了两种注释方法（RGBD 和 LiDAR），在众所周知且广泛使用的数据集上运行以进行 SLAM 评估，并提供了一整套基准测试工具，包括点、平面和分割指标。该数据包括不同选定场景的总共 10k RGBD 和 7K LiDAR 帧，由高质量分段平面组成。实验报告了基于我们注释数据的 RGBD 平面分割的 SOTA 方法的质量。我们还为激光雷达点云中的平面分割提供了可学习的基线。使用的所有标记数据和基准工具均已在 https://evops.netlify.app/ 上公开提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EVOPS基准数据集，用于评估从RGBD图像和LiDAR点云中进行平面分割的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对RGBD和LiDAR数据的统一平面分割基准，阻碍了SLAM和机器人领域算法的比较与优化。
AI.method: 设计两种标注方法（RGBD和LiDAR），基于常用SLAM数据集构建包含10k RGBD和7k LiDAR帧的标注数据，并提供分割评估工具。
AI.result: 验证了当前SOTA方法在RGBD数据上的效果，提出LiDAR点云分割的可学习基线，所有数据和工具开源。
AI.conclusion: EVOPS基准为平面分割研究提供了标准化测试平台，推动了多传感器数据处理技术的发展。

authors_text: Eleonora Lopez,Eleonora Grassucci,Danilo Comminiello
title: Multi-View Hypercomplex Learning for Breast Cancer Screening
title_zh: 用于乳腺癌筛查的多视图超复杂学习
comment: This paper has been submitted to Expert Systems with Applications
comments: This paper has been submitted to Expert Systems with Applications
abstract: Radiologists interpret mammography exams by jointly analyzing all four views, as correlations among them are crucial for accurate diagnosis. Recent methods employ dedicated fusion blocks to capture such dependencies, but these are often hindered by view dominance, training instability, and computational overhead. To address these challenges, we introduce multi-view hypercomplex learning, a novel learning paradigm for multi-view breast cancer classification based on parameterized hypercomplex neural networks (PHNNs). Thanks to hypercomplex algebra, our models intrinsically capture both intra- and inter-view relations. We propose PHResNets for two-view exams and two complementary four-view architectures: PHYBOnet, optimized for efficiency, and PHYSEnet, optimized for accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multi-view models, while also generalizing across radiographic modalities and tasks such as disease classification from chest X-rays and multimodal brain tumor segmentation. Full code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/ispamm/PHBreast.
summary: Radiologists interpret mammography exams by jointly analyzing all four views, as correlations among them are crucial for accurate diagnosis. Recent methods employ dedicated fusion blocks to capture such dependencies, but these are often hindered by view dominance, training instability, and computational overhead. To address these challenges, we introduce multi-view hypercomplex learning, a novel learning paradigm for multi-view breast cancer classification based on parameterized hypercomplex neural networks (PHNNs). Thanks to hypercomplex algebra, our models intrinsically capture both intra- and inter-view relations. We propose PHResNets for two-view exams and two complementary four-view architectures: PHYBOnet, optimized for efficiency, and PHYSEnet, optimized for accuracy. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our approach consistently outperforms state-of-the-art multi-view models, while also generalizing across radiographic modalities and tasks such as disease classification from chest X-rays and multimodal brain tumor segmentation. Full code and pretrained models are available at https://github.com/ispamm/PHBreast.
abstract_zh: 放射科医生通过联合分析所有四个视图来解释乳房 X 光检查，因为它们之间的相关性对于准确诊断至关重要。最近的方法采用专用的融合块来捕获此类依赖性，但这些方法通常受到视图优势、训练不稳定和计算开销的阻碍。为了应对这些挑战，我们引入了多视图超复杂学习，这是一种基于参数化超复杂神经网络（PHNN）的多视图乳腺癌分类的新型学习范式。得益于超复杂代数，我们的模型本质上捕获了视图内和视图间关系。我们提出用于双视图考试的 PHResNet 和两个互补的四视图架构：针对效率进行优化的 PHYBOnet 和针对准确性进行优化的 PHYSEnet。大量的实验表明，我们的方法始终优于最先进的多视图模型，同时还推广了放射摄影模式和任务，例如胸部 X 射线的疾病分类和多模式脑肿瘤分割。完整代码和预训练模型可在 https://github.com/ispamm/PHBreast 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出多视图超复数学习方法，通过参数化超复数神经网络解决乳腺癌筛查中多视图分析的视图主导、训练不稳定和计算开销问题。
AI.motivation: 现有多视图乳腺癌分类方法依赖融合模块，但存在视图主导效应、训练不稳定及计算效率低的问题，需更高效捕捉视图间关联的新型学习范式。
AI.method: 基于超复数代数构建参数化超复数神经网络（PHNNs），设计PHResNets处理双视图，以及兼顾效率（PHYBOnet）与精度（PHYSEnet）的四视图架构。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在乳腺癌分类任务中优于现有模型，并成功泛化至胸部X光疾病分类和脑肿瘤分割等跨模态任务。
AI.conclusion: 超复数学习有效捕捉多视图关联，提升分类性能与泛化能力，开源代码促进方法复用与验证。

authors_text: Shaolin Ji,Shige Peng,Ying Peng,Xichuan Zhang
title: A deep learning method for solving stochastic optimal control problems driven by fully-coupled FBSDEs
title_zh: 一种解决全耦合 FBSDE 驱动的随机最优控制问题的深度学习方法
abstract: In this paper,we mainly focus on the numerical solution of high-dimensional stochastic optimal control problem driven by fully-coupled forward-backward stochastic differential equations (FBSDEs in short) through deep learning. We first transform the problem into a stochastic Stackelberg differential game problem (leader-follower problem), then a bi-level optimization method is developed where the leader's cost functional and the follower's cost functional are optimized alternatively via deep neural networks. As for the numerical results, we compute two examples of the investment-consumption problem solved through stochastic recursive utility models, and the results of both examples demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm.
summary: In this paper,we mainly focus on the numerical solution of high-dimensional stochastic optimal control problem driven by fully-coupled forward-backward stochastic differential equations (FBSDEs in short) through deep learning. We first transform the problem into a stochastic Stackelberg differential game problem (leader-follower problem), then a bi-level optimization method is developed where the leader's cost functional and the follower's cost functional are optimized alternatively via deep neural networks. As for the numerical results, we compute two examples of the investment-consumption problem solved through stochastic recursive utility models, and the results of both examples demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm.
abstract_zh: 本文主要研究通过深度学习对全耦合前向-后向随机微分方程（简称FBSDE）驱动的高维随机最优控制问题进行数值求解。我们首先将问题转化为随机 Stackelberg 微分博弈问题（领导者-跟随者问题），然后开发了一种双层优化方法，其中领导者的成本函数和跟随者的成本函数通过深度神经网络交替优化。至于数值结果，我们计算了通过随机递归效用模型解决的投资消费问题的两个例子，这两个例子的结果都证明了我们提出的算法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的数值方法，用于求解由全耦合前后向随机微分方程驱动的高维随机最优控制问题。
AI.motivation: 传统数值方法在处理高维或全耦合FBSDE时存在计算复杂度高、难以处理耦合性等问题，需探索更高效的求解技术。
AI.method: 将问题转化为随机Stackelberg博弈问题，构建双层优化框架，利用深度神经网络交替优化领导者与跟随者的成本函数。
AI.result: 通过两个投资-消费问题的数值实验验证了算法有效性，结果符合随机递归效用模型的理论预期。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法成功解决了全耦合FBSDE驱动的随机控制问题，展示了深度学习在处理复杂随机优化问题中的潜力。

search_text: A deep learning method for solving stochastic optimal control problems driven by fully-coupled FBSDEs 一种解决全耦合 FBSDE 驱动的随机最优控制问题的深度学习方法 In this paper,we mainly focus on the numerical solution of high-dimensional stochastic optimal control problem driven by fully-coupled forward-backward stochastic differential equations (FBSDEs in short) through deep learning. We first transform the problem into a stochastic Stackelberg differential game problem (leader-follower problem), then a bi-level optimization method is developed where the leader's cost functional and the follower's cost functional are optimized alternatively via deep neural networks. As for the numerical results, we compute two examples of the investment-consumption problem solved through stochastic recursive utility models, and the results of both examples demonstrate the effectiveness of our proposed algorithm. 本文主要研究通过深度学习对全耦合前向-后向随机微分方程（简称FBSDE）驱动的高维随机最优控制问题进行数值求解。我们首先将问题转化为随机 Stackelberg 微分博弈问题（领导者-跟随者问题），然后开发了一种双层优化方法，其中领导者的成本函数和跟随者的成本函数通过深度神经网络交替优化。至于数值结果，我们计算了通过随机递归效用模型解决的投资消费问题的两个例子，这两个例子的结果都证明了我们提出的算法的有效性。 本文提出一种基于深度学习的数值方法，用于求解由全耦合前后向随机微分方程驱动的高维随机最优控制问题。 Shaolin Ji,Shige Peng,Ying Peng,Xichuan Zhang math.OC,cs.AI

authors_text: Finn Behrendt,Marcel Bengs,Frederik Rogge,Julia Krüger,Roland Opfer,Alexander Schlaefer
title: Unsupervised Anomaly Detection in 3D Brain MRI using Deep Learning with impured training data
title_zh: 使用深度学习和不纯训练数据进行 3D 脑 MRI 中的无监督异常检测
comment: Accepted for publication at the ISBI22 conference
comments: Accepted for publication at the ISBI22 conference
abstract: The detection of lesions in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)-scans of human brains remains challenging, time-consuming and error-prone. Recently, unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) methods have shown promising results for this task. These methods rely on training data sets that solely contain healthy samples. Compared to supervised approaches, this significantly reduces the need for an extensive amount of labeled training data. However, data labelling remains error-prone. We study how unhealthy samples within the training data affect anomaly detection performance for brain MRI-scans. For our evaluations, we consider three publicly available data sets and use autoencoders (AE) as a well-established baseline method for UAD. We systematically evaluate the effect of impured training data by injecting different quantities of unhealthy samples to our training set of healthy samples from T1-weighted MRI-scans. We evaluate a method to identify falsely labeled samples directly during training based on the reconstruction error of the AE. Our results show that training with impured data decreases the UAD performance notably even with few falsely labeled samples. By performing outlier removal directly during training based on the reconstruction-loss, we demonstrate that falsely labeled data can be detected and removed to mitigate the effect of falsely labeled data. Overall, we highlight the importance of clean data sets for UAD in brain MRI and demonstrate an approach for detecting falsely labeled data directly during training.
summary: The detection of lesions in magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)-scans of human brains remains challenging, time-consuming and error-prone. Recently, unsupervised anomaly detection (UAD) methods have shown promising results for this task. These methods rely on training data sets that solely contain healthy samples. Compared to supervised approaches, this significantly reduces the need for an extensive amount of labeled training data. However, data labelling remains error-prone. We study how unhealthy samples within the training data affect anomaly detection performance for brain MRI-scans. For our evaluations, we consider three publicly available data sets and use autoencoders (AE) as a well-established baseline method for UAD. We systematically evaluate the effect of impured training data by injecting different quantities of unhealthy samples to our training set of healthy samples from T1-weighted MRI-scans. We evaluate a method to identify falsely labeled samples directly during training based on the reconstruction error of the AE. Our results show that training with impured data decreases the UAD performance notably even with few falsely labeled samples. By performing outlier removal directly during training based on the reconstruction-loss, we demonstrate that falsely labeled data can be detected and removed to mitigate the effect of falsely labeled data. Overall, we highlight the importance of clean data sets for UAD in brain MRI and demonstrate an approach for detecting falsely labeled data directly during training.
abstract_zh: 在人脑磁共振成像 (MRI) 扫描中检测病变仍然具有挑战性、耗时且容易出错。最近，无监督异常检测（UAD）方法在这项任务中显示出了有希望的结果。这些方法依赖于仅包含健康样本的训练数据集。与监督方法相比，这显着减少了对大量标记训练数据的需求。然而，数据标记仍然容易出错。我们研究训练数据中的不健康样本如何影响大脑 MRI 扫描的异常检测性能。在我们的评估中，我们考虑了三个公开可用的数据集，并使用自动编码器 (AE) 作为 UAD 的成熟基线方法。我们通过将不同数量的不健康样本注入来自 T1 加权 MRI 扫描的健康样本训练集，系统地评估不纯训练数据的影响。我们评估了一种在训练期间根据 AE 的重建误差直接识别错误标记样本的方法。我们的结果表明，即使使用很少的错误标记样本，使用不纯数据进行训练也会显着降低 UAD 性能。通过在基于重建损失的训练期间直接执行异常值去除，我们证明可以检测并删除错误标记的数据，以减轻错误标记数据的影响。总的来说，我们强调了大脑 MRI 中 UAD 的干净数据集的重要性，并演示了一种在训练期间直接检测错误标记数据的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了训练数据中存在不健康样本对脑部MRI无监督异常检测性能的影响，并提出了一种在训练过程中直接检测和去除错误标记数据的方法。
AI.motivation: 无监督异常检测（UAD）方法因无需大量标注数据而被用于脑MRI病变检测，但训练数据中混入不健康样本可能导致性能下降，而数据标注本身存在误差。
AI.method: 使用自编码器（AE）作为基线方法，通过向健康样本训练集注入不同比例的不健康样本，系统评估污染数据的影响，并基于重建误差在训练过程中直接检测并移除错误标注的异常样本。
AI.result: 即使少量错误标注样本也会显著降低UAD性能，而基于重建损失的异常点移除方法能有效检测并缓解错误标注的影响。
AI.conclusion: 清洁数据集对脑MRI的UAD至关重要，本文提出的方法可在训练阶段直接识别并剔除错误标注数据，提升检测效果。

authors_text: Esteban Vaca,Miriam Menzel,Katrin Amunts,Markus Axer,Timo Dickscheid
title: GORDA: Graph-based ORientation Distribution Analysis of SLI scatterometry Patterns of Nerve Fibres
title_zh: GORDA：神经纤维 SLI 散射测量模式的基于图形的方向分布分析
abstract: Scattered Light Imaging (SLI) is a novel approach for microscopically revealing the fibre architecture of unstained brain sections. The measurements are obtained by illuminating brain sections from different angles and measuring the transmitted (scattered) light under normal incidence. The evaluation of scattering profiles commonly relies on a peak picking technique and feature extraction from the peaks, which allows quantitative determination of parallel and crossing in-plane nerve fibre directions for each image pixel. However, the estimation of the 3D orientation of the fibres cannot be assessed with the traditional methodology. We propose an unsupervised learning approach using spherical convolutions for estimating the 3D orientation of neural fibres, resulting in a more detailed interpretation of the fibre orientation distributions in the brain.
summary: Scattered Light Imaging (SLI) is a novel approach for microscopically revealing the fibre architecture of unstained brain sections. The measurements are obtained by illuminating brain sections from different angles and measuring the transmitted (scattered) light under normal incidence. The evaluation of scattering profiles commonly relies on a peak picking technique and feature extraction from the peaks, which allows quantitative determination of parallel and crossing in-plane nerve fibre directions for each image pixel. However, the estimation of the 3D orientation of the fibres cannot be assessed with the traditional methodology. We propose an unsupervised learning approach using spherical convolutions for estimating the 3D orientation of neural fibres, resulting in a more detailed interpretation of the fibre orientation distributions in the brain.
abstract_zh: 散射光成像（SLI）是一种在显微镜下揭示未染色脑切片纤维结构的新方法。通过从不同角度照射大脑切片并测量法线入射下的透射（散射）光来获得测量结果。散射剖面的评估通常依赖于峰值拾取技术和从峰值中提取特征，这允许定量确定每个图像像素的平行和交叉面内神经纤维方向。然而，无法使用传统方法评估纤维 3D 取向的估计。我们提出了一种使用球形卷积来估计神经纤维 3D 方向的无监督学习方法，从而对大脑中的纤维方向分布进行更详细的解释。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的三维神经纤维方向分布分析方法GORDA，用于解析散射光成像（SLI）技术获取的脑组织神经纤维散射模式。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅能通过峰值检测技术分析SLI图像中神经纤维的二维方向信息，无法准确估计纤维的三维空间取向，限制了对脑内纤维结构的深入理解。
AI.method: 采用无监督学习框架结合球面卷积算法，从SLI散射光数据中建模神经纤维的三维方向分布，并通过图结构分析纤维空间排列特征。
AI.result: 成功实现了对未染色脑组织切片中神经纤维三维取向的定量分析，相较传统方法能更精确地表征纤维空间分布特征。
AI.conclusion: GORDA方法通过引入球面卷积和图分析技术，有效解决了SLI技术中神经纤维三维方向估计难题，为脑连接组学研究提供了新工具。

ai_content.result: 成功实现了对未染色脑组织切片中神经纤维三维取向的定量分析，相较传统方法能更精确地表征纤维空间分布特征。

ai_content_json.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于图的三维神经纤维方向分布分析方法GORDA，用于解析散射光成像（SLI）技术获取的脑组织神经纤维散射模式。
ai_content_json.motivation: 传统方法仅能通过峰值检测技术分析SLI图像中神经纤维的二维方向信息，无法准确估计纤维的三维空间取向，限制了对脑内纤维结构的深入理解。
ai_content_json.method: 采用无监督学习框架结合球面卷积算法，从SLI散射光数据中建模神经纤维的三维方向分布，并通过图结构分析纤维空间排列特征。
ai_content_json.result: 成功实现了对未染色脑组织切片中神经纤维三维取向的定量分析，相较传统方法能更精确地表征纤维空间分布特征。
ai_content_json.conclusion: GORDA方法通过引入球面卷积和图分析技术，有效解决了SLI技术中神经纤维三维方向估计难题，为脑连接组学研究提供了新工具。

motivation: 传统方法仅能通过峰值检测技术分析SLI图像中神经纤维的二维方向信息，无法准确估计纤维的三维空间取向，限制了对脑内纤维结构的深入理解。
