search_text: GORDA: Graph-based ORientation Distribution Analysis of SLI scatterometry Patterns of Nerve Fibres GORDA：神经纤维 SLI 散射测量模式的基于图形的方向分布分析 Scattered Light Imaging (SLI) is a novel approach for microscopically revealing the fibre architecture of unstained brain sections. The measurements are obtained by illuminating brain sections from different angles and measuring the transmitted (scattered) light under normal incidence. The evaluation of scattering profiles commonly relies on a peak picking technique and feature extraction from the peaks, which allows quantitative determination of parallel and crossing in-plane nerve fibre directions for each image pixel. However, the estimation of the 3D orientation of the fibres cannot be assessed with the traditional methodology. We propose an unsupervised learning approach using spherical convolutions for estimating the 3D orientation of neural fibres, resulting in a more detailed interpretation of the fibre orientation distributions in the brain. 散射光成像（SLI）是一种在显微镜下揭示未染色脑切片纤维结构的新方法。通过从不同角度照射大脑切片并测量法线入射下的透射（散射）光来获得测量结果。散射剖面的评估通常依赖于峰值拾取技术和从峰值中提取特征，这允许定量确定每个图像像素的平行和交叉面内神经纤维方向。然而，无法使用传统方法评估纤维 3D 取向的估计。我们提出了一种使用球形卷积来估计神经纤维 3D 方向的无监督学习方法，从而对大脑中的纤维方向分布进行更详细的解释。 本文提出了一种基于图的三维神经纤维方向分布分析方法GORDA，用于解析散射光成像（SLI）技术获取的脑组织神经纤维散射模式。 Esteban Vaca,Miriam Menzel,Katrin Amunts,Markus Axer,Timo Dickscheid eess.IV,cs.CV,cs.LG,q-bio.QM

authors_text: Mohit Kumar,Weiping Zhang,Lukas Fischer,Bernhard Freudenthaler
title: Membership-Mappings for Practical Secure Distributed Deep Learning
title_zh: 实用安全分布式深度学习的成员映射
abstract: This study leverages the data representation capability of fuzzy based membership-mappings for practical secure distributed deep learning using fully homomorphic encryption. The impracticality issue of secure machine (deep) learning with fully homomorphic encrypted data, arising from large computational overhead, is addressed via applying fuzzy attributes. Fuzzy attributes are induced by globally convergent and robust variational membership-mappings based local deep models. Fuzzy attributes combine the local deep models in a robust and flexible manner such that the global model can be evaluated homomorphically in an efficient manner using a boolean circuit composed of bootstrapped binary gates. The proposed method, while preserving privacy in a distributed learning scenario, remains accurate, practical, and scalable. The method is evaluated through numerous experiments including demonstrations through MNIST dataset and Freiburg Groceries Dataset. Further, a biomedical application related to mental stress detection on individuals is considered.
summary: This study leverages the data representation capability of fuzzy based membership-mappings for practical secure distributed deep learning using fully homomorphic encryption. The impracticality issue of secure machine (deep) learning with fully homomorphic encrypted data, arising from large computational overhead, is addressed via applying fuzzy attributes. Fuzzy attributes are induced by globally convergent and robust variational membership-mappings based local deep models. Fuzzy attributes combine the local deep models in a robust and flexible manner such that the global model can be evaluated homomorphically in an efficient manner using a boolean circuit composed of bootstrapped binary gates. The proposed method, while preserving privacy in a distributed learning scenario, remains accurate, practical, and scalable. The method is evaluated through numerous experiments including demonstrations through MNIST dataset and Freiburg Groceries Dataset. Further, a biomedical application related to mental stress detection on individuals is considered.
abstract_zh: 本研究利用基于模糊的隶属映射的数据表示能力，使用完全同态加密来实现实用的安全分布式深度学习。由于大量计算开销而导致使用完全同态加密数据的安全机器（深度）学习的不切实际问题，通过应用模糊属性得到解决。模糊属性是由基于局部深度模型的全局收敛和鲁棒变分隶属映射引起的。模糊属性以鲁棒且灵活的方式组合局部深度模型，使得可以使用由自举二元门组成的布尔电路以有效的方式同态地评估全局模型。所提出的方法在保护分布式学习场景中的隐私的同时，仍然保持准确、实用和可扩展。该方法通过大量实验进行评估，包括通过 MNIST 数据集和 Freiburg Groceries 数据集进行演示。此外，考虑与个体精神压力检测相关的生物医学应用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于模糊成员映射的隐私保护分布式深度学习方法，通过全同态加密解决计算开销问题。
AI.motivation: 全同态加密在安全机器学习中存在计算开销大、实用性不足的问题，需寻找兼顾隐私保护与计算效率的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用模糊属性与局部深度模型生成全局模型，通过布尔电路和引导二进制门实现高效同态评估，降低计算复杂度。
AI.result: 在MNIST和Freiburg数据集实验中验证方法有效性，且在生物医学的应激检测场景中保持准确性与可扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在隐私保护前提下实现了高效、准确的分布式深度学习，为实际应用提供了可行的技术路径。
